Strings.Value: The future's already set. I'm winning this!

Strings.Value: Hey Storm! Did you know you've got "gullible" written on the bottom of your shoe?

Strings.Value: Bring your A-game, buddy. Show me what you've got!

Strings.Value: I heard King Dodon Pa invited some professional racers this time. Do you know when they'll get here?

Strings.Value: Yeah, but this way keeps it fair. Do your best out there, big guy!

Strings.Value: Do you have lag input? Are you compatible with the vehicle? I have so many questions!

Strings.Value: He's way bigger and stronger, but he lacks finesse and foresight. I might be able to use that to my advantage!

Strings.Value: I've seen you racing a lot lately. Are you training to go pro? Is the detective thing not working out?

Strings.Value: Why did King Dodon Pa have to invite you? Whatever. I'll beat you and save Sonic the trouble!

Strings.Value: If that was supposed to be encouraging, why did it sound like a threat!?

Strings.Value: Yeah, and I'm still trying to figure them out. Are you some kind of secret genius!?

Strings.Value: That's high praise indeed! Just you watch, I'll show you what racing is all about!

Strings.Value: "Sidekick"!? I'm Sonic's respected partner! Oooh! Just for that, I'm not gonna hold back!

Strings.Original: You're on! Let's give it our all and show them how far we've come!
Strings.Value: You're on! Let's give it our all and show them how far we've come!

Strings.Value: You'd think you'd learn to stop underestimating me by now. I guess I'll just have to give you one more data point by leaving you in my dust!

Strings.Value: Wait, are you challenging me? I guess Dodon Pa is really desperate for race data. Oh well, I'll use you as a warm-up!

Strings.Original: I'm his partner! I'll show you the skills that earned his respect!
Strings.Value: I'm his partner! I'll show you the skills that earned his respect!

Strings.Value: I'm a skilled racer too! And I don't let my ego get in the way of my judgment! We're doing this whether you like it or not!

Strings.Value: That's right! I'll give it my all and show you what I can really do! Don't underestimate me!

Strings.Value: I'm not scared of you! I trained off of all of Sonic's experiences, so I already know what you're gonna do! Strange, isn't it?

Strings.Value: Thanks! I think? You know this is just a race, right? Omega? Hello!?

Strings.Original: S-Stop getting in my head! Of course I'll come in first! I've got loads of experience!
Strings.Value: S-Stop getting in my head! Of course I'll come in first! I've got loads of experience!

Strings.Original: I'm honestly not sure how much of that was a threat and how much was a compliment. I won't take you lightly either!
Strings.Value: I'm honestly not sure how much of that was a threat and how much was a compliment. I won't take you lightly either!

Strings.Value: Don't dismiss me out of hand! I've been trained by the best, and I'll use it all to beat you!

Strings.Original: Yeah! Let's show everyone what we can do! Win or lose, let's push each other to the limit!
Strings.Value: Yeah! Let's show everyone what we can do! Win or lose, let's push each other to the limit!

Strings.Original: Brace yourself! You're gonna be following me this time!
Strings.Value: Brace yourself! You're gonna be following me this time!

Strings.Original: You're all brawn and no brains! I'll barely have to apply myself to outrace you!
Strings.Value: You're all brawn and no brains! I'll barely have to apply myself to outrace you!

Strings.Original: That would defeat the purpose of this entire event! How dare you suggest I'd pollute the data pool just to win!
Strings.Value: That would defeat the purpose of this entire event! How dare you suggest I'd pollute the data pool just to win!

Strings.Original: I've grown more than you can conceptualize! And I'll prove it by leaving you in the dust!
Strings.Value: I've grown more than you can conceptualize! And I'll prove it by leaving you in the dust!

Strings.Original: Are you in denial, or did you forget all the times I helped beat you? I guess I'll just have to remind you!
Strings.Value: Are you in denial, or did you forget all the times I helped beat you? I guess I'll just have to remind you!

Strings.Original: You're just a barbarian! Beating you is going to be a piece of cake!
Strings.Value: You're just a barbarian! Beating you is going to be a piece of cake!

Strings.Original: Don't underestimate me! I'll show you what I can do out there!
Strings.Value: Don't underestimate me! I'll show you what I can do out there!

Strings.Original: That's something to be proud of!

Strings.Original: Time to give it my all!

Strings.Value: I thought you were tough, Omega?

Strings.Value: I'm Knuckles, Guardian of the Master Emerald. What do you want to know?

Strings.Original: Can you keep up the pace?
Strings.Value: Can you keep up the pace?

Strings.Original: Don't be scared. I've got this!
Strings.Value: Don't be scared. I've got this!

Strings.Value: I know you want a "friendly race," but I don't! I want a challenge! Show me what you've got!

Strings.Original: What's one of Eggman's goons doing here? Did Dodon Pa grab it by mistake? Whatever, it's no threat to me.
Strings.Value: What's one of Eggman's goons doing here? Did Dodon Pa grab it by mistake? Whatever, it's no threat to me.

Strings.Original: Espio! It's been a while. You ready to throw down over the next few laps?
Strings.Value: Espio! It's been a while. You ready to throw down over the next few laps?

Strings.Original: I was all set to enjoy this event, but then you Babylon Rogues just had to show up. Why don't you go ruin someone else's race?
Strings.Value: I was all set to enjoy this event, but then you Babylon Rogues just had to show up. Why don't you go ruin someone else's race?

Strings.Original: Tch! Why does Eggman always have to trot you out? Metal Knuckleses would've been a bigger challenge by far!
Strings.Value: Tch! Why does Eggman always have to trot you out? Metal Knuckleses would've been a bigger challenge by far!

Strings.Original: Personally, I'd rather see which one of us is tougher, but I guess a race will have to do!
Strings.Value: Personally, I'd rather see which one of us is tougher, but I guess a race will have to do!

Strings.Original: Don't get any ideas. Dodon Pa told me the Master Emerald would be safe during the event.
Strings.Value: Don't get any ideas. Dodon Pa told me the Master Emerald would be safe during the event.

Strings.Original: You may be just a kid, but you're Eggman's kid! I don't trust you, and I won't go easy on you either!
Strings.Value: You may be just a kid, but you're Eggman's kid! I don't trust you, and I won't go easy on you either!

Strings.Original: Finally! A worthy challenger. Let's see if that "ultimate life form" nonsense holds up.
Strings.Value: Finally! A worthy challenger. Let's see if that "ultimate life form" nonsense holds up.

Strings.Original: All those fancy powers mean nothing. It's just you, me, and the road!
Strings.Value: All those fancy powers mean nothing. It's just you, me, and the road!

Strings.Original: Time to throw down like the old days! And thanks to our rides, we're on even footing! May the best racer win!
Strings.Value: Time to throw down like the old days! And thanks to our rides, we're on even footing! May the best racer win!

Strings.Original: This rematch has been a long time coming. You better not have gotten rusty! I want a real challenge this time!
Strings.Value: This rematch has been a long time coming. You better not have gotten rusty! I want a real challenge this time!

Strings.Original: All right, kid, this is it. Don't think I'll go easy on you. If we're gonna race, it's to win!
Strings.Value: All right, kid, this is it. Don't think I'll go easy on you. If we're gonna race, it's to win!

Strings.Original: Good to see you and the boys all made it this time! Now get ready to race, 'cause I'm not gonna go easy on you!
Strings.Value: Good to see you and the boys all made it this time! Now get ready to race, 'cause I'm not gonna go easy on you!

Strings.Original: It takes more than a few smooth moves to win. It takes skill, dedication, and talent!
Strings.Value: It takes more than a few smooth moves to win. It takes skill, dedication, and talent!

Strings.Original: You better be glad we're only supposed to race. Otherwise, we'd throw down right now!
Strings.Value: You better be glad we're only supposed to race. Otherwise, we'd throw down right now!

Strings.Original: All right, wild guy! You better not dent my ride! Otherwise, I'll bust yours up worse!
Strings.Value: All right, wild guy! You better not dent my ride! Otherwise, I'll bust yours up worse!

Strings.Original: I like that attitude! Yeah! Now I'm all fired up! Let's go!
Strings.Value: I like that attitude! Yeah! Now I'm all fired up! Let's go!

Strings.Original: No! I want an exciting, challenging race! Don't hold back on me!
Strings.Value: No! I want an exciting, challenging race! Don't hold back on me!

Strings.Original: I take it in stride and do my best each time. Clear your head, Princess!
Strings.Value: I take it in stride and do my best each time. Clear your head, Princess!

Strings.Original: Grr, it's too early to boast, kid! Looks like I need to knock you down a peg!
Strings.Value: Grr, it's too early to boast, kid! Looks like I need to knock you down a peg!

Strings.Original: Don't worry, kid. I won't get rough with you. But if you wanna run with us, you've gotta toughen up!
Strings.Value: Don't worry, kid. I won't get rough with you. But if you wanna run with us, you've gotta toughen up!

Strings.Original: I hope your racing isn't as lazy as your tricks, Eggman. I'll beat you, fair and square.
Strings.Value: I hope your racing isn't as lazy as your tricks, Eggman. I'll beat you, fair and square.

Strings.Original: Really? I've torn through a hundred of you. Maybe a thousand. Eh, fine, what's one more on the pile?
Strings.Value: Really? I've torn through a hundred of you. Maybe a thousand. Eh, fine, what's one more on the pile?

Strings.Original: You said it! I know I can count on you to put up a fight. Let's go! And don't hold nothin' back!
Strings.Value: You said it! I know I can count on you to put up a fight. Let's go! And don't hold nothin' back!

Strings.Original: I'm as real as they come! You're just scared of how bad I'm gonna beat you!
Strings.Value: I'm as real as they come! You're just scared of how bad I'm gonna beat you!

Strings.Original: Were those fighting words!? I honestly can't tell, but I bet they were! You're on!
Strings.Value: Were those fighting words!? I honestly can't tell, but I bet they were! You're on!

Strings.Original: Oh yeah? Well, there's only one of you left too! Let's see who's standing by the end of this!
Strings.Value: Oh yeah? Well, there's only one of you left too! Let's see who's standing by the end of this!

Strings.Original: I know how to drive! Race, I mean! I even know the distinction between the two! I'll show you!
Strings.Value: I know how to drive! Race, I mean! I even know the distinction between the two! I'll show you!

Strings.Original: Like father, like daughter, huh? I'm not falling for it! Next time you try to trick me, keep it simple.
Strings.Value: Like father, like daughter, huh? I'm not falling for it! Next time you try to trick me, keep it simple.

Strings.Original: Don't worry, I won't hold back. Now let's stop talking and get to racing!
Strings.Value: Don't worry, I won't hold back. Now let's stop talking and get to racing!

Strings.Original: Sure thing. We'll start by you watching how I beat you in the race. Haha!
Strings.Value: Sure thing. We'll start by you watching how I beat you in the race. Haha!

Strings.Original: Big talk, little man. I'll put you in your place!
Strings.Value: Big talk, little man. I'll put you in your place!

Strings.Original: You're on! I've been waiting for the day I can knock you down a peg again!
Strings.Value: You're on! I've been waiting for the day I can knock you down a peg again!

Strings.Original: Don't need to. Don't believe me? I'll show you.
Strings.Value: Don't need to. Don't believe me? I'll show you.

Strings.Original: Sorry, Vector, but not a chance. What kind of friend would I be if I didn't show you the respect of a proper competition?
Strings.Value: Sorry, Vector, but not a chance. What kind of friend would I be if I didn't show you the respect of a proper competition?

Strings.Original: I've tangled with your gang before. And frankly? Not impressed.
Strings.Value: I've tangled with your gang before. And frankly? Not impressed.

Strings.Original: Yeah, yeah, yeah. Put up or shut up, ugly!
Strings.Value: Yeah, yeah, yeah. Put up or shut up, ugly!

Strings.Original: I'd like nothing better. But I came here to race, so I'll just have to settle for beating you on the track.
Strings.Value: I'd like nothing better. But I came here to race, so I'll just have to settle for beating you on the track.

Strings.Original: You really wanna try? Be my guest!
Strings.Value: You really wanna try? Be my guest!

Strings.Original: This proves nothing. Let's go again!
Strings.Value: This proves nothing. Let's go again!

Strings.Original: Grr, I'll get you next time!
Strings.Value: Grr, I'll get you next time!

Strings.Original: Hey, you tried! I'm just better!
Strings.Value: Hey, you tried! I'm just better!

Strings.Original: Follow me inside, outside, through the stratosphere!
Strings.Value: Follow me inside, outside, through the stratosphere!

Strings.Original: Victory so sweet, I gotta savor it!
Strings.Value: Victory so sweet, I gotta savor it!

Strings.Original: Ooh! So many shops! So many options!
Strings.Value: Ooh! So many shops! So many options!

Strings.Original: I have to bring Cream here later!
Strings.Value: I have to bring Cream here later!

Strings.Original: Nope! Not getting trapped here again!
Strings.Value: Nope! Not getting trapped here again!

Strings.Original: Ooh! If I see Trip, I need to stop and say "Hi!"
Strings.Value: Ooh! If I see Trip, I need to stop and say "Hi!"

Strings.Original: I know this place like the back of my hand!
Strings.Value: I know this place like the back of my hand!

Strings.Original: So many sweets! I love it!
Strings.Value: So many sweets! I love it!

Strings.Original: I know I can do better!
Strings.Value: I know I can do better!

Strings.Original: I did my best, and that's what counts!
Strings.Value: I did my best, and that's what counts!

Strings.Original: And the crowd goes wild! Yay!
Strings.Value: And the crowd goes wild! Yay!

Strings.Original: I've got more where that came from, Zavok!
Strings.Value: I've got more where that came from, Zavok!

Strings.Original: Have no fear! Amy Rose is here!
Strings.Value: Have no fear! Amy Rose is here!

Strings.Original: You're making me work for it!
Strings.Value: You're making me work for it!

Strings.Original: I've got to make this count!
Strings.Value: I've got to make this count!

Strings.Original: It's okay! You tried your best!
Strings.Value: It's okay! You tried your best!

Strings.Original: I want to get started already!
Strings.Value: I want to get started already!

Strings.Original: All the hard work is paying off!
Strings.Value: All the hard work is paying off!

Strings.Original: We made it this far thanks to you. You're the best!
Strings.Value: We made it this far thanks to you. You're the best!

Strings.Original: I'm surprised to see you out here too. I didn't know you enjoyed racing so much.
Strings.Value: I'm surprised to see you out here too. I didn't know you enjoyed racing so much.

Strings.Original: Oh, this is gonna be so much fun! I can't wait to see what you can do on the track! See you at the finish line!
Strings.Value: Oh, this is gonna be so much fun! I can't wait to see what you can do on the track! See you at the finish line!

Strings.Original: This is your first time at one of these things, right? Don't worry! Just follow my lead, and you'll do fine!
Strings.Value: This is your first time at one of these things, right? Don't worry! Just follow my lead, and you'll do fine!

Strings.Original: I'm so proud to see you out here! Let's show everyone what we can do and lead the pack!
Strings.Value: I'm so proud to see you out here! Let's show everyone what we can do and lead the pack!

Strings.Original: Don't you dare underestimate me! I'm bringing my all to this race!
Strings.Value: Don't you dare underestimate me! I'm bringing my all to this race!

Strings.Original: Okay, wasn't expecting one of you here. Well, get in my way and I'll smash you!
Strings.Value: Okay, wasn't expecting one of you here. Well, get in my way and I'll smash you!

Strings.Original: This is going to be intense! How about an inspirational poem before we get going?
Strings.Value: This is going to be intense! How about an inspirational poem before we get going?

Strings.Original: In the spirit of competition, I'll wish you a good race. Just keep the trash talk to a minimum, please?
Strings.Value: In the spirit of competition, I'll wish you a good race. Just keep the trash talk to a minimum, please?

Strings.Original: Oh, I know you won't hold back, so neither will I! Let's just see who's the toughest racer!
Strings.Value: Oh, I know you won't hold back, so neither will I! Let's just see who's the toughest racer!

Strings.Original: Ugh! Did Eggman forget he made a Metal Amy too? Why do we always have to put up with you?
Strings.Value: Ugh! Did Eggman forget he made a Metal Amy too? Why do we always have to put up with you?

Strings.Original: I know things can get heated out there, but this isn't a battle, all right? It's just a race. Keep it civil!
Strings.Value: I know things can get heated out there, but this isn't a battle, all right? It's just a race. Keep it civil!

Strings.Original: Can I count on you to run a clean race? Or am I gonna keep checking over my shoulder for some dirty trick?
Strings.Value: Can I count on you to run a clean race? Or am I gonna keep checking over my shoulder for some dirty trick?

Strings.Original: So, you were invited too, huh? After all we've been through, is this a friendly competition or are we gonna have problems?
Strings.Value: So, you were invited too, huh? After all we've been through, is this a friendly competition or are we gonna have problems?

Strings.Original: Ooh, you're gonna be a tough one to beat! Win or lose, let's make sure to have fun, okay?
Strings.Value: Ooh, you're gonna be a tough one to beat! Win or lose, let's make sure to have fun, okay?

Strings.Original: Let's have a great race, Sonic! Wait—I mean, Shadow! Haha. No—huh, you're Silver. Oh, sorry for the mix-up!
Strings.Value: Let's have a great race, Sonic! Wait—I mean, Shadow! Haha. No—huh, you're Silver. Oh, sorry for the mix-up!

Strings.Original: Bye, Sonic! I'll turn back and wave to you as I cross the finish line!
Strings.Value: Bye, Sonic! I'll turn back and wave to you as I cross the finish line!

Strings.Original: Why are you staring at me so intensely? Blink already! You're freaking me out!
Strings.Value: Why are you staring at me so intensely? Blink already! You're freaking me out!

Strings.Original: You're looking to improve yourself, right? Then as your friend, I'll put you through the paces! Brace yourself!
Strings.Value: You're looking to improve yourself, right? Then as your friend, I'll put you through the paces! Brace yourself!

Strings.Original: Ha! Sorry! We're not doing "Team Rose" this time! Win or lose, it's all on each of us!
Strings.Value: Ha! Sorry! We're not doing "Team Rose" this time! Win or lose, it's all on each of us!

Strings.Original: You seem like the most mature of the Babylon Rogues. Can't you keep those boys in line?
Strings.Value: You seem like the most mature of the Babylon Rogues. Can't you keep those boys in line?

Strings.Original: Do you even know how to play fair? Or am I gonna have to deal with your bullying from the start?
Strings.Value: Do you even know how to play fair? Or am I gonna have to deal with your bullying from the start?

Strings.Original: You better not mess up my ride! You can enjoy the race without crashing into everyone, you know!
Strings.Value: You better not mess up my ride! You can enjoy the race without crashing into everyone, you know!

Strings.Original: I'm so sorry, Big! We're racing against each other! Still, do your best!
Strings.Value: I'm so sorry, Big! We're racing against each other! Still, do your best!

Strings.Original: Win or lose, today is gonna be amazing! Show me what you've got!
Strings.Value: Win or lose, today is gonna be amazing! Show me what you've got!

Strings.Original: You'd think Vector and Espio would've taught you good sportsmanship. Looks like I'll have to teach you a lesson myself!
Strings.Value: You'd think Vector and Espio would've taught you good sportsmanship. Looks like I'll have to teach you a lesson myself!

Strings.Original: No team-ups this time. You'll have to win on your own merits. But I believe in you! Let's go!
Strings.Value: No team-ups this time. You'll have to win on your own merits. But I believe in you! Let's go!

Strings.Original: Oooh! Just you wait! I'll lap you out of spite!
Strings.Value: Oooh! Just you wait! I'll lap you out of spite!

Strings.Original: I won't let Eggman distract anyone with your antics! It's time to take you down!
Strings.Value: I won't let Eggman distract anyone with your antics! It's time to take you down!

Strings.Original: Uh, yeah, it's a race! Just because we're competing doesn't mean we're fighting! Calm down!
Strings.Value: Uh, yeah, it's a race! Just because we're competing doesn't mean we're fighting! Calm down!

Strings.Original: I'm here to race, same as you, jerk! And when I win, I'm not gonna be gracious about it!
Strings.Value: I'm here to race, same as you, jerk! And when I win, I'm not gonna be gracious about it!

Strings.Original: All right, we'll do it your way! No-holds-barred racing action! Just remember, you asked for this!
Strings.Value: All right, we'll do it your way! No-holds-barred racing action! Just remember, you asked for this!

Strings.Original: My days of running from you are over! Watch your back, because I'm chasing you all the way to the finish line!
Strings.Value: My days of running from you are over! Watch your back, because I'm chasing you all the way to the finish line!

Strings.Original: Oh yeah!? We'll see who's "weak" by the end of this! Let's go, you glorified Eggrobo!
Strings.Value: Oh yeah!? We'll see who's "weak" by the end of this! Let's go, you glorified Eggrobo!

Strings.Original: That's... why'd you have to put it that way!? Augh! Now I really have to do my best with everyone watching!
Strings.Value: That's... why'd you have to put it that way!? Augh! Now I really have to do my best with everyone watching!

Strings.Original: Just because I'm nice doesn't mean I'll go easy on you! Especially after talking trash like that!
Strings.Value: Just because I'm nice doesn't mean I'll go easy on you! Especially after talking trash like that!

Strings.Original: I've got determination for days, and I don't need to be a jerk about it!
Strings.Value: I've got determination for days, and I don't need to be a jerk about it!

Strings.Original: Um, Silver, we're competing against each other. Do your best! But I'm not gonna go easy on you!
Strings.Value: Um, Silver, we're competing against each other. Do your best! But I'm not gonna go easy on you!

Strings.Original: Funny, I was about to say the same to you. Get ready to eat my dust!
Strings.Value: Funny, I was about to say the same to you. Get ready to eat my dust!

Strings.Original: Was that a threat? I honestly can't tell with you. Whatever, I intend to win!
Strings.Value: Was that a threat? I honestly can't tell with you. Whatever, I intend to win!

Strings.Original: I've been driving as long as you've been flying! Don't count me out yet!
Strings.Value: I've been driving as long as you've been flying! Don't count me out yet!

Strings.Original: Sorry, Vector! This one's a free-for-all! I'm sure you'll do fine! Second place behind me is nothing to be ashamed of!
Strings.Value: Sorry, Vector! This one's a free-for-all! I'm sure you'll do fine! Second place behind me is nothing to be ashamed of!

Strings.Original: I'm fascinating! Watch! You'll be captivated by my flawless racing victory!
Strings.Value: I'm fascinating! Watch! You'll be captivated by my flawless racing victory!

Strings.Original: I can handle myself, thank you very much. More importantly: I can definitely handle you!
Strings.Value: I can handle myself, thank you very much. More importantly: I can definitely handle you!

Strings.Original: Reel in that tongue, you creep, and stick to your lane! Otherwise, you'll see how wild I can be!
Strings.Value: Reel in that tongue, you creep, and stick to your lane! Otherwise, you'll see how wild I can be!

Strings.Original: Don't worry, I'll go easy on you!
Strings.Value: Don't worry, I'll go easy on you!

Strings.Original: We both did great! Nice job!
Strings.Value: We both did great! Nice job!

Strings.Original: Was there ever any doubt? Of course not!
Strings.Value: Was there ever any doubt? Of course not!

Strings.Original: Time for a change of pace!
Strings.Value: Time for a change of pace!

Strings.Original: You all struggled, and for what?
Strings.Value: You all struggled, and for what?

Strings.Original: G.U.N. tech is so last century!
Strings.Value: G.U.N. tech is so last century!

Strings.Original: One day, this place will be mine again!
Strings.Value: One day, this place will be mine again!

Strings.Original: Yes! Show me your manufacturing secrets!
Strings.Value: Yes! Show me your manufacturing secrets!

Strings.Original: Behold! A showcase of my brilliance!
Strings.Value: Behold! A showcase of my brilliance!

Strings.Original: Ooh! This place is giving me ideas!
Strings.Value: Ooh! This place is giving me ideas!

Strings.Original: This almost compares with my EggNet!
Strings.Value: This almost compares with my EggNet!

Strings.Original: That was very, very rude, Cream!
Strings.Value: That was very, very rude, Cream!

Strings.Original: This is only a minor setback.
Strings.Value: This is only a minor setback.

Strings.Original: This is just building false confidence.
Strings.Value: This is just building false confidence.

Strings.Original: Ah, I can make use of this!
Strings.Value: Ah, I can make use of this!

Strings.Original: The data is bugged! Bugged I tell you!
Strings.Value: The data is bugged! Bugged I tell you!

Strings.Original: Eh, I let you have this one.
Strings.Value: Eh, I let you have this one.

Strings.Original: They're not going to get away with this!
Strings.Value: They're not going to get away with this!

Strings.Original: No way! I don't believe this!
Strings.Value: No way! I don't believe this!

Strings.Original: There's something wrong with the accelerator.
Strings.Value: There's something wrong with the accelerator.

Strings.Original: Now you know why I am the best!
Strings.Value: Now you know why I am the best!

Strings.Original: Bow to a true emperor, Blaze!
Strings.Value: Bow to a true emperor, Blaze!

Strings.Original: Not so tough now, eh, Knuckles?
Strings.Value: Not so tough now, eh, Knuckles?

Strings.Original: Get back in line, Metal Sonic!
Strings.Value: Get back in line, Metal Sonic!

Strings.Original: Too weak to take that, Tails?
Strings.Value: Too weak to take that, Tails?

Strings.Original: Make way for your betters, Wave!
Strings.Value: Make way for your betters, Wave!

Strings.Original: I am Dr. Eggman, the greatest scientific genius in the world!
Strings.Value: I am Dr. Eggman, the greatest scientific genius in the world!

Strings.Original: I won't accept defeat! I won't!
Strings.Value: I won't accept defeat! I won't!

Strings.Original: Give up now and save yourself the humiliation!
Strings.Value: Give up now and save yourself the humiliation!

Strings.Original: I have things to do, you know?
Strings.Value: I have things to do, you know?

Strings.Original: Get back here and start racing!
Strings.Value: Get back here and start racing!

Strings.Original: A true genius wouldn't settle for this.
Strings.Value: A true genius wouldn't settle for this.

Strings.Original: Mm. This will do for now.
Strings.Value: Mm. This will do for now.

Strings.Original: Now you fully understand the scope of my genius.
Strings.Value: Now you fully understand the scope of my genius.

Strings.Original: No, you fool! That was terrible!
Strings.Value: No, you fool! That was terrible!

Strings.Original: You do know how to accelerate in that, don't you? Or is it too technical? Sorry, but I don't have time to explain it to you.
Strings.Value: You do know how to accelerate in that, don't you? Or is it too technical? Sorry, but I don't have time to explain it to you.

Strings.Original:
Oh. It's you again. What's-your-name? Very plain and overt. "Big"!
Oh-ho-ho, what a forgettable oaf you are!
Strings.Value:
Oh. It's you again. What's-your-name? Very plain and overt. "Big"!
Oh-ho-ho, what a forgettable oaf you are!

Strings.Original: You're quite far from home! Does that mean the Sol Emeralds are unprotected?
Strings.Value: You're quite far from home! Does that mean the Sol Emeralds are unprotected?

Strings.Original: Honestly, they let anyone race these days. Go away, kid, you bother me! Shoo! Shoo!
Strings.Value: Honestly, they let anyone race these days. Go away, kid, you bother me! Shoo! Shoo!

Strings.Original: Oh-ho-ho! If you're my opponent, they should just give me the trophy. Run along home to your mommy.
Strings.Value: Oh-ho-ho! If you're my opponent, they should just give me the trophy. Run along home to your mommy.

Strings.Original: Oh good, you're up! Make it look like you're trying, but don't make me work too hard, understand?
Strings.Value: Oh good, you're up! Make it look like you're trying, but don't make me work too hard, understand?

Strings.Original: Your ancient martial arts have no place on the modern race track! Prepare to have your archaic techniques put to shame!
Strings.Value: Your ancient martial arts have no place on the modern race track! Prepare to have your archaic techniques put to shame!

Strings.Original: Well, if it isn't Jet! Interested in another partnership? I can make it worth your while!
Strings.Value: Well, if it isn't Jet! Interested in another partnership? I can make it worth your while!

Strings.Original: How about I let you in on a secret? If you drive backwards at the start, you'll find a shortcut!
Strings.Value: How about I let you in on a secret? If you drive backwards at the start, you'll find a shortcut!

Strings.Original: Hmm, Dodon Pa must be testing the variables. Very well! I won't lose to my own creation!
Strings.Value: Hmm, Dodon Pa must be testing the variables. Very well! I won't lose to my own creation!

Strings.Original: O-Omega! How about we bury the hatchet for now? Metaphorically speaking.
Strings.Value: O-Omega! How about we bury the hatchet for now? Metaphorically speaking.

Strings.Original: What's your angle this time? Is this all a cover for a spy mission? You trying to monitor my unmatchable racing skill?
Strings.Value: What's your angle this time? Is this all a cover for a spy mission? You trying to monitor my unmatchable racing skill?

Strings.Original: I want you to do your best and make me proud. Let's show these fools what we can do!
Strings.Value: I want you to do your best and make me proud. Let's show these fools what we can do!

Strings.Original: Quite the lineup of competitors, isn't it? Join forces with me again, and we'll crush all the opposition!
Strings.Value: Quite the lineup of competitors, isn't it? Join forces with me again, and we'll crush all the opposition!

Strings.Original:
Another miserable upstart hedgehog, eh?
No matter! I'll crush your spirit like all the others!
Strings.Value:
Another miserable upstart hedgehog, eh?
No matter! I'll crush your spirit like all the others!

Strings.Original: We meet again, my worthy adversary! Prepare to be humbled before my mechanical might! Ha-ha-ha!
Strings.Value: We meet again, my worthy adversary! Prepare to be humbled before my mechanical might! Ha-ha-ha!

Strings.Original: Get out of my way, simpleton! A genius of my caliber doesn't trouble himself with the hired help!
Strings.Value: Get out of my way, simpleton! A genius of my caliber doesn't trouble himself with the hired help!

Strings.Original: What is this, the warm-up round? Go prep Sonic's ride and let me know when the real challenge is about to start.
Strings.Value: What is this, the warm-up round? Go prep Sonic's ride and let me know when the real challenge is about to start.

Strings.Original: What are you doing, wasting your time here? Shouldn't you be chasing down purse-snatchers and bank robbers?
Strings.Value: What are you doing, wasting your time here? Shouldn't you be chasing down purse-snatchers and bank robbers?

Strings.Original: What's the matter, Wave? Intimidated by the superior technology? Do I need to explain it to you?
Strings.Value: What's the matter, Wave? Intimidated by the superior technology? Do I need to explain it to you?

Strings.Original: Zavok! How horrible to see you. Are you ready to be humiliated once again?
Strings.Value: Zavok! How horrible to see you. Are you ready to be humiliated once again?

Strings.Original: Are you even qualified to drive? You shouldn't be allowed outside without supervision, let alone put behind the wheel!
Strings.Value: Are you even qualified to drive? You shouldn't be allowed outside without supervision, let alone put behind the wheel!

Strings.Original: Oh, I'll be sure to treat you to the same malicious mercilessness as everyone else!
Strings.Value: Oh, I'll be sure to treat you to the same malicious mercilessness as everyone else!

Strings.Original: You have excellent taste! If you manage to win, I'll have one tailor-made for you.
Strings.Value: You have excellent taste! If you manage to win, I'll have one tailor-made for you.

Strings.Original: You're always so uptight! I can't believe you're making me miss Sonic's impertinence.
Strings.Value: You're always so uptight! I can't believe you're making me miss Sonic's impertinence.

Strings.Original: If I could convert your delusions of grandeur to raw power, I could fuel three Death Eggs. Get out of my way, brat!
Strings.Value: If I could convert your delusions of grandeur to raw power, I could fuel three Death Eggs. Get out of my way, brat!

Strings.Original: You're not the boss of me! And neither is he! I'm winning this on my own terms!
Strings.Value: You're not the boss of me! And neither is he! I'm winning this on my own terms!

Strings.Original: Do I have some systematic bug in my code that renders my creations rebellious!? I'll crush you for your defiance!
Strings.Value: Do I have some systematic bug in my code that renders my creations rebellious!? I'll crush you for your defiance!

Strings.Original: What are you muttering about? Play around on your own time, you wannabe ninja! I have a race to win!
Strings.Value: What are you muttering about? Play around on your own time, you wannabe ninja! I have a race to win!

Strings.Original: Don't talk to me about aspirations! You can't even dream on my level! Time to put you in your place!
Strings.Value: Don't talk to me about aspirations! You can't even dream on my level! Time to put you in your place!

Strings.Original: Don't get too confident, you ruffian! You're up against a genius! I have you outclassed in every way imaginable!
Strings.Value: Don't get too confident, you ruffian! You're up against a genius! I have you outclassed in every way imaginable!

Strings.Original: Don't get sassy with me! I made you and I can unmake you!
Strings.Value: Don't get sassy with me! I made you and I can unmake you!

Strings.Original: I can't believe I lost control of such a vicious machine! I'll crush that rebellious spirit yet!
Strings.Value: I can't believe I lost control of such a vicious machine! I'll crush that rebellious spirit yet!

Strings.Original: Bah! This is all a convenient excuse to crush my enemies! And since you're not on a mission for me, that includes you!
Strings.Value: Bah! This is all a convenient excuse to crush my enemies! And since you're not on a mission for me, that includes you!

Strings.Original: Because I've been focusing on conquering the real world! Just like you should be focusing on the race!
Strings.Value: Because I've been focusing on conquering the real world! Just like you should be focusing on the race!

Strings.Original: Don't pretend to understand the brilliance of geniuses! Perhaps you'll learn to appreciate us after I beat you!
Strings.Value: Don't pretend to understand the brilliance of geniuses! Perhaps you'll learn to appreciate us after I beat you!

Strings.Original: Oh, for the love of— It's just a race! To see who's the fastest! If I were planning something, I wouldn't use Dodon Pa's rentals!
Strings.Value: Oh, for the love of— It's just a race! To see who's the fastest! If I were planning something, I wouldn't use Dodon Pa's rentals!

Strings.Original: You can't beat the odds forever, rodent! I will destroy you on the track!
Strings.Value: You can't beat the odds forever, rodent! I will destroy you on the track!

Strings.Original: What are you talking about? I'm here racing the same as you! Bah! Just for that sass, I won't hold back!
Strings.Value: What are you talking about? I'm here racing the same as you! Bah! Just for that sass, I won't hold back!

Strings.Original: Yes... ah! Bear in mind the hazards are very real here, boy. As am I.
Strings.Value: Yes... ah! Bear in mind the hazards are very real here, boy. As am I.

Strings.Original: Oh, I fully intend to! With this race's prize, no less! All the more reason to let me win, no?
Strings.Value: Oh, I fully intend to! With this race's prize, no less! All the more reason to let me win, no?

Strings.Original: I'm doing him a favor by gracing him with my brilliant insight and expertise! You could learn a thing or two from me!
Strings.Value: I'm doing him a favor by gracing him with my brilliant insight and expertise! You could learn a thing or two from me!

Strings.Original: Sheesh! You subjugate somebody once and they bear a grudge forever! Looks like I'll just have to humble you again!
Strings.Value: Sheesh! You subjugate somebody once and they bear a grudge forever! Looks like I'll just have to humble you again!

Strings.Original: You're no threat to me, you yammering yokel. I'll crush you on the track and put you in your place!
Strings.Value: You're no threat to me, you yammering yokel. I'll crush you on the track and put you in your place!

Strings.Original: You dare to challenge me? Fool!
Strings.Value: You dare to challenge me? Fool!

Strings.Original: If at first you don't succeed, give up and submit! HA HA HA!
Strings.Value: If at first you don't succeed, give up and submit! HA HA HA!

Strings.Original: And now for the next phase of my plan!
Strings.Value: And now for the next phase of my plan!

Strings.Original: I humbly accept your tribute to my greatness!
Strings.Value: I humbly accept your tribute to my greatness!

Strings.Original: Yes, yes! Present me with more accolades.
Strings.Value: Yes, yes! Present me with more accolades.

Strings.Original: Now you understand I am peak perfection.
Strings.Value: Now you understand I am peak perfection.

Strings.Original: I'll show you how it's done.
Strings.Value: I'll show you how it's done.

Strings.Original: I can endure any freezing cold.
Strings.Value: I can endure any freezing cold.

Strings.Original: I can endure any scorching heat.
Strings.Value: I can endure any scorching heat.

Strings.Original: It should've been styled after me!
Strings.Value: It should've been styled after me!

Strings.Original: Hmph. G.U.N. arsenal, reduced to a show piece.
Strings.Value: Hmph. G.U.N. arsenal, reduced to a show piece.

Strings.Original: I can't let my guard down here.
Strings.Value: I can't let my guard down here.

Strings.Original: I never thought I would come back here again.
Strings.Value: I never thought I would come back here again.

Strings.Original: Hmph! Digital or physical, I can handle it!
Strings.Value: Hmph! Digital or physical, I can handle it!

Strings.Original: Do you know who I am, Sage!?
Strings.Value: Do you know who I am, Sage!?

Strings.Original: You let your guard down, Knuckles!
Strings.Value: You let your guard down, Knuckles!

Strings.Original: I am Shadow, the ultimate life form.
Strings.Value: I am Shadow, the ultimate life form.

Strings.Original: Save your last shred of dignity and give up.
Strings.Value: Save your last shred of dignity and give up.

Strings.Original: I am immortal. You are not.
Strings.Value: I am immortal. You are not.

Strings.Original: You're too kindhearted. Victory on the track can only be won with ruthless determination.
Strings.Value: You're too kindhearted. Victory on the track can only be won with ruthless determination.

Strings.Original: I've heard of your power. I expect to see it for myself today.
Strings.Value: I've heard of your power. I expect to see it for myself today.

Strings.Original: I shouldn't have to waste my time with the likes of you. Forfeit now and save yourself the embarrassment.
Strings.Value: I shouldn't have to waste my time with the likes of you. Forfeit now and save yourself the embarrassment.

Strings.Original: The competition will be fierce. Are you prepared for it?
Strings.Value: The competition will be fierce. Are you prepared for it?

Strings.Original: Between you and King Dodon Pa, I don't know which mechanic is more frivolous with their time and creations.
Strings.Value: Between you and King Dodon Pa, I don't know which mechanic is more frivolous with their time and creations.

Strings.Original: What's this? Feh. More fodder to be destroyed on the way to victory.
Strings.Value: What's this? Feh. More fodder to be destroyed on the way to victory.

Strings.Original: Winning today requires clear, bold action. If I'm against you, I've already won.
Strings.Value: Winning today requires clear, bold action. If I'm against you, I've already won.

Strings.Original: I hear you can actually challenge Sonic in terms of speed. Don't disappoint me.
Strings.Value: I hear you can actually challenge Sonic in terms of speed. Don't disappoint me.

Strings.Original: Finally, someone who treats competitions with gravitas. I expect your best. Don't disappoint me.
Strings.Value: Finally, someone who treats competitions with gravitas. I expect your best. Don't disappoint me.

Strings.Original: You're a weak imitation with weaker ambitions. Don't waste my time.
Strings.Value: You're a weak imitation with weaker ambitions. Don't waste my time.

Strings.Original: You will make a formidable adversary. Be grateful this is only a race.
Strings.Value: You will make a formidable adversary. Be grateful this is only a race.

Strings.Original: So you're my opponent? Hmph. I'll have to watch my back.
Strings.Value: So you're my opponent? Hmph. I'll have to watch my back.

Strings.Original: The doctor's daughter? Hmph. Perhaps if he put more care into your construction, you'd provide more of a challenge.
Strings.Value: The doctor's daughter? Hmph. Perhaps if he put more care into your construction, you'd provide more of a challenge.

Strings.Original: Power means nothing without skill and conviction. You're out of your league.
Strings.Value: Power means nothing without skill and conviction. You're out of your league.

Strings.Original: Today we settle it—who is the best racer between us, Blue Hedgehog.
Strings.Value: Today we settle it—who is the best racer between us, Blue Hedgehog.

Strings.Original: You're supposed to be the brawn? Hmph. You don't look so tough to me.
Strings.Value: You're supposed to be the brawn? Hmph. You don't look so tough to me.

Strings.Original: Pit against Sonic's understudy? Hmph. I thought this might be challenging.
Strings.Value: Pit against Sonic's understudy? Hmph. I thought this might be challenging.

Strings.Original: The detective? Hmph. What will "deductive reasoning" do on the race track?
Strings.Value: The detective? Hmph. What will "deductive reasoning" do on the race track?

Strings.Original: Your gang of delinquents don't belong in a competitive space. Begone!
Strings.Value: Your gang of delinquents don't belong in a competitive space. Begone!

Strings.Original: What is a warlord like you doing in an event like this? Don't tell me you've lost your edge.
Strings.Value: What is a warlord like you doing in an event like this? Don't tell me you've lost your edge.

Strings.Original: A wild barbarian is no threat to me. You're just as likely to drive off the road than finish a lap.
Strings.Value: A wild barbarian is no threat to me. You're just as likely to drive off the road than finish a lap.

Strings.Original: Victory is the only option. Either do your best or don't waste my time.
Strings.Value: Victory is the only option. Either do your best or don't waste my time.

Strings.Original: That goes for both of us, from what I know about you. I look forward to seeing your skills on display.
Strings.Value: That goes for both of us, from what I know about you. I look forward to seeing your skills on display.

Strings.Original: Maria wanted me to protect everyone from harm. Unfortunately, that includes you. That is your only saving grace.
Strings.Value: Maria wanted me to protect everyone from harm. Unfortunately, that includes you. That is your only saving grace.

Strings.Original: Are you here to compete or not? Do your best, nothing less.
Strings.Value: Are you here to compete or not? Do your best, nothing less.

Strings.Original: I don't need your help. You're just one more minor hurdle between me and victory.
Strings.Value: I don't need your help. You're just one more minor hurdle between me and victory.

Strings.Original: You aren't worth my time. Disappear!
Strings.Value: You aren't worth my time. Disappear!

Strings.Original: I barely know who you are. Don't bore me out there, and I might bother to learn your name.
Strings.Value: I barely know who you are. Don't bore me out there, and I might bother to learn your name.

Strings.Original: Your words are as hollow as your racing record. Step aside!
Strings.Value: Your words are as hollow as your racing record. Step aside!

Strings.Original: It's a fact, and one I'll teach you as many times as it takes until you learn to respect your superiors.
Strings.Value: It's a fact, and one I'll teach you as many times as it takes until you learn to respect your superiors.

Strings.Original: Hmph. Sonic is no match for me, let alone his cheap replica. Come and see how inferior you truly are!
Strings.Value: Hmph. Sonic is no match for me, let alone his cheap replica. Come and see how inferior you truly are!

Strings.Original: A rare compliment from you. I know your ferocity well. This will make for an interesting competition.
Strings.Value: A rare compliment from you. I know your ferocity well. This will make for an interesting competition.

Strings.Original: I know you're perfectly capable in your own right. I'll give my all against anyone—friend or foe.
Strings.Value: I know you're perfectly capable in your own right. I'll give my all against anyone—friend or foe.

Strings.Original: I've put that part of my history behind me. I live for myself. You should do the same.
Strings.Value: I've put that part of my history behind me. I live for myself. You should do the same.

Strings.Original: Do your best, or your worst. It doesn't matter. I'm still the ultimate life form and superior racer.
Strings.Value: Do your best, or your worst. It doesn't matter. I'm still the ultimate life form and superior racer.

Strings.Original: I relish any chance to surpass you. Prepare for a humiliating defeat!
Strings.Value: I relish any chance to surpass you. Prepare for a humiliating defeat!

Strings.Original: You've got the wrong hedgehog. If you've mistaken me for Sonic, you're in for a rude awakening.
Strings.Value: You've got the wrong hedgehog. If you've mistaken me for Sonic, you're in for a rude awakening.

Strings.Original: I have no equal. You will race, and you will lose.
Strings.Value: I have no equal. You will race, and you will lose.

Strings.Original: These new environments are perfect to hone my skills, and you're just one more obstacle.
Strings.Value: These new environments are perfect to hone my skills, and you're just one more obstacle.

Strings.Original: I don't know what you're talking about, nor do I care. Either race or get out of the way.
Strings.Value: I don't know what you're talking about, nor do I care. Either race or get out of the way.

Strings.Original: You couldn't even handle Sonic. You're not worth my time.
Strings.Value: You couldn't even handle Sonic. You're not worth my time.

Strings.Original: I have no interest in undisciplined buffoons. Let's make this quick.
Strings.Value: I have no interest in undisciplined buffoons. Let's make this quick.

Strings.Original: Well done. There may be more to you than I realized.
Strings.Value: Well done. There may be more to you than I realized.

Strings.Original: The ultimate prize for the ultimate life form.
Strings.Value: The ultimate prize for the ultimate life form.

Strings.Original: You thought you had a chance?
Strings.Value: You thought you had a chance?

Strings.Original: Feast your eyes on a champion!
Strings.Value: Feast your eyes on a champion!

Strings.Original: I won the happy life of a dream!
Strings.Value: I won the happy life of a dream!

Strings.Original: You're making me work for it!
Strings.Value: You're making me work for it!

Strings.Original: Ooh, look at all the expensive brands!
Strings.Value: Ooh, look at all the expensive brands!

Strings.Original: Think of all the treasure to be found!
Strings.Value: Think of all the treasure to be found!

Strings.Original: Thanks for the royal pain, Blaze!
Strings.Value: Thanks for the royal pain, Blaze!

Strings.Original: You trying to start something, Knuckles?
Strings.Value: You trying to start something, Knuckles?

Strings.Original: Your daddy teach you that, Sage?
Strings.Value: Your daddy teach you that, Sage?

Strings.Original: Already off to a great start.
Strings.Value: Already off to a great start.

Strings.Original: You'll miss me if you look away!
Strings.Value: You'll miss me if you look away!

Strings.Original: Oh well. I got my intel at least.
Strings.Value: Oh well. I got my intel at least.

Strings.Original: That's how a pro does it!
Strings.Value: That's how a pro does it!

Strings.Original: I thought you were tougher, Knuckles!
Strings.Value: I thought you were tougher, Knuckles!

Strings.Original: I thought you were faster, Metal?
Strings.Value: I thought you were faster, Metal?

Strings.Original: The name's Rouge. Anything more is... classified. Heehee!
Strings.Value: The name's Rouge. Anything more is... classified. Heehee!

Strings.Original: Are you just toying with me!?
Strings.Value: Are you just toying with me!?

Strings.Original: Come on, Rouge! Get your head in the game!
Strings.Value: Come on, Rouge! Get your head in the game!

Strings.Original: Well, it's been fun, but it's time to put this to bed!
Strings.Value: Well, it's been fun, but it's time to put this to bed!

Strings.Original: You really going to stand me up?
Strings.Value: You really going to stand me up?

Strings.Original: I could be doing other things, y'know.
Strings.Value: I could be doing other things, y'know.

Strings.Original: I'm done playing with you. Ta!
Strings.Value: I'm done playing with you. Ta!

Strings.Original: You win some, you lose some.
Strings.Value: You win some, you lose some.

Strings.Original: Now that's my level of excellence!
Strings.Value: Now that's my level of excellence!

Strings.Original: All that hard work's paying off!
Strings.Value: All that hard work's paying off!

Strings.Original: Mm, not bad. It's a start.
Strings.Value: Mm, not bad. It's a start.

Strings.Original: You've really impressed me. Now we can do anything!
Strings.Value: You've really impressed me. Now we can do anything!

Strings.Original: Good job! Now do it again.
Strings.Value: Good job! Now do it again.

Strings.Original: You look so confident! Not at all nervous with everyone evaluating your every move on the track!
Strings.Value: You look so confident! Not at all nervous with everyone evaluating your every move on the track!

Strings.Original: I'm curious, how is it you keep showing up in the most improbable places?
Strings.Value: I'm curious, how is it you keep showing up in the most improbable places?

Strings.Original: Well, hello! Why don't you get King Dodon Pa to host a Grand Prix on your world and invite us all over?
Strings.Value: Well, hello! Why don't you get King Dodon Pa to host a Grand Prix on your world and invite us all over?

Strings.Original: Didn't anyone tell you? Your super special mission is to let me win the race!
Strings.Value: Didn't anyone tell you? Your super special mission is to let me win the race!

Strings.Original: Are you sure about this? There's no one to bail you out when things get tough.
Strings.Value: Are you sure about this? There's no one to bail you out when things get tough.

Strings.Original: Doing tests for Dodon Pa's data gathering? Becoming a father really mellowed you out!
Strings.Value: Doing tests for Dodon Pa's data gathering? Becoming a father really mellowed you out!

Strings.Original: The doctor must really be desperate if he's padding out the roster with low-grade fodder like you! Ha!
Strings.Value: The doctor must really be desperate if he's padding out the roster with low-grade fodder like you! Ha!

Strings.Original: Why is an "elite" ninja driving for some interplanetary mogul? Seems like a step down to me.
Strings.Value: Why is an "elite" ninja driving for some interplanetary mogul? Seems like a step down to me.

Strings.Original: The Legendary Blowhard himself! Here to record how badly you'll lose to Sonic?
Strings.Value: The Legendary Blowhard himself! Here to record how badly you'll lose to Sonic?

Strings.Original: Ugh, must you be my opponent? Can't I have someone with a little finesse? All a brute like you knows is one speed.
Strings.Value: Ugh, must you be my opponent? Can't I have someone with a little finesse? All a brute like you knows is one speed.

Strings.Original: It must be driving you crazy to have to, well, drive. Or are you still just copying Sonic?
Strings.Value: It must be driving you crazy to have to, well, drive. Or are you still just copying Sonic?

Strings.Original: Hey now! Haven't we been through thick and thin together? Cut me a little slack out there!
Strings.Value: Hey now! Haven't we been through thick and thin together? Cut me a little slack out there!

Strings.Original: So, the doctor's daughter. Are you a daddy's girl? Or can we work out a deal?
Strings.Value: So, the doctor's daughter. Are you a daddy's girl? Or can we work out a deal?

Strings.Original: Oh, dear me. How is this fair? Think you could give yourself a handicap for old times' sake?
Strings.Value: Oh, dear me. How is this fair? Think you could give yourself a handicap for old times' sake?

Strings.Original: All that power, and you're too honorable to do anything fun with it? So disappointing.
Strings.Value: All that power, and you're too honorable to do anything fun with it? So disappointing.

Strings.Original: Don't get distracted, handsome. We're here to race, so keep your eyes on the road.
Strings.Value: Don't get distracted, handsome. We're here to race, so keep your eyes on the road.

Strings.Original: I heard Knuckles making fun of you. Why don't you give him a piece of your mind?
Strings.Value: I heard Knuckles making fun of you. Why don't you give him a piece of your mind?

Strings.Original: Look at you, acting so confident. You better win, because anything less would be humiliating.
Strings.Value: Look at you, acting so confident. You better win, because anything less would be humiliating.

Strings.Original: Goodness! Things must be dire for your agency if you have to do delivery driving too. Did you bring me my order?
Strings.Value: Goodness! Things must be dire for your agency if you have to do delivery driving too. Did you bring me my order?

Strings.Original: I have to commend your composure! If I threw away my career playing mechanic with those two brutes, I'd go crazy!
Strings.Value: I have to commend your composure! If I threw away my career playing mechanic with those two brutes, I'd go crazy!

Strings.Original: I assume these rides are Zeti-proof, but Zavok's dangerous. I'll have to be careful!
Strings.Value: I assume these rides are Zeti-proof, but Zavok's dangerous. I'll have to be careful!

Strings.Original: I hear you've got quite the temper. Don't get lost in road rage and drive off the road, you dimwitted brute!
Strings.Value: I hear you've got quite the temper. Don't get lost in road rage and drive off the road, you dimwitted brute!

Strings.Original: Aw, sweetie, I'll be ahead of you the whole time, so there will be no need to look back.
Strings.Value: Aw, sweetie, I'll be ahead of you the whole time, so there will be no need to look back.

Strings.Original: Luring me with the promise of treasure? You are a master fisherman!
Strings.Value: Luring me with the promise of treasure? You are a master fisherman!

Strings.Original: Aw, you can relax for now. The only thing I'm out to snatch away from you is victory.
Strings.Value: Aw, you can relax for now. The only thing I'm out to snatch away from you is victory.

Strings.Original: Tell you what. You manage to beat me, and I'll tell you everything. Hee-hee, safest bet I've ever made.
Strings.Value: Tell you what. You manage to beat me, and I'll tell you everything. Hee-hee, safest bet I've ever made.

Strings.Original: Aw, sweetie, where would the surprise be if I told you in advance? Just focus on the race.
Strings.Value: Aw, sweetie, where would the surprise be if I told you in advance? Just focus on the race.

Strings.Original: Sometimes a race is just a race. Besides, it'd spoil any surprise if I told you up front, wouldn't it?
Strings.Value: Sometimes a race is just a race. Besides, it'd spoil any surprise if I told you up front, wouldn't it?

Strings.Original: This better not be a repeat of that E-10000B nonsense. Metal Sonic? Is that you in there again?
Strings.Value: This better not be a repeat of that E-10000B nonsense. Metal Sonic? Is that you in there again?

Strings.Original: Haha! It's not "stealing" when I'm just better than you!
Strings.Value: Haha! It's not "stealing" when I'm just better than you!

Strings.Original: Aw, looks like you aren't as fast as you say you are. A pity. Looks like I'll be winning the race today too!
Strings.Value: Aw, looks like you aren't as fast as you say you are. A pity. Looks like I'll be winning the race today too!

Strings.Original: There's more to life than that glittering, gorgeous, priceless... What were you saying?
Strings.Value: There's more to life than that glittering, gorgeous, priceless... What were you saying?

Strings.Original: Aw, does the robot with the built-in inferiority complex have something to prove? You won't get any sympathy from me!
Strings.Value: Aw, does the robot with the built-in inferiority complex have something to prove? You won't get any sympathy from me!

Strings.Original: Hey! Just because we're on good terms doesn't mean I'll go easy on you!
Strings.Value: Hey! Just because we're on good terms doesn't mean I'll go easy on you!

Strings.Original: Why limit myself like that? If you're worried about unpredictability, you can count on this: I'm going to win!
Strings.Value: Why limit myself like that? If you're worried about unpredictability, you can count on this: I'm going to win!

Strings.Original: Oh, don't be like that! You know you can trust me to run a fair race with you... this time.
Strings.Value: Oh, don't be like that! You know you can trust me to run a fair race with you... this time.

Strings.Original: You can't handle my moves, little man. Even so, I guess I'll just have to win this the old-fashioned way.
Strings.Value: You can't handle my moves, little man. Even so, I guess I'll just have to win this the old-fashioned way.

Strings.Original: Any fool can press on the accelerator. A true champion has finesse.
Strings.Value: Any fool can press on the accelerator. A true champion has finesse.

Strings.Original: Hah, all you're good for is breaking things, while I don't even break a sweat.
Strings.Value: Hah, all you're good for is breaking things, while I don't even break a sweat.

Strings.Original: Do you think I'd tell you if I was plotting something? Just keep your eyes on the road and try to keep up.
Strings.Value: Do you think I'd tell you if I was plotting something? Just keep your eyes on the road and try to keep up.

Strings.Original: I can't help it if I can do the work of you three stooges combined.
Strings.Value: I can't help it if I can do the work of you three stooges combined.

Strings.Original: Maybe rely a little less on your tech and more on technique.
Strings.Value: Maybe rely a little less on your tech and more on technique.

Strings.Original: You talk a big game, but I'll be surprised if you actually measure up. You're on, gruesome.
Strings.Value: You talk a big game, but I'll be surprised if you actually measure up. You're on, gruesome.

Strings.Original: If your driving is as bad as your grammar, this is gonna be a walk in the park.
Strings.Value: If your driving is as bad as your grammar, this is gonna be a walk in the park.

Strings.Original: Ready to lose for my amusement?
Strings.Value: Ready to lose for my amusement?

Strings.Original: Well, well! Looks like you measure up after all.
Strings.Value: Well, well! Looks like you measure up after all.

Strings.Original: Fine. Whatever. I wasn't even trying.
Strings.Value: Fine. Whatever. I wasn't even trying.

Strings.Original: Now this is how you treat a lady!
Strings.Value: Now this is how you treat a lady!

Strings.Original: This will go nicely with the collection.
Strings.Value: This will go nicely with the collection.

Strings.Original: You're not rid of me yet!
Strings.Value: You're not rid of me yet!

Strings.Original: Now you see what I can really do!
Strings.Value: Now you see what I can really do!

Strings.Original: Nothing can get in my way!
Strings.Value: Nothing can get in my way!

Strings.Original: Don't make this too easy for me!
Strings.Value: Don't make this too easy for me!

Strings.Original: Let's see what everyone can do!
Strings.Value: Let's see what everyone can do!

Strings.Original: Time to reach a new level!
Strings.Value: Time to reach a new level!

Strings.Original:
This city of water... Why does it make my
heart ache?
Strings.Value:
This city of water... Why does it make my
heart ache?

Strings.Original: So much history to explore! I'll be back!
Strings.Value: So much history to explore! I'll be back!

Strings.Original: I've been here with Blaze before!
Strings.Value: I've been here with Blaze before!

Strings.Original: Don't start what I'll finish, Zavok!
Strings.Value: Don't start what I'll finish, Zavok!

Strings.Original: I need to get it together!
Strings.Value: I need to get it together!

Strings.Original: Looks like I'm on a roll!
Strings.Value: Looks like I'm on a roll!

Strings.Original: I'm Silver. I've come to my past to protect your future.
Strings.Value: I'm Silver. I've come to my past to protect your future.

Strings.Original: It's almost over! I have to focus!
Strings.Value: It's almost over! I have to focus!

Strings.Original: Um, hello? Are we going or what?
Strings.Value: Um, hello? Are we going or what?

Strings.Original: You're amazing! We've achieved so much!
Strings.Value: You're amazing! We've achieved so much!

Strings.Original: We're doing it! Keep at it!
Strings.Value: We're doing it! Keep at it!

Strings.Original: I've dreamt of this absolution. You should be proud.
Strings.Value: I've dreamt of this absolution. You should be proud.

Strings.Original: It's going to be a tough race, but I know I can do it with you cheering me on!
Strings.Value: It's going to be a tough race, but I know I can do it with you cheering me on!

Strings.Original: This guy... he's so intensely focused! He's utterly unreadable! He must be a racing master!
Strings.Value: This guy... he's so intensely focused! He's utterly unreadable! He must be a racing master!

Strings.Original: I can always count on you to be in step with me, but now it's time to see how we fare head-to-head! Show me what you've got!
Strings.Value: I can always count on you to be in step with me, but now it's time to see how we fare head-to-head! Show me what you've got!

Strings.Original: We aren't remotely the same power level. All I can say is, it's nothing personal.
Strings.Value: We aren't remotely the same power level. All I can say is, it's nothing personal.

Strings.Original: It's going to get pretty hectic out there. Are you sure you're up for this?
Strings.Value: It's going to get pretty hectic out there. Are you sure you're up for this?

Strings.Original: Don't think I'll go easy on you! Your evil won't corrupt this competition! I'll stop you here and now!
Strings.Value: Don't think I'll go easy on you! Your evil won't corrupt this competition! I'll stop you here and now!

Strings.Original: Another one of Eggman's robots? What is it doing in a vehicle? Oh well, better not take any chances!
Strings.Value: Another one of Eggman's robots? What is it doing in a vehicle? Oh well, better not take any chances!

Strings.Original: Good to see you again, Espio! Please understand, I don't mean to humiliate you by finishing first!
Strings.Value: Good to see you again, Espio! Please understand, I don't mean to humiliate you by finishing first!

Strings.Original: I hear you're Sonic's biggest racing rival. Let's see how you measure up to me!
Strings.Value: I hear you're Sonic's biggest racing rival. Let's see how you measure up to me!

Strings.Original: You're always so focused and dedicated to everything you do. Can you teach me to be more like you?
Strings.Value: You're always so focused and dedicated to everything you do. Can you teach me to be more like you?

Strings.Original: You may be as powerful as the original, but no Sonic is going to beat me today, Metal or otherwise!
Strings.Value: You may be as powerful as the original, but no Sonic is going to beat me today, Metal or otherwise!

Strings.Original: You may be strong, but you can't do anything against my psychokinesis! Be happy this is a friendly race.
Strings.Value: You may be strong, but you can't do anything against my psychokinesis! Be happy this is a friendly race.

Strings.Original: I'm on to you, Rouge! No clever tricks will work on me! I'm ready for your every move!
Strings.Value: I'm on to you, Rouge! No clever tricks will work on me! I'm ready for your every move!

Strings.Original: There is no Eggman Empire in my time. This is your chance to change your ways and become a force for good!
Strings.Value: There is no Eggman Empire in my time. This is your chance to change your ways and become a force for good!

Strings.Original: You may be skilled and powerful, but so am I! I won't let you pass me by so easily!
Strings.Value: You may be skilled and powerful, but so am I! I won't let you pass me by so easily!

Strings.Original: All right, Sonic! It's time to see which one of us is the best!
Strings.Value: All right, Sonic! It's time to see which one of us is the best!

Strings.Original: You look pretty tough, but I'm no slouch myself! You're not going to get past me!
Strings.Value: You look pretty tough, but I'm no slouch myself! You're not going to get past me!

Strings.Original: We both have tremendous skills, and a ways to go until we've mastered them. Let's put each other to the test!
Strings.Value: We both have tremendous skills, and a ways to go until we've mastered them. Let's put each other to the test!

Strings.Original: Sorry, Vector, but no team-ups this time. Just you, me, and a race for victory!
Strings.Value: Sorry, Vector, but no team-ups this time. Just you, me, and a race for victory!

Strings.Original: They say you're a mechanical genius, but how are you at practical application?
Strings.Value: They say you're a mechanical genius, but how are you at practical application?

Strings.Original: The evil of you long-lived Zeti endures even into my time. But no matter the time period, I'll stand against you!
Strings.Value: The evil of you long-lived Zeti endures even into my time. But no matter the time period, I'll stand against you!

Strings.Original: You're wild! Chaotic! You have no business being part of this competition! I'll have my eye on you!
Strings.Value: You're wild! Chaotic! You have no business being part of this competition! I'll have my eye on you!

Strings.Original: We look nothing alike! Why do you keep doing this!?
Strings.Value: We look nothing alike! Why do you keep doing this!?

Strings.Original: I've... never tried! Let's finish this race in a hurry and go fishing!
Strings.Value: I've... never tried! Let's finish this race in a hurry and go fishing!

Strings.Original: You bet! And I don't want you to go easy on me, either! Let's push each other to our limits!
Strings.Value: You bet! And I don't want you to go easy on me, either! Let's push each other to our limits!

Strings.Original:
I'm... sorry? I didn't mean to offend you! I just, oh, we're doing this?
O-Okay, here we go!
Strings.Value:
I'm... sorry? I didn't mean to offend you! I just, oh, we're doing this?
O-Okay, here we go!

Strings.Original: I wouldn't, even if I could. Today's all about showing off our skills, so let's do our best!
Strings.Value: I wouldn't, even if I could. Today's all about showing off our skills, so let's do our best!

Strings.Original: In two hundred years, you'll barely be a bad memory! It's because I stop you here, today!
Strings.Value: In two hundred years, you'll barely be a bad memory! It's because I stop you here, today!

Strings.Original: I'll take on all challengers equally! Expect no mercy from me!
Strings.Value: I'll take on all challengers equally! Expect no mercy from me!

Strings.Original: I'm all about fighting destiny! But if you want a spirited competition, I'll give it my all! Brace yourself!
Strings.Value: I'm all about fighting destiny! But if you want a spirited competition, I'll give it my all! Brace yourself!

Strings.Original: Sorry, but I hadn't heard of you until recently. If you want to write your own legend, we'll start with this race!
Strings.Value: Sorry, but I hadn't heard of you until recently. If you want to write your own legend, we'll start with this race!

Strings.Original: It's not the powers that count, but the determination to use them! I don't need my gifts to beat you! Let's go!
Strings.Value: It's not the powers that count, but the determination to use them! I don't need my gifts to beat you! Let's go!

Strings.Original: You're one of the greatest threats this world has ever known! I won't go easy on you!
Strings.Value: You're one of the greatest threats this world has ever known! I won't go easy on you!

Strings.Original: H-Hey! We're just having a friendly race here! Don't make me do something you're gonna regret!
Strings.Value: H-Hey! We're just having a friendly race here! Don't make me do something you're gonna regret!

Strings.Original: How is being a responsible person disappointing!? You want excitement? Then I won't show you any mercy on the track!
Strings.Value: How is being a responsible person disappointing!? You want excitement? Then I won't show you any mercy on the track!

Strings.Original: Don't use me to encourage that madman! I'll beat you today and prove just how hopeless your cause truly is!
Strings.Value: Don't use me to encourage that madman! I'll beat you today and prove just how hopeless your cause truly is!

Strings.Original: I've seen and endured more than you can imagine. This race is nothing compared to that, and neither are you!
Strings.Value: I've seen and endured more than you can imagine. This race is nothing compared to that, and neither are you!

Strings.Original: Destinies are made to be defied! I won't back down!
Strings.Value: Destinies are made to be defied! I won't back down!

Strings.Original: What are you talking about!? I don't look anything like Sonic or you! Well, maybe a little bit. But that's purely coincidence!
Strings.Value: What are you talking about!? I don't look anything like Sonic or you! Well, maybe a little bit. But that's purely coincidence!

Strings.Original: You may have experience, but I have the will to overcome all obstacles!
Strings.Value: You may have experience, but I have the will to overcome all obstacles!

Strings.Original: That'd be cheating! Even if I did know, I wouldn't tell you. Now queue up at the starting line, and let's have an honest race!
Strings.Value: That'd be cheating! Even if I did know, I wouldn't tell you. Now queue up at the starting line, and let's have an honest race!

Strings.Original: Sorry, that's not my area of expertise. I'm just here to race. Show me what the tech of today can do!
Strings.Value: Sorry, that's not my area of expertise. I'm just here to race. Show me what the tech of today can do!

Strings.Original: I won't let your evil go unanswered! This may be a "friendly race" for everyone else, but I won't hold back against you!
Strings.Value: I won't let your evil go unanswered! This may be a "friendly race" for everyone else, but I won't hold back against you!

Strings.Original: I've battled your kind before, and I'll do it again! You won't stop me from getting first place!
Strings.Value: I've battled your kind before, and I'll do it again! You won't stop me from getting first place!

Strings.Original: Looks like we're evenly matched. Wanna go again?
Strings.Value: Looks like we're evenly matched. Wanna go again?

Strings.Original: You tried your best, but I can't be beat!
Strings.Value: You tried your best, but I can't be beat!

Strings.Original: I say we go this way!
Strings.Value: I say we go this way!

Strings.Original: All it takes is a little effort!
Strings.Value: All it takes is a little effort!

Strings.Original: You should expect nothing less from me!
Strings.Value: You should expect nothing less from me!

Strings.Original: The end is not determined yet!
Strings.Value: The end is not determined yet!

Strings.Original: I will give it my all!
Strings.Value: I will give it my all!

Strings.Original: The heat will not impede me!
Strings.Value: The heat will not impede me!

Strings.Original: Cream and Amy would love this place!
Strings.Value: Cream and Amy would love this place!

Strings.Original: This reminds me of the islands back home!
Strings.Value: This reminds me of the islands back home!

Strings.Original: M-Must we be so high up!?
Strings.Value: M-Must we be so high up!?

Strings.Original: I will not abide this, Eggman!
Strings.Value: I will not abide this, Eggman!

Strings.Original: That won't go unanswered, Metal Sonic!
Strings.Value: That won't go unanswered, Metal Sonic!

Strings.Original: Do you want a firefight, Omega?
Strings.Value: Do you want a firefight, Omega?

Strings.Original: You won the race, but not the series.
Strings.Value: You won the race, but not the series.

Strings.Original: A good start, but there's much more!
Strings.Value: A good start, but there's much more!

Strings.Original: What manner of item is this?
Strings.Value: What manner of item is this?

Strings.Original: I'm sure this will be of assistance.
Strings.Value: I'm sure this will be of assistance.

Strings.Original: A poor showing on my part.
Strings.Value: A poor showing on my part.

Strings.Original: Not how I wanted it to go.
Strings.Value: Not how I wanted it to go.

Strings.Original: You'll land on your feet, Big!
Strings.Value: You'll land on your feet, Big!

Strings.Original: Let that be a lesson, Eggman!
Strings.Value: Let that be a lesson, Eggman!

Strings.Original: I am Blaze, Imperial Princess of the Sol Empire and Guardian of the Sol Emeralds.
Strings.Value: I am Blaze, Imperial Princess of the Sol Empire and Guardian of the Sol Emeralds.

Strings.Original: A fine show, but not enough!
Strings.Value: A fine show, but not enough!

Strings.Original: I can no longer hold back!
Strings.Value: I can no longer hold back!

Strings.Original: You've done well, but it's time for me to end this!
Strings.Value: You've done well, but it's time for me to end this!

Strings.Original: I like your commitment. Keep it up.
Strings.Value: I like your commitment. Keep it up.

Strings.Original: Your dedication is remarkable. You have my respect.
Strings.Value: Your dedication is remarkable. You have my respect.

Strings.Original: This can't be how it ends.
Strings.Value: This can't be how it ends.

Strings.Original: A pleasure as always, Amy. I am eager to see your skill on the track.
Strings.Value: A pleasure as always, Amy. I am eager to see your skill on the track.

Strings.Original: I look forward to a cordial competition, my friend. Nevertheless, know that I will not simply hand you a victory.
Strings.Value: I look forward to a cordial competition, my friend. Nevertheless, know that I will not simply hand you a victory.

Strings.Original: You have quite the energetic disposition. Racing you will be a unique experience.
Strings.Value: You have quite the energetic disposition. Racing you will be a unique experience.

Strings.Original: I'm glad to see you here, Cream. I want to see how far you've come since our last adventure. Are you ready?
Strings.Value: I'm glad to see you here, Cream. I want to see how far you've come since our last adventure. Are you ready?

Strings.Original: I question King Dodon Pa's choice in inviting you here, but I will abide by his rules in his domain.
Strings.Value: I question King Dodon Pa's choice in inviting you here, but I will abide by his rules in his domain.

Strings.Original: One of Dr. Eggman's minions? Why is it competing? I should not lower my guard.
Strings.Value: One of Dr. Eggman's minions? Why is it competing? I should not lower my guard.

Strings.Original: I have heard of your bravery and talent. Perhaps I could recruit you for my royal guard? Let us use this race to evaluate your skills.
Strings.Value: I have heard of your bravery and talent. Perhaps I could recruit you for my royal guard? Let us use this race to evaluate your skills.

Strings.Original: I detest thieves and pirates. If you wish me to maintain decorum, you will race me with dignity. Understood?
Strings.Value: I detest thieves and pirates. If you wish me to maintain decorum, you will race me with dignity. Understood?

Strings.Original: As one guardian to another, do you ever worry about participating in events like this?
Strings.Value: As one guardian to another, do you ever worry about participating in events like this?

Strings.Original: You are an affront to one of my dearest friends. I will not abide you claiming victory!
Strings.Value: You are an affront to one of my dearest friends. I will not abide you claiming victory!

Strings.Original: Your ferocity is well known. Just be sure to keep your rage in check, as I will not tolerate a firefight.
Strings.Value: Your ferocity is well known. Just be sure to keep your rage in check, as I will not tolerate a firefight.

Strings.Original: You will have to forgive me, but I can't help but be on guard around a notorious jewel thief.
Strings.Value: You will have to forgive me, but I can't help but be on guard around a notorious jewel thief.
