Strings.Original: I did not think the doctor was capable of loving anyone. Seeing you gives me hope he might mend his ways.
Strings.Value: I did not think the doctor was capable of loving anyone. Seeing you gives me hope he might mend his ways.

Strings.Original: Knowing you and your reputation, I expect I'm in for quite the fierce competition.
Strings.Value: Knowing you and your reputation, I expect I'm in for quite the fierce competition.

Strings.Original: We're going head-to-head, Silver. Hold nothing back! Show me everything you can do out there.
Strings.Value: We're going head-to-head, Silver. Hold nothing back! Show me everything you can do out there.

Strings.Original: It's been a while since we've had to contend with each other. You always bring out the best in me. Make sure this time is no different!
Strings.Value: It's been a while since we've had to contend with each other. You always bring out the best in me. Make sure this time is no different!

Strings.Original: If I am to race some common lout, then I will demand you conduct yourself civilly for the duration. Understood?
Strings.Value: If I am to race some common lout, then I will demand you conduct yourself civilly for the duration. Understood?

Strings.Original: You've grown up much during the short time I've known you. I look forward to the skills you put on display today.
Strings.Value: You've grown up much during the short time I've known you. I look forward to the skills you put on display today.

Strings.Original: Apologies, Vector, but we won't be racing as a team this time. In fact, I will be your opponent.
Strings.Value: Apologies, Vector, but we won't be racing as a team this time. In fact, I will be your opponent.

Strings.Original: I have no tolerance for banditry. The only way you will "steal" victory from me is metaphorically.
Strings.Value: I have no tolerance for banditry. The only way you will "steal" victory from me is metaphorically.

Strings.Original: I know you. You have menaced my friends repeatedly. For their honor, I will ensure you do not win today.
Strings.Value: I know you. You have menaced my friends repeatedly. For their honor, I will ensure you do not win today.

Strings.Original: I came here looking for spirited competition, not mindless violence. Can you actually provide a civil contest?
Strings.Value: I came here looking for spirited competition, not mindless violence. Can you actually provide a civil contest?

Strings.Original: It'll be an honor to compete with you as well. I owe it to you to give my all, so be ready!
Strings.Value: It'll be an honor to compete with you as well. I owe it to you to give my all, so be ready!

Strings.Original: The empire does enjoy a robust fishing trade, yes. You're welcome to partake anytime.
Strings.Value: The empire does enjoy a robust fishing trade, yes. You're welcome to partake anytime.

Strings.Original: You shouldn't say such things! And it certainly doesn't work like that. Just focus on the race at hand, won't you?
Strings.Value: You shouldn't say such things! And it certainly doesn't work like that. Just focus on the race at hand, won't you?

Strings.Original: Of course, but do keep your eyes on the road. I want us to cross that finish line safely and in one piece.
Strings.Value: Of course, but do keep your eyes on the road. I want us to cross that finish line safely and in one piece.

Strings.Original: I have entrusted them to my finest guards. I am free to savor my victory over you today.
Strings.Value: I have entrusted them to my finest guards. I am free to savor my victory over you today.

Strings.Original: It appears this one means business. Very well! I'll treat you as a serious competitor.
Strings.Value: It appears this one means business. Very well! I'll treat you as a serious competitor.

Strings.Original: Let us focus on the matter at hand. Perform adequately enough, and I might just consider your request.
Strings.Value: Let us focus on the matter at hand. Perform adequately enough, and I might just consider your request.

Strings.Original: You will look but not touch. Otherwise, you will answer to me!
Strings.Value: You will look but not touch. Otherwise, you will answer to me!

Strings.Original: Agreed. I can count on you to be fair and formidable. May the best guardian win!
Strings.Value: Agreed. I can count on you to be fair and formidable. May the best guardian win!

Strings.Original: I have seen what you are capable of if left unchecked. Do not expect any mercy from me!
Strings.Value: I have seen what you are capable of if left unchecked. Do not expect any mercy from me!

Strings.Original: I feel that is a backhanded compliment. I cherish all my friends, and I will teach you to respect them!
Strings.Value: I feel that is a backhanded compliment. I cherish all my friends, and I will teach you to respect them!

Strings.Original: That is just an excuse to get closer to stealing the Sol Emeralds. What kind of fool do you take me for?
Strings.Value: That is just an excuse to get closer to stealing the Sol Emeralds. What kind of fool do you take me for?

Strings.Original: I brought peace to my world and I'm enjoying some time away. Or do you wish me to unleash my full fury against you and the doctor?
Strings.Value: I brought peace to my world and I'm enjoying some time away. Or do you wish me to unleash my full fury against you and the doctor?

Strings.Original: I've heard similar of you. Let's keep this civil, and know I will meet undue aggression in equal measure.
Strings.Value: I've heard similar of you. Let's keep this civil, and know I will meet undue aggression in equal measure.

Strings.Original: The pleasure is mine. Don't you dare go easy on me! I want this to be a race to remember!
Strings.Value: The pleasure is mine. Don't you dare go easy on me! I want this to be a race to remember!

Strings.Original: It will be my pleasure to push you to your limits. And surpass them.
Strings.Value: It will be my pleasure to push you to your limits. And surpass them.

Strings.Original: It makes you the race's winner, that's all. I have no fear of having to abdicate or see you ahead of me.
Strings.Value: It makes you the race's winner, that's all. I have no fear of having to abdicate or see you ahead of me.

Strings.Original: I take all challenges seriously—and all challengers. Don't let your perceived advantage blind you to your competition.
Strings.Value: I take all challenges seriously—and all challengers. Don't let your perceived advantage blind you to your competition.

Strings.Original: You were a valued teammate then, but I'm afraid there are no alliances here. Give it your all! I won't be holding back.
Strings.Value: You were a valued teammate then, but I'm afraid there are no alliances here. Give it your all! I won't be holding back.

Strings.Original: I am an active protector of my empire, and more than a match for some loudmouth bully.
Strings.Value: I am an active protector of my empire, and more than a match for some loudmouth bully.

Strings.Original: Mine are a costly burden, while yours are merely guttural expulsions. We are not remotely the same.
Strings.Value: Mine are a costly burden, while yours are merely guttural expulsions. We are not remotely the same.

Strings.Original: Your mindless anarchy will not shake my resolve, nor stir the hearts of any people. My victory today is assured!
Strings.Value: Your mindless anarchy will not shake my resolve, nor stir the hearts of any people. My victory today is assured!

Strings.Original: Let us see who truly has what it takes!
Strings.Value: Let us see who truly has what it takes!

Strings.Original: We're evenly matched. Care to go again?
Strings.Value: We're evenly matched. Care to go again?

Strings.Original: Well done. Let us race again sometime.
Strings.Value: Well done. Let us race again sometime.

Strings.Original: You made a valiant effort, but the day is mine!
Strings.Value: You made a valiant effort, but the day is mine!

Strings.Original: I'm sure you'll like my choice!
Strings.Value: I'm sure you'll like my choice!

Strings.Original: I need no reward, but thank you.
Strings.Value: I need no reward, but thank you.

Strings.Original:
Eggman base discovered.
Logged for eventual destruction.
Strings.Value:
Eggman base discovered.
Logged for eventual destruction.

Strings.Original: Must return to eliminate all Eggman egomania!
Strings.Value: Must return to eliminate all Eggman egomania!

Strings.Original:
Destroy all Eggman construct,
no matter how colorful or joyous!
Strings.Value:
Destroy all Eggman construct,
no matter how colorful or joyous!

Strings.Original: I am no mere Badnik, Sonic!
Strings.Value: I am no mere Badnik, Sonic!

Strings.Original: Has one of my systems broken down?
Strings.Value: Has one of my systems broken down?

Strings.Original: I couldn't miss if I tried.
Strings.Value: I couldn't miss if I tried.

Strings.Original: You are in my way, Sage.
Strings.Value: You are in my way, Sage.

Strings.Original: On a scale of one to ten, you are an eleven.
Strings.Value: On a scale of one to ten, you are an eleven.

Strings.Original: Amy Rose. Adventuring philanthropist. Prefers kindness and cooperation. Designation: weak.
Strings.Value: Amy Rose. Adventuring philanthropist. Prefers kindness and cooperation. Designation: weak.

Strings.Original: Big the Cat. Career fisherman. Strength disproportionate to reasonable physical limits. S-Rank level threat.
Strings.Value: Big the Cat. Career fisherman. Strength disproportionate to reasonable physical limits. S-Rank level threat.

Strings.Original: Blaze the Cat. Imperial Princess. Designation: the only one of Sonic's friends that is worth my time.
Strings.Value: Blaze the Cat. Imperial Princess. Designation: the only one of Sonic's friends that is worth my time.

Strings.Original: Charmy Bee. Junior detective in the Chaotix Detective Agency. D-Rank threat. Ignore.
Strings.Value: Charmy Bee. Junior detective in the Chaotix Detective Agency. D-Rank threat. Ignore.

Strings.Original: Cream the Rabbit. Aspiring Chao caretaker. Nonviolent and fluffy. Hostile interaction unwarranted.
Strings.Value: Cream the Rabbit. Aspiring Chao caretaker. Nonviolent and fluffy. Hostile interaction unwarranted.

Strings.Original: I am bound by the parameters of this race to not use lethal ordinance on you. For now.
Strings.Value: I am bound by the parameters of this race to not use lethal ordinance on you. For now.

Strings.Original: Espio the Chameleon. Ninja warrior. Turns invisible. Designation: shrewd, yet trivial.
Strings.Value: Espio the Chameleon. Ninja warrior. Turns invisible. Designation: shrewd, yet trivial.

Strings.Original: Jet the Hawk. Leader of the Babylon Rogues. Navigates extreme speeds with precision. Treat as A-Rank threat.
Strings.Value: Jet the Hawk. Leader of the Babylon Rogues. Navigates extreme speeds with precision. Treat as A-Rank threat.

Strings.Original: Knuckles the Echidna. Guardian of the Master Emerald. Last of the Echidna Civilization warriors. Classification: extinct.
Strings.Value: Knuckles the Echidna. Guardian of the Master Emerald. Last of the Echidna Civilization warriors. Classification: extinct.

Strings.Original: Metal Sonic. Dr. Eggman's premier design. I will surpass you and prove that I am the superior model!
Strings.Value: Metal Sonic. Dr. Eggman's premier design. I will surpass you and prove that I am the superior model!

Strings.Original: Rouge the Bat. International spy and jewel thief. S-Rank threat, but classified as "ally." Lowering threat level to B-Rank.
Strings.Value: Rouge the Bat. International spy and jewel thief. S-Rank threat, but classified as "ally." Lowering threat level to B-Rank.

Strings.Original: Sage. Dr. Eggman's artificial intelligence program. Your holographic form is superfluous. You are not a threat.
Strings.Value: Sage. Dr. Eggman's artificial intelligence program. Your holographic form is superfluous. You are not a threat.

Strings.Original: Shadow the Hedgehog. Bioengineered to be the "ultimate life form." My only worthy opponent here.
Strings.Value: Shadow the Hedgehog. Bioengineered to be the "ultimate life form." My only worthy opponent here.

Strings.Original: Silver the Hedgehog. Time-traveling psychokinetic. Suppress with extra ordinance and aggression.
Strings.Value: Silver the Hedgehog. Time-traveling psychokinetic. Suppress with extra ordinance and aggression.

Strings.Original: Sonic the Hedgehog. Fastest thing alive, after Shadow. Best Chaos Control user, after Shadow.
Strings.Value: Sonic the Hedgehog. Fastest thing alive, after Shadow. Best Chaos Control user, after Shadow.

Strings.Original: Storm the Albatross. Enforcer for the Babylon Rogues. High levels of strength. I will overpower you and prove I am the strongest!
Strings.Value: Storm the Albatross. Enforcer for the Babylon Rogues. High levels of strength. I will overpower you and prove I am the strongest!

Strings.Original: Miles "Tails" Prower. Proficient in engineering, flight, and combat. Treat as an A-Rank level threat.
Strings.Value: Miles "Tails" Prower. Proficient in engineering, flight, and combat. Treat as an A-Rank level threat.

Strings.Original: Vector the Crocodile. Lead detective of the Chaotix Detective Agency. Unable to pay his bills, find a clue, or a date.
Strings.Value: Vector the Crocodile. Lead detective of the Chaotix Detective Agency. Unable to pay his bills, find a clue, or a date.

Strings.Original: Wave the Swallow. Mechanic for the Babylon Rogues. Assessment: target when grounded.
Strings.Value: Wave the Swallow. Mechanic for the Babylon Rogues. Assessment: target when grounded.

Strings.Original: Zavok. Warlord leader of the Deadly Six. Eliminate at first available opportunity.
Strings.Value: Zavok. Warlord leader of the Deadly Six. Eliminate at first available opportunity.

Strings.Original: Zazz. Berserker of the Deadly Six. Intelligence, skill and charisma rank: low. Designation: pathetic.
Strings.Value: Zazz. Berserker of the Deadly Six. Intelligence, skill and charisma rank: low. Designation: pathetic.

Strings.Original: I will prove to be the superior robot in all forms of competition. Cry about it on your own time.
Strings.Value: I will prove to be the superior robot in all forms of competition. Cry about it on your own time.

Strings.Original: Primary objective: win race. Secondary objective: go fishing. With a vengeance!
Strings.Value: Primary objective: win race. Secondary objective: go fishing. With a vengeance!

Strings.Original: I do not answer to you. I answer to no one! Registering this exchange as "hostile."
Strings.Value: I do not answer to you. I answer to no one! Registering this exchange as "hostile."

Strings.Original: Error. No comparative data available. We will race to see who is truly the strongest!
Strings.Value: Error. No comparative data available. We will race to see who is truly the strongest!

Strings.Original: I enjoy any opportunity to prove my superior might. Warning: stay out of my way. I have no desire to run you over.
Strings.Value: I enjoy any opportunity to prove my superior might. Warning: stay out of my way. I have no desire to run you over.

Strings.Original: Only if the burial site is your "metaphorical" head!
Strings.Value: Only if the burial site is your "metaphorical" head!

Strings.Original: Worthless assembly line fodder! I will obliterate you!
Strings.Value: Worthless assembly line fodder! I will obliterate you!

Strings.Original: Strength builds beat dexterity builds every time. Go cry about it.
Strings.Value: Strength builds beat dexterity builds every time. Go cry about it.

Strings.Original: I am THE robot. I have no equal. A demonstration is in order.
Strings.Value: I am THE robot. I have no equal. A demonstration is in order.

Strings.Original: The form of competition is irrelevant. I will be the victor every time!
Strings.Value: The form of competition is irrelevant. I will be the victor every time!

Strings.Original: I spared you once! I will not repeat the same mistake!
Strings.Value: I spared you once! I will not repeat the same mistake!

Strings.Original: Negative. Race parameters do not permit alliances. Mercy is tantamount to friendliness.
Strings.Value: Negative. Race parameters do not permit alliances. Mercy is tantamount to friendliness.

Strings.Original: It does not matter what fancy operating system Eggman uses in his machines. I will crush them all the same!
Strings.Value: It does not matter what fancy operating system Eggman uses in his machines. I will crush them all the same!

Strings.Original: The same can be said to you on both counts. Expect no mercy from me.
Strings.Value: The same can be said to you on both counts. Expect no mercy from me.

Strings.Original: Analysis: destroying you poses a nominal risk of creating a time paradox. I will be merciful to you. Today.
Strings.Value: Analysis: destroying you poses a nominal risk of creating a time paradox. I will be merciful to you. Today.

Strings.Original: Irrelevant. I will win and then inform your next of kin.
Strings.Value: Irrelevant. I will win and then inform your next of kin.

Strings.Original: Open hostilities detected. Preparing excessively disproportionate countermeasures.
Strings.Value: Open hostilities detected. Preparing excessively disproportionate countermeasures.

Strings.Original: Past maintenance is irrelevant. I will always be victorious!
Strings.Value: Past maintenance is irrelevant. I will always be victorious!

Strings.Original: Your inferior organic structure cannot withstand my relentless assault. Preloading taxidermy protocols.
Strings.Value: Your inferior organic structure cannot withstand my relentless assault. Preloading taxidermy protocols.

Strings.Original: Target is assessing me with ill intentions. Identifying as a threat!
Strings.Value: Target is assessing me with ill intentions. Identifying as a threat!

Strings.Original: Eggman is my target! No one else! I will destroy you to maintain my claim!
Strings.Value: Eggman is my target! No one else! I will destroy you to maintain my claim!

Strings.Original: Threat acknowledged. Preparing countermeasures. Increasing to an inordinately indulgent degree.
Strings.Value: Threat acknowledged. Preparing countermeasures. Increasing to an inordinately indulgent degree.

Strings.Original: Ambivalent results will not be tolerated!
Strings.Value: Ambivalent results will not be tolerated!

Strings.Original: Yeah! Now where's that first place prize?
Strings.Value: Yeah! Now where's that first place prize?

Strings.Original: Time to bring home the gold!
Strings.Value: Time to bring home the gold!

Strings.Original: C'mon! At least make me work for it!
Strings.Value: C'mon! At least make me work for it!

Strings.Original: One of our biggest cases started here!
Strings.Value: One of our biggest cases started here!

Strings.Original: A haunted house! Split up, gang, and look for clues!
Strings.Value: A haunted house! Split up, gang, and look for clues!

Strings.Original: Charmy doesn't need access to this much sugar!
Strings.Value: Charmy doesn't need access to this much sugar!

Strings.Original: I got a reputation to maintain!
Strings.Value: I got a reputation to maintain!

Strings.Original: Why you gotta be like that, Omega?
Strings.Value: Why you gotta be like that, Omega?

Strings.Original: Don't leap to conclusions. We aren't finished!
Strings.Value: Don't leap to conclusions. We aren't finished!

Strings.Original: Hey! We got something to use!
Strings.Value: Hey! We got something to use!

Strings.Original: Hey! How much is this worth?
Strings.Value: Hey! How much is this worth?

Strings.Original: That's why you leave it to the pros!
Strings.Value: That's why you leave it to the pros!

Strings.Original: All part of bein' a good detective!
Strings.Value: All part of bein' a good detective!

Strings.Original: Just part of the race, Blaze!
Strings.Value: Just part of the race, Blaze!

Strings.Original: Keepin' you on your toes, Espio!
Strings.Value: Keepin' you on your toes, Espio!

Strings.Original: I thought you were fast, Jet!
Strings.Value: I thought you were fast, Jet!

Strings.Original: Stick to the kiddie lane, Sage!
Strings.Value: Stick to the kiddie lane, Sage!

Strings.Original: I thought you were tough, Storm!
Strings.Value: I thought you were tough, Storm!

Strings.Original: I thought you were smooth, Wave!
Strings.Value: I thought you were smooth, Wave!

Strings.Original: That had your name on it, Zazz!
Strings.Value: That had your name on it, Zazz!

Strings.Original: I'm Vector, lead detective of the Chaotix Detective Agency!
Strings.Value: I'm Vector, lead detective of the Chaotix Detective Agency!

Strings.Original: Time to wrap this up and claim my first place prize!
Strings.Value: Time to wrap this up and claim my first place prize!

Strings.Original: We got a missin' persons case here?
Strings.Value: We got a missin' persons case here?

Strings.Original: We can get started any day now.
Strings.Value: We can get started any day now.

Strings.Original: You're on a whole other level!
Strings.Value: You're on a whole other level!

Strings.Original: Perfect! The work of a professional!
Strings.Value: Perfect! The work of a professional!

Strings.Original: A solid start. Let's keep at it!
Strings.Value: A solid start. Let's keep at it!

Strings.Original: You're the cream of the crop! You, uh, lookin' for work?
Strings.Value: You're the cream of the crop! You, uh, lookin' for work?

Strings.Original: A sign of more good things to come.
Strings.Value: A sign of more good things to come.

Strings.Original: Can't this thing go any faster!?
Strings.Value: Can't this thing go any faster!?

Strings.Original: I can't believe it! What happened!?
Strings.Value: I can't believe it! What happened!?

Strings.Original: Amy! Where's that "Team Rose" spirit? Y'know, from back at the World Grand Prix?
Strings.Value: Amy! Where's that "Team Rose" spirit? Y'know, from back at the World Grand Prix?

Strings.Original: Oh! I'm up against you? Whatta relief! How about we make a gentleman's agreement to go easy on each other out there, huh?
Strings.Value: Oh! I'm up against you? Whatta relief! How about we make a gentleman's agreement to go easy on each other out there, huh?

Strings.Original: Blaze! Where's that "Team Blaze" spirit? Y'know, from the last time King Dodon Pa had us all together?
Strings.Value: Blaze! Where's that "Team Blaze" spirit? Y'know, from the last time King Dodon Pa had us all together?

Strings.Original: Charmy! This is a direct order from your senior detective! You have to let me win! We can order whatever takeout you want after.
Strings.Value: Charmy! This is a direct order from your senior detective! You have to let me win! We can order whatever takeout you want after.

Strings.Original:
Help me out here, kid. Would Vanilla want me to let you win, or
would she find it more enriching if I gave you a little challenge?
Gimme a lead here!
Strings.Value:
Help me out here, kid. Would Vanilla want me to let you win, or
would she find it more enriching if I gave you a little challenge?
Gimme a lead here!

Strings.Original: Y'know, you still haven't paid me for that job you tricked me into a while back. Pay up!
Strings.Value: Y'know, you still haven't paid me for that job you tricked me into a while back. Pay up!

Strings.Original: No way Eggman brought some run-of-the-mill Egg Pawn into the mix. I gotta keep my eye on this thing and watch its every move!
Strings.Value: No way Eggman brought some run-of-the-mill Egg Pawn into the mix. I gotta keep my eye on this thing and watch its every move!

Strings.Original: Espio! It's time for the Chaotix to shine! If we work together, we can limit the competition and split the prize and glory!
Strings.Value: Espio! It's time for the Chaotix to shine! If we work together, we can limit the competition and split the prize and glory!

Strings.Original: You again! Look, I don't have time to stop you from whatever heist you're plotting, so knock it off!
Strings.Value: You again! Look, I don't have time to stop you from whatever heist you're plotting, so knock it off!

Strings.Original: We just keep running into each other, don't we, Knux? Whattaya say? Go easy on your pal for old time's sake?
Strings.Value: We just keep running into each other, don't we, Knux? Whattaya say? Go easy on your pal for old time's sake?

Strings.Original: You got a lotta nerve showin' up here! Don't try anything funny, or me and the boys will take care of you like before!
Strings.Value: You got a lotta nerve showin' up here! Don't try anything funny, or me and the boys will take care of you like before!

Strings.Original: You're a tough customer, but I'm pretty tough myself! Let's see how you handle me!
Strings.Value: You're a tough customer, but I'm pretty tough myself! Let's see how you handle me!

Strings.Original: Hey! What's the big idea of outbidding us on that government contract!? That would've been a sweet gig for the agency!
Strings.Value: Hey! What's the big idea of outbidding us on that government contract!? That would've been a sweet gig for the agency!

Strings.Original: So, Eggman had a kid, huh? I can't believe I'm askin' this but, would you want to have a playdate with Charmy?
Strings.Value: So, Eggman had a kid, huh? I can't believe I'm askin' this but, would you want to have a playdate with Charmy?

Strings.Original: You're always focused on your personal mission. What convinced you to come all the way out here and compete?
Strings.Value: You're always focused on your personal mission. What convinced you to come all the way out here and compete?

Strings.Original: You're from the future, right? You, uh, wanna help me place a couple bets? What's the over-under on all this?
Strings.Value: You're from the future, right? You, uh, wanna help me place a couple bets? What's the over-under on all this?

Strings.Original: I'm up against you!? How is this even fair? How am I supposed to race the "fastest thing alive"!?
Strings.Value: I'm up against you!? How is this even fair? How am I supposed to race the "fastest thing alive"!?

Strings.Original: Alright, ya big palooka! I don't want no funny stuff on the track. If you start something, I'm gonna finish it!
Strings.Value: Alright, ya big palooka! I don't want no funny stuff on the track. If you start something, I'm gonna finish it!

Strings.Original: All right, boy genius! Pop the hood. I'm gonna investigate and make sure you didn't modify your ride!
Strings.Value: All right, boy genius! Pop the hood. I'm gonna investigate and make sure you didn't modify your ride!

Strings.Original: How do I know you haven't illegally modded your ride to get an unfair advantage?
Strings.Value: How do I know you haven't illegally modded your ride to get an unfair advantage?

Strings.Original: I hear you're both the brains and the brawn of the Deadly Six. You're basically the evil version of me! I'm gonna look forward to taking you down a peg.
Strings.Value: I hear you're both the brains and the brawn of the Deadly Six. You're basically the evil version of me! I'm gonna look forward to taking you down a peg.

Strings.Original: I handle violent punks like you all the time. You stick to your lane and we won't have any trouble, got it?
Strings.Value: I handle violent punks like you all the time. You stick to your lane and we won't have any trouble, got it?

Strings.Original: Racing with you was fun, but I've got my own team to lead. Time to show 'em what their lead detective can do!
Strings.Value: Racing with you was fun, but I've got my own team to lead. Time to show 'em what their lead detective can do!

Strings.Original: And what? Pay us in fish? Although, free dinner for a week wouldn't be bad.
Strings.Value: And what? Pay us in fish? Although, free dinner for a week wouldn't be bad.

Strings.Original: Ha! N-No problem! I look forward to your overwhelming power pushing me to my limit! Hoo boy.
Strings.Value: Ha! N-No problem! I look forward to your overwhelming power pushing me to my limit! Hoo boy.

Strings.Original: What!? I didn't agree to this! Th-that's not legally binding! Get back here!
Strings.Value: What!? I didn't agree to this! Th-that's not legally binding! Get back here!

Strings.Original: Wait a minute, did you just—? You can't pull that on me! Aw man, what am I supposed to do now!?
Strings.Value: Wait a minute, did you just—? You can't pull that on me! Aw man, what am I supposed to do now!?

Strings.Original: We're always on the trail of the bad guys, and you're as bad as they come. I'll be hot on your heels all the way to the finish line!
Strings.Value: We're always on the trail of the bad guys, and you're as bad as they come. I'll be hot on your heels all the way to the finish line!

Strings.Original: Aww, Eggman can't be serious with this, can he? Oh well, might as well take care of it.
Strings.Value: Aww, Eggman can't be serious with this, can he? Oh well, might as well take care of it.

Strings.Original: Oh, for pity's sake, it's a race! Dodon Pa just wants research data! Think of it this way: we're helping him with an investigation!
Strings.Value: Oh, for pity's sake, it's a race! Dodon Pa just wants research data! Think of it this way: we're helping him with an investigation!

Strings.Original: What's with the guilty conscience? If you've got nothing to hide, then lay it all out on the track!
Strings.Value: What's with the guilty conscience? If you've got nothing to hide, then lay it all out on the track!

Strings.Original: I know you inside and out, Knux! You're no pushover, but neither am I! Get ready to feel the bitter sting of defeat!
Strings.Value: I know you inside and out, Knux! You're no pushover, but neither am I! Get ready to feel the bitter sting of defeat!

Strings.Original: Man, how many times do me and the boys have to deal with your nonsense? Just stay your regular size this time!
Strings.Value: Man, how many times do me and the boys have to deal with your nonsense? Just stay your regular size this time!

Strings.Original: All right, you're askin' for it! After I crush you in this race, I'll do all three!
Strings.Value: All right, you're askin' for it! After I crush you in this race, I'll do all three!

Strings.Original: The Chaotix Detective Agency is doing just fine! And I'm here to race! I'll show you how good I am at both!
Strings.Value: The Chaotix Detective Agency is doing just fine! And I'm here to race! I'll show you how good I am at both!

Strings.Original: He tricked us and ducked out on the invoice! Looks like you're just as much a scammer as your old man!
Strings.Value: He tricked us and ducked out on the invoice! Looks like you're just as much a scammer as your old man!

Strings.Original: A good detective thinks two steps ahead of the perp. I know how you're gonna run this race before it even begins!
Strings.Value: A good detective thinks two steps ahead of the perp. I know how you're gonna run this race before it even begins!

Strings.Original: I appreciate the thought, but I'm a versatile guy! Whether I'm on a team or going solo, I'm unstoppable! Bring it on!
Strings.Value: I appreciate the thought, but I'm a versatile guy! Whether I'm on a team or going solo, I'm unstoppable! Bring it on!

Strings.Original: It's all about promotion! And beating you is as big as promo material gets!
Strings.Value: It's all about promotion! And beating you is as big as promo material gets!

Strings.Original: Oh yes, there is! I can win and send you slinkin' back to your boss!
Strings.Value: Oh yes, there is! I can win and send you slinkin' back to your boss!

Strings.Original: The Chaotix Detective Agency is doing fine! Real adults know not to pass up a sponsorship opportunity, that's all!
Strings.Value: The Chaotix Detective Agency is doing fine! Real adults know not to pass up a sponsorship opportunity, that's all!

Strings.Original: The Chaotix Detective Agency always sees a job through, even racing summons. You'll just have to deal with it!
Strings.Value: The Chaotix Detective Agency always sees a job through, even racing summons. You'll just have to deal with it!

Strings.Original: Fancy talk for a run-of-the-mill thug! Once this is over, we'll see who's "pathetic"!
Strings.Value: Fancy talk for a run-of-the-mill thug! Once this is over, we'll see who's "pathetic"!

Strings.Original: This is just a race, you lunatic! But if you're gonna be this big a danger on the road, maybe I should do something about it!
Strings.Value: This is just a race, you lunatic! But if you're gonna be this big a danger on the road, maybe I should do something about it!

Strings.Original: You can always back out. No? Heh, then we'll see this through.
Strings.Value: You can always back out. No? Heh, then we'll see this through.

Strings.Original: Guess we're even, huh? Kinda anticlimactic.
Strings.Value: Guess we're even, huh? Kinda anticlimactic.

Strings.Original: Yeah, well, good job and whatever.
Strings.Value: Yeah, well, good job and whatever.

Strings.Original: There's no beatin' the best of the best!
Strings.Value: There's no beatin' the best of the best!

Strings.Original: Aw, for the love of— Turn around!
Strings.Value: Aw, for the love of— Turn around!

Strings.Original: Think you can keep up through here?
Strings.Value: Think you can keep up through here?

Strings.Original: All right! How much are these worth?
Strings.Value: All right! How much are these worth?

Strings.Original: I humbly accept that I'm the best.
Strings.Value: I humbly accept that I'm the best.

Strings.Original: None can compete with my training.
Strings.Value: None can compete with my training.

Strings.Original: A test of skill and resolve.
Strings.Value: A test of skill and resolve.

Strings.Original: The matter is all but decided.
Strings.Value: The matter is all but decided.

Strings.Original: None will stand in my way!
Strings.Value: None will stand in my way!

Strings.Original: A track to test my limits!
Strings.Value: A track to test my limits!

Strings.Original: I'll find the solution to this maze!
Strings.Value: I'll find the solution to this maze!

Strings.Original: The varied terrain would be excellent for training.
Strings.Value: The varied terrain would be excellent for training.

Strings.Original: One victory means nothing in the long run.
Strings.Value: One victory means nothing in the long run.

Strings.Original: Didn't stand a ghost of a chance.
Strings.Value: Didn't stand a ghost of a chance.

Strings.Original: Good job. Nothing more to be said.
Strings.Value: Good job. Nothing more to be said.

Strings.Original: I am Espio, master ninja of the Chaotix.
Strings.Value: I am Espio, master ninja of the Chaotix.

Strings.Original: I've... lured you into a false sense of security!
Strings.Value: I've... lured you into a false sense of security!

Strings.Original: Now do you understand the scope of my abilities?
Strings.Value: Now do you understand the scope of my abilities?

Strings.Original: My patience is unshakable. Take your time.
Strings.Value: My patience is unshakable. Take your time.

Strings.Original: Patience. This is but the first step.
Strings.Value: Patience. This is but the first step.

Strings.Original: It has been a long journey, and you have done well.
Strings.Value: It has been a long journey, and you have done well.

Strings.Original: A pity we're merely racing. I would like to test my ninja arsenal against your hammer.
Strings.Value: A pity we're merely racing. I would like to test my ninja arsenal against your hammer.

Strings.Original: This fisherman... he's a zen master! I see no way to crack his ironclad resolve or breach his mental fortitude!
Strings.Value: This fisherman... he's a zen master! I see no way to crack his ironclad resolve or breach his mental fortitude!

Strings.Original: It will be an honor to compete against you, Your Highness. Once this is over, perhaps you'll keep the agency in mind if the need arises?
Strings.Value: It will be an honor to compete against you, Your Highness. Once this is over, perhaps you'll keep the agency in mind if the need arises?

Strings.Original: Now is not the time for your childish antics! Our every move is being evaluated. Do your best out there—for the agency!
Strings.Value: Now is not the time for your childish antics! Our every move is being evaluated. Do your best out there—for the agency!

Strings.Original: I promised Vanilla I would help look after you. Stick close and we will traverse this race with ease.
Strings.Value: I promised Vanilla I would help look after you. Stick close and we will traverse this race with ease.

Strings.Original: Hmm. Which will persevere? The doctor's wicked cunning, or my own honed techniques?
Strings.Value: Hmm. Which will persevere? The doctor's wicked cunning, or my own honed techniques?

Strings.Original: A standard issue Egg Pawn? No, it cannot be. There must be a greater threat hidden within. I must be ever vigilant!
Strings.Value: A standard issue Egg Pawn? No, it cannot be. There must be a greater threat hidden within. I must be ever vigilant!

Strings.Original: So you were invited too? I suppose it's better for it. You can't get into any trouble this way.
Strings.Value: So you were invited too? I suppose it's better for it. You can't get into any trouble this way.

Strings.Original: A worthy challenger. I look forward to testing my mettle against yours once more, old friend.
Strings.Value: A worthy challenger. I look forward to testing my mettle against yours once more, old friend.

Strings.Original: Why does Sonic get the cool evil robot clone? Aren't I cool and powerful enough to warrant one? Perhaps if I defeat him, I'll prove myself!
Strings.Value: Why does Sonic get the cool evil robot clone? Aren't I cool and powerful enough to warrant one? Perhaps if I defeat him, I'll prove myself!

Strings.Original: Brute strength cannot overcome all adversity. I will show you the versatility of my perfectly honed techniques!
Strings.Value: Brute strength cannot overcome all adversity. I will show you the versatility of my perfectly honed techniques!

Strings.Original: You've stolen too many contracts from the agency. I will not let you steal victory from me today!
Strings.Value: You've stolen too many contracts from the agency. I will not let you steal victory from me today!

Strings.Original: I do not wish to unleash my full power against a mere child. In the name of my honor and dignity, I will go easy on you.
Strings.Value: I do not wish to unleash my full power against a mere child. In the name of my honor and dignity, I will go easy on you.

Strings.Original: Ah, you will be quite the formidable adversary. It will be an honor to face you on the track.
Strings.Value: Ah, you will be quite the formidable adversary. It will be an honor to face you on the track.

Strings.Original: A pleasure to see you again. Unfortunately, we are fated to be adversaries for the duration of this race.
Strings.Value: A pleasure to see you again. Unfortunately, we are fated to be adversaries for the duration of this race.

Strings.Original: It is a rare instance where we go head-to-head. Do not underestimate my swiftness!
Strings.Value: It is a rare instance where we go head-to-head. Do not underestimate my swiftness!

Strings.Original: You are a fearsome foe, but as the saying goes, "The bigger they are, the harder they fall."
Strings.Value: You are a fearsome foe, but as the saying goes, "The bigger they are, the harder they fall."

Strings.Original: Ah, Sonic's protégé. The young up-and-comer will serve as the perfect warm-up for my victory lap.
Strings.Value: Ah, Sonic's protégé. The young up-and-comer will serve as the perfect warm-up for my victory lap.

Strings.Original: We must put our fire-forged kinship aside and race to our fullest extent. The dignity of the agency rests on our performance today!
Strings.Value: We must put our fire-forged kinship aside and race to our fullest extent. The dignity of the agency rests on our performance today!

Strings.Original: Your limberness and grace are impressive. What school of martial arts do you hail from?
Strings.Value: Your limberness and grace are impressive. What school of martial arts do you hail from?

Strings.Original: I did not anticipate having to face down a monster. Your evil will be of no avail today!
Strings.Value: I did not anticipate having to face down a monster. Your evil will be of no avail today!

Strings.Original: Your berserker wrath will do nothing for you here. I will defeat you as I have before: with disciplined mastery of the self!
Strings.Value: Your berserker wrath will do nothing for you here. I will defeat you as I have before: with disciplined mastery of the self!

Strings.Original:
Oh, um... If you insist.
A line of racers—
two fated to be rivals;
only one can win.
Strings.Value:
Oh, um... If you insist.
A line of racers—
two fated to be rivals;
only one can win.

Strings.Original: A true master can teach any student. Very well! We begin training after this race!
Strings.Value: A true master can teach any student. Very well! We begin training after this race!

Strings.Original:
Apologies, but my loyalty is to the Chaotix Detective Agency. You will have to be content with today's competition.
Unless, um... what's the pay?
Strings.Value:
Apologies, but my loyalty is to the Chaotix Detective Agency. You will have to be content with today's competition.
Unless, um... what's the pay?

Strings.Original: Wait, there was a ranking? Who's number one!? Get back here and answer me!
Strings.Value: Wait, there was a ranking? Who's number one!? Get back here and answer me!

Strings.Original: When... either of us win, correct? Not just you? Her baking is delicious. Dare I risk missing out?
Strings.Value: When... either of us win, correct? Not just you? Her baking is delicious. Dare I risk missing out?

Strings.Original: Timeless techniques will endure any trial! Your evil will never succeed!
Strings.Value: Timeless techniques will endure any trial! Your evil will never succeed!

Strings.Original: Could this be Dodon Pa's way of setting a constant to compare everyone else to? Then I must do my best!
Strings.Value: Could this be Dodon Pa's way of setting a constant to compare everyone else to? Then I must do my best!

Strings.Original: I would be weak indeed if your petty insults were enough to drive me off. Prepare yourself for an unflinching ninja attack!
Strings.Value: I would be weak indeed if your petty insults were enough to drive me off. Prepare yourself for an unflinching ninja attack!

Strings.Original: It will be a thrilling encounter indeed. I look forward to pitting my skills against yours, old friend.
Strings.Value: It will be a thrilling encounter indeed. I look forward to pitting my skills against yours, old friend.

Strings.Original: All the speed and power of Sonic but lacking the joy or soul. I cannot let my guard down for an instant!
Strings.Value: All the speed and power of Sonic but lacking the joy or soul. I cannot let my guard down for an instant!

Strings.Original: What would a brute like you know about the art of ninjutsu? Prepare to be humbled!
Strings.Value: What would a brute like you know about the art of ninjutsu? Prepare to be humbled!

Strings.Original:
I could ask the same of a renowned spy, although I'm sure you'd spin it to sound more flattering for yourself.
No more games of deceit! We race!
Strings.Value:
I could ask the same of a renowned spy, although I'm sure you'd spin it to sound more flattering for yourself.
No more games of deceit! We race!

Strings.Original: A ninja never reveals his secrets. It's just one more reason I will be victorious today!
Strings.Value: A ninja never reveals his secrets. It's just one more reason I will be victorious today!

Strings.Original: Reckless confidence blinds one to the skillful technique. The only victory you've achieved is over yourself.
Strings.Value: Reckless confidence blinds one to the skillful technique. The only victory you've achieved is over yourself.

Strings.Original: A bold assumption. Out of respect for our previous missions, I will be gracious to you in my victory.
Strings.Value: A bold assumption. Out of respect for our previous missions, I will be gracious to you in my victory.

Strings.Original: I am a dedicated, disciplined warrior. You cannot shake my confidence!
Strings.Value: I am a dedicated, disciplined warrior. You cannot shake my confidence!

Strings.Original: I get the picture. But your bold claim rings hollow, as I will be ahead of you the entire way!
Strings.Value: I get the picture. But your bold claim rings hollow, as I will be ahead of you the entire way!

Strings.Original: Of course. That's... self-evident. I wasn't thinking of trying that at all.
Strings.Value: Of course. That's... self-evident. I wasn't thinking of trying that at all.

Strings.Original: You left me babysitting Charmy while you went off on the last racing adventure. I will race! I will win! And I will enjoy every second of it!
Strings.Value: You left me babysitting Charmy while you went off on the last racing adventure. I will race! I will win! And I will enjoy every second of it!

Strings.Original: I don't make a habit of that. Shouting, I mean. Or racing, but I still... Hmph. Let's just race already.
Strings.Value: I don't make a habit of that. Shouting, I mean. Or racing, but I still... Hmph. Let's just race already.

Strings.Original: There's always pride before the fall. Prepare to taste the bitterness of defeat!
Strings.Value: There's always pride before the fall. Prepare to taste the bitterness of defeat!

Strings.Original: He's even more unhinged than the last time we faced off. I'll need to be extra careful when dealing with him this time.
Strings.Value: He's even more unhinged than the last time we faced off. I'll need to be extra careful when dealing with him this time.

Strings.Original: If you wish to try and fail, I will let you still try.
Strings.Value: If you wish to try and fail, I will let you still try.

Strings.Original: You are my match? I didn't think it possible...
Strings.Value: You are my match? I didn't think it possible...

Strings.Original: You have proven yourself. I relent.
Strings.Value: You have proven yourself. I relent.

Strings.Original: Now do you understand? I cannot be defeated!
Strings.Value: Now do you understand? I cannot be defeated!

Strings.Original: I'm a leaf on the wind!
Strings.Value: I'm a leaf on the wind!

Strings.Original: Look at me now! I'm number one!
Strings.Value: Look at me now! I'm number one!

Strings.Original: I'm gonna find some hermit crabs!
Strings.Value: I'm gonna find some hermit crabs!

Strings.Original: Ooh, look at all those sweets! Yum yum yum!
Strings.Value: Ooh, look at all those sweets! Yum yum yum!

Strings.Original: I thought you were nice, Amy!
Strings.Value: I thought you were nice, Amy!

Strings.Original: I thought you were nice, Blaze!
Strings.Value: I thought you were nice, Blaze!

Strings.Original: Just you wait! I'll still win!
Strings.Value: Just you wait! I'll still win!

Strings.Original: Yeah, well, first is the worst!
Strings.Value: Yeah, well, first is the worst!

Strings.Original: Maybe I could've done a little better.
Strings.Value: Maybe I could've done a little better.

Strings.Original: I'm Charmy Bee! Let's be friends!
Strings.Value: I'm Charmy Bee! Let's be friends!

Strings.Original: Cut it out! Let me win!
Strings.Value: Cut it out! Let me win!

Strings.Original: Aren't we supposed to race now?
Strings.Value: Aren't we supposed to race now?

Strings.Original: You're the best! You're the best!
Strings.Value: You're the best! You're the best!

Strings.Original: Watch me, Amy! I'm gonna ZOOM to the finish line! Nyreeee-room!
Strings.Value: Watch me, Amy! I'm gonna ZOOM to the finish line! Nyreeee-room!

Strings.Original: You're too big and slow to race! YEAH! I'm gonna leave you in the dust! Nyah-nyah!
Strings.Value: You're too big and slow to race! YEAH! I'm gonna leave you in the dust! Nyah-nyah!

Strings.Original: Your fire powers are so cool! I wanna try! Set me on fire! SET ME ON FIRE!
Strings.Value: Your fire powers are so cool! I wanna try! Set me on fire! SET ME ON FIRE!

Strings.Original: Yeah! Let's play! You and me! We'll drive around faster than fast! Leave all the grown-ups cryin'! WOO-HOO!
Strings.Value: Yeah! Let's play! You and me! We'll drive around faster than fast! Leave all the grown-ups cryin'! WOO-HOO!

Strings.Original: Look out, you bad man! I'll beat you and save the world! YEAH! Charmy—Hero of the World!
Strings.Value: Look out, you bad man! I'll beat you and save the world! YEAH! Charmy—Hero of the World!

Strings.Original: Look, it's one of Eggman's robots! I'll bust it up! Oh, but first, I gotta win this race! Stay put, robot!
Strings.Value: Look, it's one of Eggman's robots! I'll bust it up! Oh, but first, I gotta win this race! Stay put, robot!

Strings.Original: Watch me! Watch me! I'm gonna win the race and be the coolest Chaotix! You'll get demoted!
Strings.Value: Watch me! Watch me! I'm gonna win the race and be the coolest Chaotix! You'll get demoted!

Strings.Original: Hey! You have goggles! I have goggles! Let's be goggle buddies! RACING GOGGLE BUDDIES FOR THE WIN!
Strings.Value: Hey! You have goggles! I have goggles! Let's be goggle buddies! RACING GOGGLE BUDDIES FOR THE WIN!

Strings.Original: Here we go! I'm gonna win! Nyah-nyah! Get ready to lose!
Strings.Value: Here we go! I'm gonna win! Nyah-nyah! Get ready to lose!

Strings.Original: Not you again! You're always causing trouble for everybody! I'm gonna beat you! YEAH!
Strings.Value: Not you again! You're always causing trouble for everybody! I'm gonna beat you! YEAH!

Strings.Original: You may be the strongest robot, but I'm the strongest bee! You can't top that! Nyah-nyah!
Strings.Value: You may be the strongest robot, but I'm the strongest bee! You can't top that! Nyah-nyah!

Strings.Original: What are you doing here? You spying on us? Gonna steal some secrets? Or are you racing too?
Strings.Value: What are you doing here? You spying on us? Gonna steal some secrets? Or are you racing too?

Strings.Original: Yay! Another kid to play with! FINALLY! Let's still be friends when I beat you in the race, okay?
Strings.Value: Yay! Another kid to play with! FINALLY! Let's still be friends when I beat you in the race, okay?

Strings.Original: Aw, why so grumpy-lookin'? Sad you know I'm gonna win? Hehehehe.
Strings.Value: Aw, why so grumpy-lookin'? Sad you know I'm gonna win? Hehehehe.

Strings.Original: How come you get to fly with just your brain!? I gotta buzz my wings all the time! Oooh, just for that, I'm gonna beat you!
Strings.Value: How come you get to fly with just your brain!? I gotta buzz my wings all the time! Oooh, just for that, I'm gonna beat you!

Strings.Original: You've never raced me before! Look out—I'm gonna blow your socks off and win it all! YEAH!
Strings.Value: You've never raced me before! Look out—I'm gonna blow your socks off and win it all! YEAH!

Strings.Original: You better not come in first! If you beat me, I'll get mad and sting you!
Strings.Value: You better not come in first! If you beat me, I'll get mad and sting you!

Strings.Original: Yeah! Kid Sidekick Showdown Time! I'll beat you and show them I'm ready for the big leagues!
Strings.Value: Yeah! Kid Sidekick Showdown Time! I'll beat you and show them I'm ready for the big leagues!

Strings.Original: Here we go! I'm gonna beat you, and then I get to be lead detective! Woohoo!
Strings.Value: Here we go! I'm gonna beat you, and then I get to be lead detective! Woohoo!

Strings.Original: That's a cool headscarf! I bet it's more comfy than my helmet. I want to try it on! I WANNA TRY IT!
Strings.Value: That's a cool headscarf! I bet it's more comfy than my helmet. I want to try it on! I WANNA TRY IT!

Strings.Original: Don't you try any dirty tricks, mister! I'll pull over and beat you up, you bad guy, you!
Strings.Value: Don't you try any dirty tricks, mister! I'll pull over and beat you up, you bad guy, you!

Strings.Original: I'm not scared of you, ya big meanie! I'm with the Chaotix Detective Agency! We take on bad guys all the time!
Strings.Value: I'm not scared of you, ya big meanie! I'm with the Chaotix Detective Agency! We take on bad guys all the time!

Strings.Original: No way! I'm gonna win this and get all the prizes! There are prizes, right? I WANT PRIZES!
Strings.Value: No way! I'm gonna win this and get all the prizes! There are prizes, right? I WANT PRIZES!

Strings.Original: No way! Fishing is BORING! After winning this race, I wanna race again!
Strings.Value: No way! Fishing is BORING! After winning this race, I wanna race again!

Strings.Original: Yeah! Yeah! Let's tear it up! Vroom! Nyeerow! Whoosh!
Strings.Value: Yeah! Yeah! Let's tear it up! Vroom! Nyeerow! Whoosh!

Strings.Original: No way! I'm in it to win it! Go fast or go home! Buzzwords! Buzzwords! Buzz-buzz!
Strings.Value: No way! I'm in it to win it! Go fast or go home! Buzzwords! Buzzwords! Buzz-buzz!

Strings.Original: I'm not going anywhere except the finish line! And that means ahead of you, ya big bald meanie!
Strings.Value: I'm not going anywhere except the finish line! And that means ahead of you, ya big bald meanie!

Strings.Original: Aw, you're just another robot! I'll bust you up!
Strings.Value: Aw, you're just another robot! I'll bust you up!

Strings.Original: Don't be a killjoy! I'm here to have fun! You're just scared you're gonna lose to me, aren't'cha!?
Strings.Value: Don't be a killjoy! I'm here to have fun! You're just scared you're gonna lose to me, aren't'cha!?

Strings.Original: "Ugh! You're so obnoxious! Just get lost already!" Hah, that's you! That's what you sound like!
Strings.Value: "Ugh! You're so obnoxious! Just get lost already!" Hah, that's you! That's what you sound like!

Strings.Original: Boo! You sound just like Vector! Fiiine, I'll race normally, but I'm still gonna find ways to have fun with it!
Strings.Value: Boo! You sound just like Vector! Fiiine, I'll race normally, but I'm still gonna find ways to have fun with it!

Strings.Original: "Metal Sonic"? More like "Metal Jerk"! I'm gonna show you who's boss and win this!
Strings.Value: "Metal Sonic"? More like "Metal Jerk"! I'm gonna show you who's boss and win this!

Strings.Original: Hey! I'm at least a B-Rank! You take that back! No! I'll make you take that back!
Strings.Value: Hey! I'm at least a B-Rank! You take that back! No! I'll make you take that back!

Strings.Original: Nuh-uh! They said you were full of tricks! I'm supposed to win and make the agency look good! You're gonna eat my dust, lady!
Strings.Value: Nuh-uh! They said you were full of tricks! I'm supposed to win and make the agency look good! You're gonna eat my dust, lady!

Strings.Original: Because I'm awesome! You just can't see it! Guess you're not so smart after all! Nyah-nyah!
Strings.Value: Because I'm awesome! You just can't see it! Guess you're not so smart after all! Nyah-nyah!

Strings.Original: You're the ultimate jerk face! You're gonna be crying so hard after I beat you! I know it!
Strings.Value: You're the ultimate jerk face! You're gonna be crying so hard after I beat you! I know it!

Strings.Original: Oh, I know. But don't worry. I promise to go easy on ya! Hahaha!
Strings.Value: Oh, I know. But don't worry. I promise to go easy on ya! Hahaha!

Strings.Original: Aww! You're no fun! Fine! We'll do it your way, and I'll still win!
Strings.Value: Aww! You're no fun! Fine! We'll do it your way, and I'll still win!

Strings.Original: I handle goons like you all the time! Get ready to feel the sting of defeat! Hee-hee, "sting"!
Strings.Value: I handle goons like you all the time! Get ready to feel the sting of defeat! Hee-hee, "sting"!

Strings.Original: You're not that much older than me! That's double-dipping! No, double standards! I'll show you!
Strings.Value: You're not that much older than me! That's double-dipping! No, double standards! I'll show you!

Strings.Original: No way! I'm in it to win it! You just wanna look good for Miss Vanilla!
Strings.Value: No way! I'm in it to win it! You just wanna look good for Miss Vanilla!

Strings.Original: Shows what you know! I buzz on and off all the time! You can't tell me what to do!
Strings.Value: Shows what you know! I buzz on and off all the time! You can't tell me what to do!

Strings.Original: HEY! I'm super cool and fast and capable! You can sit here being a crybaby while I race to the finish!
Strings.Value: HEY! I'm super cool and fast and capable! You can sit here being a crybaby while I race to the finish!

Strings.Original: I'm here to race too! And I'm better at it than you! I'm gonna win and leave you cryin' in the loser lane!
Strings.Value: I'm here to race too! And I'm better at it than you! I'm gonna win and leave you cryin' in the loser lane!

Strings.Original: I'll show you! I'm gonna win and you're gonna lose!
Strings.Value: I'll show you! I'm gonna win and you're gonna lose!

Strings.Original: Hey! We both won! That's so cool!
Strings.Value: Hey! We both won! That's so cool!

Strings.Original: Aw! I really wanted to win.
Strings.Value: Aw! I really wanted to win.

Strings.Original: I beat you! I beat you! Toldja! Toldja!
Strings.Value: I beat you! I beat you! Toldja! Toldja!

Strings.Original: I got it! I got it! Nyah-nyah!
Strings.Value: I got it! I got it! Nyah-nyah!

Strings.Original: Let this be a lesson to all who'd oppose me!
Strings.Value: Let this be a lesson to all who'd oppose me!

Strings.Original: None of you will stop me!
Strings.Value: None of you will stop me!

Strings.Original: Reminds me of where I battled Sonic.
Strings.Value: Reminds me of where I battled Sonic.

Strings.Original: I didn't know such a place existed in Lost Hex.
Strings.Value: I didn't know such a place existed in Lost Hex.

Strings.Original: You're as bad as your father!
Strings.Value: You're as bad as your father!

Strings.Original: Well done, but it's not over.
Strings.Value: Well done, but it's not over.

Strings.Original: Surrender is suitable for the weak.
Strings.Value: Surrender is suitable for the weak.

Strings.Original: I will not stand for this!
Strings.Value: I will not stand for this!

Strings.Original: A poor performance on my part.
Strings.Value: A poor performance on my part.

Strings.Original: Crawl back to your father, child!
Strings.Value: Crawl back to your father, child!

Strings.Original: I am Zavok, warlord of the Deadly Six.
Strings.Value: I am Zavok, warlord of the Deadly Six.

Strings.Original: Your efforts shall be in vain!
Strings.Value: Your efforts shall be in vain!

Strings.Original: Struggle all you want. It's all but over.
Strings.Value: Struggle all you want. It's all but over.

Strings.Original: Get back here so we may begin!
Strings.Value: Get back here so we may begin!

Strings.Original: You may show some promise yet.
Strings.Value: You may show some promise yet.

Strings.Original: Crush your enemies! Drive them before you!
Strings.Value: Crush your enemies! Drive them before you!

Strings.Original: How can it end like this!?
Strings.Value: How can it end like this!?

Strings.Original: Are you sure you want to do this? Sonic may not be here to save you this time, little girl.
Strings.Value: Are you sure you want to do this? Sonic may not be here to save you this time, little girl.

Strings.Original: Who is this ponderous oaf? How did he wander into the event? Step aside. You're in the way of my inevitable victory.
Strings.Value: Who is this ponderous oaf? How did he wander into the event? Step aside. You're in the way of my inevitable victory.

Strings.Original: Another fire-bearer? Let us see whose flames burn more fiercely!
Strings.Value: Another fire-bearer? Let us see whose flames burn more fiercely!

Strings.Original: I refuse to debase myself by competing against this child. I demand a worthy challenger!
Strings.Value: I refuse to debase myself by competing against this child. I demand a worthy challenger!

Strings.Original: Your friends seem to have great faith in you. What a tragedy, then, when you fail to finish the race at all, hmm?
Strings.Value: Your friends seem to have great faith in you. What a tragedy, then, when you fail to finish the race at all, hmm?

Strings.Original: Your defeat today is just the start of long overdue retribution, Doctor.
Strings.Value: Your defeat today is just the start of long overdue retribution, Doctor.

Strings.Original: Why is this junk cluttering the track? Hmm, still seems functional. Nevertheless, you are beneath my notice.
Strings.Value: Why is this junk cluttering the track? Hmm, still seems functional. Nevertheless, you are beneath my notice.

Strings.Original: You hide and strike from the shadows. Such cowardice cannot overcome my might, let alone win this race.
Strings.Value: You hide and strike from the shadows. Such cowardice cannot overcome my might, let alone win this race.

Strings.Original: You share my hatred for Sonic, do you not? I would not be opposed to an alliance to ensure his utter defeat.
Strings.Value: You share my hatred for Sonic, do you not? I would not be opposed to an alliance to ensure his utter defeat.

Strings.Original: I hear you're the last of a warrior race. I'll put an end to your civilization's final chapter.
Strings.Value: I hear you're the last of a warrior race. I'll put an end to your civilization's final chapter.

Strings.Original: Our mutual hatred for Sonic should be a cause for celebration. Sadly, you must fall behind as I race to victory.
Strings.Value: Our mutual hatred for Sonic should be a cause for celebration. Sadly, you must fall behind as I race to victory.

Strings.Original: Our mutual hatred for Eggman should be grounds for an alliance. What do you say? Shall we crush him together?
Strings.Value: Our mutual hatred for Eggman should be grounds for an alliance. What do you say? Shall we crush him together?

Strings.Original: Your little tricks, traps, and lies won't work on me. Prepare to face a true, relentless warrior.
Strings.Value: Your little tricks, traps, and lies won't work on me. Prepare to face a true, relentless warrior.

Strings.Original: The doctor's daughter? Excellent. He leaves his heart open to attack.
Strings.Value: The doctor's daughter? Excellent. He leaves his heart open to attack.

Strings.Original: I've heard tales of your legendary power. I look forward to tarnishing your legacy.
Strings.Value: I've heard tales of your legendary power. I look forward to tarnishing your legacy.

Strings.Original: You will not get in the way of my conquests again, boy. Whether in a race or in warfare, my pride demands victory.
Strings.Value: You will not get in the way of my conquests again, boy. Whether in a race or in warfare, my pride demands victory.

Strings.Original: Another day, another opportunity to crush your spirit! Prepare yourself!
Strings.Value: Another day, another opportunity to crush your spirit! Prepare yourself!

Strings.Original: Do you fancy yourself a brawler? Brace yourself, as I'm about to unleash a power you can't comprehend.
Strings.Value: Do you fancy yourself a brawler? Brace yourself, as I'm about to unleash a power you can't comprehend.

Strings.Original: Ah, the understudy thinks he's ready for center stage. You're not ready for me, boy.
Strings.Value: Ah, the understudy thinks he's ready for center stage. You're not ready for me, boy.

Strings.Original: So you fancy yourself a champion of justice? How hilariously pathetic.
Strings.Value: So you fancy yourself a champion of justice? How hilariously pathetic.

Strings.Original: Tinkering with your gadgets doesn't prepare you for a real confrontation. Stick to the pit crew and let the real contenders race.
Strings.Value: Tinkering with your gadgets doesn't prepare you for a real confrontation. Stick to the pit crew and let the real contenders race.

Strings.Original: Don't think this entitles you to leadership of the Deadly Six. This is merely a race, not a rite of combat.
Strings.Value: Don't think this entitles you to leadership of the Deadly Six. This is merely a race, not a rite of combat.

Strings.Original: Little girl, if you aren't prepared to fight for what you want, then why bother showing up at all?
Strings.Value: Little girl, if you aren't prepared to fight for what you want, then why bother showing up at all?

Strings.Original: I sense a tremendous power behind those words. Am I feeling... fear!?
Strings.Value: I sense a tremendous power behind those words. Am I feeling... fear!?

Strings.Original: Your regal bearing suits you, Princess. It will make it all the more satisfying to crush your dignity.
Strings.Value: Your regal bearing suits you, Princess. It will make it all the more satisfying to crush your dignity.

Strings.Original: Who allowed this obnoxious child into the event? No matter. I have no qualms with crushing the dreams of children.
Strings.Value: Who allowed this obnoxious child into the event? No matter. I have no qualms with crushing the dreams of children.

Strings.Original: How adorable. Civility is a brittle thing, child. Watch how quickly it disappears in the heat of the moment!
Strings.Value: How adorable. Civility is a brittle thing, child. Watch how quickly it disappears in the heat of the moment!

Strings.Original: You will pay for every indignity you have shown me, beginning with your utter ruination on the track.
Strings.Value: You will pay for every indignity you have shown me, beginning with your utter ruination on the track.

Strings.Original: Was that meant to be intimidating? I will grind your gears to dust.
Strings.Value: Was that meant to be intimidating? I will grind your gears to dust.

Strings.Original: I'd heard you were some sort of warrior-poet. Imagine my disappointment to find you are merely... you.
Strings.Value: I'd heard you were some sort of warrior-poet. Imagine my disappointment to find you are merely... you.

Strings.Original: Your brash impertinence will be your undoing, boy. We Zeti are conquerors, on and off the track!
Strings.Value: Your brash impertinence will be your undoing, boy. We Zeti are conquerors, on and off the track!

Strings.Original: And you would be reduced to naught but shreds and bravado. Focus on the race. It's the safest option for you.
Strings.Value: And you would be reduced to naught but shreds and bravado. Focus on the race. It's the safest option for you.

Strings.Original: So you're the doctor's facsimile to Sonic? I think I prefer you. I will crush you all the same.
Strings.Value: So you're the doctor's facsimile to Sonic? I think I prefer you. I will crush you all the same.

Strings.Original: I like your attitude, machine. After the race, shall we see which one of us is mightier?
Strings.Value: I like your attitude, machine. After the race, shall we see which one of us is mightier?

Strings.Original: Ah, the cunning Rouge. We've only interacted in passing, but I can't underestimate her!
Strings.Value: Ah, the cunning Rouge. We've only interacted in passing, but I can't underestimate her!

Strings.Original: I have only ever been a victim of circumstance. I will make him pay for his arrogance, starting by taking you away from him!
Strings.Value: I have only ever been a victim of circumstance. I will make him pay for his arrogance, starting by taking you away from him!

Strings.Original: I imagine for the same reason as you: to test our mettle. But there can only be one victor today.
Strings.Value: I imagine for the same reason as you: to test our mettle. But there can only be one victor today.

Strings.Original: We have lasted for centuries, and will endure for many more. You are just a footnote in our long and deadly legacy.
Strings.Value: We have lasted for centuries, and will endure for many more. You are just a footnote in our long and deadly legacy.

Strings.Original: A bold challenge. I shall relish humbling you upon the race course.
Strings.Value: A bold challenge. I shall relish humbling you upon the race course.

Strings.Original: Ah, so you're Jet's fodder. I'll eliminate you, then get to the real competitor.
Strings.Value: Ah, so you're Jet's fodder. I'll eliminate you, then get to the real competitor.

Strings.Original: My, how the weak grow overconfident when facing their superiors. See you at the finish line, boy.
Strings.Value: My, how the weak grow overconfident when facing their superiors. See you at the finish line, boy.

Strings.Original: You think too highly of yourself. Nevertheless, if you wish to challenge me, I'll happily crush your spirit.
Strings.Value: You think too highly of yourself. Nevertheless, if you wish to challenge me, I'll happily crush your spirit.

Strings.Original: I have more than enough experience to make you pay for your attitude.
Strings.Value: I have more than enough experience to make you pay for your attitude.

Strings.Original: We are Zeti. We do nothing in half measures. Unleash all your rage on the track, regardless of your opponent. I demand it!
Strings.Value: We are Zeti. We do nothing in half measures. Unleash all your rage on the track, regardless of your opponent. I demand it!

Strings.Original: I will be swift, but not merciful.
Strings.Value: I will be swift, but not merciful.

Strings.Original: You held your own. I can respect that.
Strings.Value: You held your own. I can respect that.

Strings.Original: Can't nobody handle what I got!
Strings.Value: Can't nobody handle what I got!

Strings.Original: I'll show you! I'll show you all!
Strings.Value: I'll show you! I'll show you all!

Strings.Original: Give the word! Let me loose!
Strings.Value: Give the word! Let me loose!

Strings.Original: We're gonna have some fun here!
Strings.Value: We're gonna have some fun here!

Strings.Original: Look at all this cool stuff—TO BREAK!
Strings.Value: Look at all this cool stuff—TO BREAK!

Strings.Original: You got a mean streak, kid!
Strings.Value: You got a mean streak, kid!

Strings.Original: I'll get you for that, punk!
Strings.Value: I'll get you for that, punk!

Strings.Original: You just got lucky, punk! That's all!
Strings.Value: You just got lucky, punk! That's all!

Strings.Original: HAHAHA! You got no chance now!
Strings.Value: HAHAHA! You got no chance now!

Strings.Original: Still better than most of you losers!
Strings.Value: Still better than most of you losers!

Strings.Original: But I crashed so many times!
Strings.Value: But I crashed so many times!

Strings.Original: Yeah, well, I wasn't really tryin'!
Strings.Value: Yeah, well, I wasn't really tryin'!

Strings.Original: Number one, baby! Can't be beat!
Strings.Value: Number one, baby! Can't be beat!

Strings.Original: HAHAHA! Couldn't miss if I tried!
Strings.Value: HAHAHA! Couldn't miss if I tried!

Strings.Original: Not so cocky now, huh!? HUH!?
Strings.Value: Not so cocky now, huh!? HUH!?

Strings.Original: That's what you get, you little punk!
Strings.Value: That's what you get, you little punk!

Strings.Original: Haha! I'm Zazz, and you're in trouble!
Strings.Value: Haha! I'm Zazz, and you're in trouble!

Strings.Original: I ain't losin' to you! RAUGH! Let's go!
Strings.Value: I ain't losin' to you! RAUGH! Let's go!

Strings.Original: HAHAHA! Look at your face! I'm winnin' this!
Strings.Value: HAHAHA! Look at your face! I'm winnin' this!

Strings.Original: Wait, weren't we supposed to be doin' something?
Strings.Value: Wait, weren't we supposed to be doin' something?

Strings.Original: COME ON! I WANNA WRECK SOMETHING!
Strings.Value: COME ON! I WANNA WRECK SOMETHING!

Strings.Original: Gonna tear 'em all down at this rate!
Strings.Value: Gonna tear 'em all down at this rate!

Strings.Original: When'd they get so far ahead!?
Strings.Value: When'd they get so far ahead!?

Strings.Original: NO! THIS AIN'T HOW IT SHOULD GO!
Strings.Value: NO! THIS AIN'T HOW IT SHOULD GO!

Strings.Original: Get outta the way! I'm a wild man on the road! Ain't no one safe around me!
Strings.Value: Get outta the way! I'm a wild man on the road! Ain't no one safe around me!

Strings.Original: WOO! You're a big one! I gotta get you in a sumo match with Zomom! Hahaha!
Strings.Value: WOO! You're a big one! I gotta get you in a sumo match with Zomom! Hahaha!

Strings.Original: You're supposed to be royalty, right? WOO! Time for a coup, baby! Yeah! Fight the power!
Strings.Value: You're supposed to be royalty, right? WOO! Time for a coup, baby! Yeah! Fight the power!

Strings.Original: Get outta my face, ya flyin' freak! I'm here to race, not babysit!
Strings.Value: Get outta my face, ya flyin' freak! I'm here to race, not babysit!

Strings.Original: Run on home, girly! I'm a man on the edge! I don't care who I mess up out there! Hahahaha!
Strings.Value: Run on home, girly! I'm a man on the edge! I don't care who I mess up out there! Hahahaha!

Strings.Original: Revenge time, baby! I'm gonna terrorize you all the way to the finish line!
Strings.Value: Revenge time, baby! I'm gonna terrorize you all the way to the finish line!

Strings.Original: Outta the way ya hunk of junk! I'm clawin' my way to victory and leavin' your pieces all over the road!
Strings.Value: Outta the way ya hunk of junk! I'm clawin' my way to victory and leavin' your pieces all over the road!

Strings.Original: Hoho, you're a sneaky one! You won't creep up on me! I'm lashin' out in all directions all the time! Hiyah! Hiyah! Hiyah!
Strings.Value: Hoho, you're a sneaky one! You won't creep up on me! I'm lashin' out in all directions all the time! Hiyah! Hiyah! Hiyah!

Strings.Original: Ahaha, who's this runt? Outta the way, short stack! I'm here to race against the best!
Strings.Value: Ahaha, who's this runt? Outta the way, short stack! I'm here to race against the best!

Strings.Original: Wanna go!? Let's ditch the rides and just slug it out!
Strings.Value: Wanna go!? Let's ditch the rides and just slug it out!

Strings.Original: A robot Sonic? AWESOME! I'll trash you, the doc will rebuild you, and I'll trash you all over again! Hahaha!
Strings.Value: A robot Sonic? AWESOME! I'll trash you, the doc will rebuild you, and I'll trash you all over again! Hahaha!

Strings.Original: Oh, you look pretty tough, tin man! Let's see how long you last against the master of disaster!
Strings.Value: Oh, you look pretty tough, tin man! Let's see how long you last against the master of disaster!

Strings.Original: Ain't no one stoppin' me from grabbin' victory! Ain't no way, ain't no how!
Strings.Value: Ain't no one stoppin' me from grabbin' victory! Ain't no way, ain't no how!

Strings.Original: YAH! Some kinda ghost girly!? Don't haunt me! I gotta get away from here as fast as I can!
Strings.Value: YAH! Some kinda ghost girly!? Don't haunt me! I gotta get away from here as fast as I can!

Strings.Original: Hoo-hoo-hoo! I like your style! You've got an edge to ya! Let's see how sharp it is!
Strings.Value: Hoo-hoo-hoo! I like your style! You've got an edge to ya! Let's see how sharp it is!

Strings.Original: Outta the way, fluffy! This ain't no place for a shiny-clean kid like you!
Strings.Value: Outta the way, fluffy! This ain't no place for a shiny-clean kid like you!

Strings.Original: You're goin' down, punk! Gonna pay you back a hundred times over for all you did!
Strings.Value: You're goin' down, punk! Gonna pay you back a hundred times over for all you did!

Strings.Original: You look like a bruiser! Forget drivin'—let's wrassle!
Strings.Value: You look like a bruiser! Forget drivin'—let's wrassle!

Strings.Original: Hey! It's that little punk! You think you can get in my way? I'll run you over!
Strings.Value: Hey! It's that little punk! You think you can get in my way? I'll run you over!

Strings.Original: Ooh, a law man, huh? You'll never take me alive! I'll take you down with me! YEAH! Blaze of glory!
Strings.Value: Ooh, a law man, huh? You'll never take me alive! I'll take you down with me! YEAH! Blaze of glory!

Strings.Original: All this fancy tech is makin' my head spin! Just gimme a ride and let me win! I'll wreck everything in my way!
Strings.Value: All this fancy tech is makin' my head spin! Just gimme a ride and let me win! I'll wreck everything in my way!

Strings.Original: Uh?! Y-You and me, huh? You know how I am. What's a little fender bender between us, right? Nothing personal!
Strings.Value: Uh?! Y-You and me, huh? You know how I am. What's a little fender bender between us, right? Nothing personal!

Strings.Original: Where's the fun in that!? Vehicular mayhem all day every day, baby!
Strings.Value: Where's the fun in that!? Vehicular mayhem all day every day, baby!

Strings.Original: NO! I eat punks like you for breakfast! RARGH! Let's go!
Strings.Value: NO! I eat punks like you for breakfast! RARGH! Let's go!

Strings.Original: "Civil" ain't in my vocabulary, lady! If you can't stand the heat, get off the race track!
Strings.Value: "Civil" ain't in my vocabulary, lady! If you can't stand the heat, get off the race track!

Strings.Original: Never heard of ya! But if you're some kind of big shot... BRING IT ON! I'll take them all on, big or small!
Strings.Value: Never heard of ya! But if you're some kind of big shot... BRING IT ON! I'll take them all on, big or small!

Strings.Original: Let 'em watch! I'll go crazy as much as I want!
Strings.Value: Let 'em watch! I'll go crazy as much as I want!

Strings.Original: You big brains make things too complicated! Drive fast, finish first! It's simple, "genius"!
Strings.Value: You big brains make things too complicated! Drive fast, finish first! It's simple, "genius"!

Strings.Original: You wanna go? THEN LET'S GO! YEAH! No mercy!
Strings.Value: You wanna go? THEN LET'S GO! YEAH! No mercy!

Strings.Original: Blah, blah, blah! This punk gets lucky in one scrap and he thinks he's the best of the best! I'mma teach you some manners!
Strings.Value: Blah, blah, blah! This punk gets lucky in one scrap and he thinks he's the best of the best! I'mma teach you some manners!

Strings.Original: What "sport"!? We're just going around in circles! The only fun is knocking you off the road!
Strings.Value: What "sport"!? We're just going around in circles! The only fun is knocking you off the road!

Strings.Original: Go ahead and try! I don't care about any of these things! I just want the thrill of the moment! YEAH!
Strings.Value: Go ahead and try! I don't care about any of these things! I just want the thrill of the moment! YEAH!

Strings.Original: Oh yeah! A Sonic built for brawlin'! I don't wanna race! I wanna throw down!
Strings.Value: Oh yeah! A Sonic built for brawlin'! I don't wanna race! I wanna throw down!

Strings.Original: You got a lotta nerve! I'mma beat you in this race just to prove you wrong! And then? I'mma rip you to shreds!
Strings.Value: You got a lotta nerve! I'mma beat you in this race just to prove you wrong! And then? I'mma rip you to shreds!

Strings.Original: HA! You said the magic words, lady! I LIVE to lose it! YEAH! Now I'm good and mad!
Strings.Value: HA! You said the magic words, lady! I LIVE to lose it! YEAH! Now I'm good and mad!

Strings.Original: You got a big mouth for such a tiny ghost thing! Let's see what you say after I run you off the road!
Strings.Value: You got a big mouth for such a tiny ghost thing! Let's see what you say after I run you off the road!

Strings.Original: I'm even more likely to run you off the road! You better drive fast 'cause I'm comin' for ya!
Strings.Value: I'm even more likely to run you off the road! You better drive fast 'cause I'm comin' for ya!

Strings.Original: Look all you want, you fluffy pretty boy! I'll go wild all I want, and ain't nothing you can do about it!
Strings.Value: Look all you want, you fluffy pretty boy! I'll go wild all I want, and ain't nothing you can do about it!
