Strings.Original: Hide and watch! If you cross the finish line, it'll be in pieces!
Strings.Value: Hide and watch! If you cross the finish line, it'll be in pieces!

Strings.Original: You wanna go!? LET'S GO! All that bulk better not be feathers! I wanna feel the hits!
Strings.Value: You wanna go!? LET'S GO! All that bulk better not be feathers! I wanna feel the hits!

Strings.Original: Hahahaha! Me neither! That'll make running you off the road even more fun!
Strings.Value: Hahahaha! Me neither! That'll make running you off the road even more fun!

Strings.Original: I ain't scared of you! I do what I want! I'mma swerve all over those lanes and you can't stop me! Ahahaha!
Strings.Value: I ain't scared of you! I do what I want! I'mma swerve all over those lanes and you can't stop me! Ahahaha!

Strings.Original: It's just a machine! You wanna talk motors? Then I'm an engine of destruction, baby!
Strings.Value: It's just a machine! You wanna talk motors? Then I'm an engine of destruction, baby!

Strings.Original: Yeah, sure, unless I win and then maybe you aren't as scary as I thought?
Strings.Value: Yeah, sure, unless I win and then maybe you aren't as scary as I thought?

Strings.Original: I'mma run you off the road, lap you, then run you over! HAHAHA!
Strings.Value: I'mma run you off the road, lap you, then run you over! HAHAHA!

Strings.Original: There's gotta be a winner and a loser!
Strings.Value: There's gotta be a winner and a loser!

Strings.Original: That ain't fair! This is stupid!
Strings.Value: That ain't fair! This is stupid!

Strings.Original: How you like that!? Huh!? HUH!?
Strings.Value: How you like that!? Huh!? HUH!?

Strings.Original: Woo! I'm a high roller now!
Strings.Value: Woo! I'm a high roller now!

Strings.Original: I'm so happy! Thanks for racing with me!
Strings.Value: I'm so happy! Thanks for racing with me!

Strings.Original: That was so much fun! Thank you everyone!
Strings.Value: That was so much fun! Thank you everyone!

Strings.Original: Chao Park! Chao Park! CHAO PARK!
Strings.Value: Chao Park! Chao Park! CHAO PARK!

Strings.Original:
I should come back with Mother, Cheese,
and Miss Amy!
Strings.Value:
I should come back with Mother, Cheese,
and Miss Amy!

Strings.Original: We're so high in the sky!
Strings.Value: We're so high in the sky!

Strings.Original: We can't be friends if you do that!
Strings.Value: We can't be friends if you do that!

Strings.Original: I'll tell Amy you're a meanie!
Strings.Value: I'll tell Amy you're a meanie!

Strings.Original: What do you think this does?
Strings.Value: What do you think this does?

Strings.Original: Good job everyone! That was fun!
Strings.Value: Good job everyone! That was fun!

Strings.Original: I want to do that again!
Strings.Value: I want to do that again!

Strings.Original: I'll have to try harder next time.
Strings.Value: I'll have to try harder next time.

Strings.Original: That was harder than I expected.
Strings.Value: That was harder than I expected.

Strings.Original: I did it! Did you see? Did you see?
Strings.Value: I did it! Did you see? Did you see?

Strings.Original: I didn't mean it, Mr. Jet!
Strings.Value: I didn't mean it, Mr. Jet!

Strings.Original: Did I do that right, Ms. Rouge?
Strings.Value: Did I do that right, Ms. Rouge?

Strings.Original: Am I doing this right, Ms. Sage?
Strings.Value: Am I doing this right, Ms. Sage?

Strings.Original: Thank you for playing along, Mr. Vector!
Strings.Value: Thank you for playing along, Mr. Vector!

Strings.Original: It's just a game, Ms. Wave!
Strings.Value: It's just a game, Ms. Wave!

Strings.Original: You can't be mad, Mr. Zavok!
Strings.Value: You can't be mad, Mr. Zavok!

Strings.Original: Don't give up! One more race!
Strings.Value: Don't give up! One more race!

Strings.Original: Um... excuse me? Can we start, please?
Strings.Value: Um... excuse me? Can we start, please?

Strings.Original: Did you leave me all alone?
Strings.Value: Did you leave me all alone?

Strings.Original: I'm so proud of you! Hooray!
Strings.Value: I'm so proud of you! Hooray!

Strings.Original: You've gotten so far! Wow! Just... wow!
Strings.Value: You've gotten so far! Wow! Just... wow!

Strings.Original: Let's go! Team Rose together again to win the day!
Strings.Value: Let's go! Team Rose together again to win the day!

Strings.Original: Hello, Mr. Big! I'm glad you could join us today. Is Froggy here as well?
Strings.Value: Hello, Mr. Big! I'm glad you could join us today. Is Froggy here as well?

Strings.Original: Hooray! Let's drive superfast, Ms. Blaze! I want to see all your cool tricks and techniques!
Strings.Value: Hooray! Let's drive superfast, Ms. Blaze! I want to see all your cool tricks and techniques!

Strings.Original: Let's do our best, Charmy! And we have to remember to be respectful of everyone on the road.
Strings.Value: Let's do our best, Charmy! And we have to remember to be respectful of everyone on the road.

Strings.Original: You mustn't be rude during the race! Mr. Pa said everyone has to be nice while competing!
Strings.Value: You mustn't be rude during the race! Mr. Pa said everyone has to be nice while competing!

Strings.Original: One of Dr. Eggman's robots! It must be up to no good!
Strings.Value: One of Dr. Eggman's robots! It must be up to no good!

Strings.Original: Thank you for being my chaperone, Mr. Espio. Mother said she'd bake us a big victory cake when we get home!
Strings.Value: Thank you for being my chaperone, Mr. Espio. Mother said she'd bake us a big victory cake when we get home!

Strings.Original: Mind your manners, Mr. Jet. It doesn't matter if you win or lose, but how you run the race!
Strings.Value: Mind your manners, Mr. Jet. It doesn't matter if you win or lose, but how you run the race!

Strings.Original: Don't be too rowdy out there, Mr. Knuckles. We should all focus on having a good time, right?
Strings.Value: Don't be too rowdy out there, Mr. Knuckles. We should all focus on having a good time, right?

Strings.Original: Y-You sure are fast. B-But I'm going to drive my fastest too! You'll see!
Strings.Value: Y-You sure are fast. B-But I'm going to drive my fastest too! You'll see!

Strings.Original: It's good to see you again, Mr. Omega. Are you excited to be racing with all of your friends today too?
Strings.Value: It's good to see you again, Mr. Omega. Are you excited to be racing with all of your friends today too?

Strings.Original: You're not going to try anything sneaky, are you, Ms. Rouge? I just want to have a good time racing.
Strings.Value: You're not going to try anything sneaky, are you, Ms. Rouge? I just want to have a good time racing.

Strings.Original: Hello! It's nice to see someone else my age here! I hope you do well in the race, and that we can be best friends!
Strings.Value: Hello! It's nice to see someone else my age here! I hope you do well in the race, and that we can be best friends!

Strings.Original: Please don't be mean to me out there, Mr. Shadow.
Strings.Value: Please don't be mean to me out there, Mr. Shadow.

Strings.Original: Don't go using time travel to skip ahead, Mr. Silver! We all have to compete the same!
Strings.Value: Don't go using time travel to skip ahead, Mr. Silver! We all have to compete the same!

Strings.Original: This is it, Mr. Sonic! Our big moment! I'll do my best to keep up with you!
Strings.Value: This is it, Mr. Sonic! Our big moment! I'll do my best to keep up with you!

Strings.Original: Hello, Mr. Storm! I finished all my homework before coming to the race. Did you?
Strings.Value: Hello, Mr. Storm! I finished all my homework before coming to the race. Did you?

Strings.Original: I look forward to racing with you, Mr. Tails! Let's do our best and show everyone what we can do!
Strings.Value: I look forward to racing with you, Mr. Tails! Let's do our best and show everyone what we can do!

Strings.Original: You know, Mr. Vector, Mother will be extra happy if I win! Hehehe!
Strings.Value: You know, Mr. Vector, Mother will be extra happy if I win! Hehehe!

Strings.Original: I like your outfit, Ms. Wave! But doesn't all that white get messy when you're doing maintenance?
Strings.Value: I like your outfit, Ms. Wave! But doesn't all that white get messy when you're doing maintenance?

Strings.Original: M-Mother said to be on my best behavior, so... good luck in the race, Mr. Zavok.
Strings.Value: M-Mother said to be on my best behavior, so... good luck in the race, Mr. Zavok.

Strings.Original: Don't do anything too reckless out there. My friends are watching, so be on your best behavior!
Strings.Value: Don't do anything too reckless out there. My friends are watching, so be on your best behavior!

Strings.Original: I'll do my best, Ms. Amy! And that means competing my hardest against you too!
Strings.Value: I'll do my best, Ms. Amy! And that means competing my hardest against you too!

Strings.Original: No, silly! I am! You know he's always with me!
Strings.Value: No, silly! I am! You know he's always with me!

Strings.Original: You bet, Ms. Blaze! I'll do my best and really impress you!
Strings.Value: You bet, Ms. Blaze! I'll do my best and really impress you!

Strings.Original: We should be using our "inside voices"! And it's not polite to make people cry! Please try to behave!
Strings.Value: We should be using our "inside voices"! And it's not polite to make people cry! Please try to behave!

Strings.Original: You're mean and scary, but I won't run away! I've fought your machines before, and I'll race you now too!
Strings.Value: You're mean and scary, but I won't run away! I've fought your machines before, and I'll race you now too!

Strings.Original: I'm sorry, I don't speak "robot," but that sounded rude!
Strings.Value: I'm sorry, I don't speak "robot," but that sounded rude!

Strings.Original: Okay, but don't forget we're racing each other too! Let's both do our best!
Strings.Value: Okay, but don't forget we're racing each other too! Let's both do our best!

Strings.Original: Mother knows I'm here and is very proud of me! I'm going to win and make her prouder still!
Strings.Value: Mother knows I'm here and is very proud of me! I'm going to win and make her prouder still!

Strings.Original: Don't worry, Mr. Knuckles! I can handle myself! If you're not careful, I'll even beat you! Hahahaha!
Strings.Value: Don't worry, Mr. Knuckles! I can handle myself! If you're not careful, I'll even beat you! Hahahaha!

Strings.Original: You make everyone nervous! Why do you have to be so scary? I'll beat you and prove to everyone it'll be okay!
Strings.Value: You make everyone nervous! Why do you have to be so scary? I'll beat you and prove to everyone it'll be okay!

Strings.Original: Oh. Thank you, Mr. Omega! Seems like you can be nice after all. Let's have a thrilling race together!
Strings.Value: Oh. Thank you, Mr. Omega! Seems like you can be nice after all. Let's have a thrilling race together!

Strings.Original: I don't wanna be left out! If it's hard, I'll just have to do my best! Just you wait and see! I'll win this!
Strings.Value: I don't wanna be left out! If it's hard, I'll just have to do my best! Just you wait and see! I'll win this!

Strings.Original: We're all friends, that's why! I'll show you just how much they inspire me!
Strings.Value: We're all friends, that's why! I'll show you just how much they inspire me!

Strings.Original: I will do my best, Mr. Shadow! Just you watch!
Strings.Value: I will do my best, Mr. Shadow! Just you watch!

Strings.Original: Don't worry, Mr. Silver! I've seen plenty of action! And I know I can count on you to play nice!
Strings.Value: Don't worry, Mr. Silver! I've seen plenty of action! And I know I can count on you to play nice!

Strings.Original: I'll do my best, Mr. Sonic! Please don't go easy on me!
Strings.Value: I'll do my best, Mr. Sonic! Please don't go easy on me!

Strings.Original: I'm here to race too, Mr. Storm! When this is over, we can go get victory ice cream together!
Strings.Value: I'm here to race too, Mr. Storm! When this is over, we can go get victory ice cream together!

Strings.Original: You bet! Good luck, and see you at the finish line!
Strings.Value: You bet! Good luck, and see you at the finish line!

Strings.Original: As long as I'm safe, Mother will be happy! But if we got ice cream, I'll tell her you were extra nice! Haha!
Strings.Value: As long as I'm safe, Mother will be happy! But if we got ice cream, I'll tell her you were extra nice! Haha!

Strings.Original: I can take care of myself, thank you very much! And I can race too! Just you wait and see!
Strings.Value: I can take care of myself, thank you very much! And I can race too! Just you wait and see!

Strings.Original: My friends taught me not to be scared of bullies like you! Maybe after I win, you'll learn some manners!
Strings.Value: My friends taught me not to be scared of bullies like you! Maybe after I win, you'll learn some manners!

Strings.Original: Y-You're just a loud, mean bully! I-I'm gonna win just so you have to apologize!
Strings.Value: Y-You're just a loud, mean bully! I-I'm gonna win just so you have to apologize!

Strings.Original: Let's both promise to do our best and play nice!
Strings.Value: Let's both promise to do our best and play nice!

Strings.Original: We tied! That's like us both winning!
Strings.Value: We tied! That's like us both winning!

Strings.Original: Aw, well, good job! I'm happy for you!
Strings.Value: Aw, well, good job! I'm happy for you!

Strings.Original: I did it! Thank you for the fun race!
Strings.Value: I did it! Thank you for the fun race!

Strings.Original: That was fun! Wanna do it again?
Strings.Value: That was fun! Wanna do it again?

Strings.Original: I wonder if they have clothes for Froggy?
Strings.Value: I wonder if they have clothes for Froggy?

Strings.Original: Looks like a good place for ice fishin'!
Strings.Value: Looks like a good place for ice fishin'!

Strings.Original: I should try harder next time.
Strings.Value: I should try harder next time.

Strings.Original: Hey, good buddy. My name's Big.
Strings.Value: Hey, good buddy. My name's Big.

Strings.Original: Lemme know when you're gonna start trying, okay?
Strings.Value: Lemme know when you're gonna start trying, okay?

Strings.Original: That's that. You can relax now.
Strings.Value: That's that. You can relax now.

Strings.Original: Hi, Amy! I'm looking forward to our Team Rose reunion.
Strings.Value: Hi, Amy! I'm looking forward to our Team Rose reunion.

Strings.Original: Your world is mostly ocean, right? I bet you have great fishing opportunities!
Strings.Value: Your world is mostly ocean, right? I bet you have great fishing opportunities!

Strings.Original: Hey, little buddy. Wanna go fishing after the race?
Strings.Value: Hey, little buddy. Wanna go fishing after the race?

Strings.Original: Hi, Cream... and Cheese? Is he driving?
Strings.Value: Hi, Cream... and Cheese? Is he driving?

Strings.Original: That's a stylish coat. Do you think it would fit me?
Strings.Value: That's a stylish coat. Do you think it would fit me?

Strings.Original: Uh-oh. A bad robot. I better smash it before it bothers my friends.
Strings.Value: Uh-oh. A bad robot. I better smash it before it bothers my friends.

Strings.Original: Can you teach me to turn invisible? It'd be pretty handy for fishing!
Strings.Value: Can you teach me to turn invisible? It'd be pretty handy for fishing!

Strings.Original: Hey there! Do you like to race too?
Strings.Value: Hey there! Do you like to race too?

Strings.Original: Ready for a nice, casual race?
Strings.Value: Ready for a nice, casual race?

Strings.Original: Sonic's pretty good at fishing. Are you good at fishing too?
Strings.Value: Sonic's pretty good at fishing. Are you good at fishing too?

Strings.Original: Some Badniks infested a lake I fish at. Can you help me get rid of 'em?
Strings.Value: Some Badniks infested a lake I fish at. Can you help me get rid of 'em?

Strings.Original: I find all kinds of treasures when I go fishing. Wanna see sometime?
Strings.Value: I find all kinds of treasures when I go fishing. Wanna see sometime?

Strings.Original: I hear you're pretty smart. Do you know much about fish?
Strings.Value: I hear you're pretty smart. Do you know much about fish?

Strings.Original: You look tense, buddy. Wanna go fishing after this?
Strings.Value: You look tense, buddy. Wanna go fishing after this?

Strings.Original: Have you ever gone fishing with your mind? I bet you'd be good at it!
Strings.Value: Have you ever gone fishing with your mind? I bet you'd be good at it!

Strings.Original: Wouldn't you rather be running? Isn't driving too slow for you?
Strings.Value: Wouldn't you rather be running? Isn't driving too slow for you?

Strings.Original: I like your gloves! They look sturdy but easy to wear.
Strings.Value: I like your gloves! They look sturdy but easy to wear.

Strings.Original: Hey, little buddy. Did you get the fishing rod designs I sent you?
Strings.Value: Hey, little buddy. Did you get the fishing rod designs I sent you?

Strings.Original: If Froggy ever goes missing again, I'll be sure to hire you guys!
Strings.Value: If Froggy ever goes missing again, I'll be sure to hire you guys!

Strings.Original: I like racing. Just go in a big, funny-shaped circle. Super easy!
Strings.Value: I like racing. Just go in a big, funny-shaped circle. Super easy!

Strings.Original: I don't like folks who are mean to my friends.
Strings.Value: I don't like folks who are mean to my friends.

Strings.Original: Haha! You've got a long tongue just like Froggy! Do you eat flies too?
Strings.Value: Haha! You've got a long tongue just like Froggy! Do you eat flies too?

Strings.Original: Racing? I thought King Dodon Pa just liked to watch us drive in circles!
Strings.Value: Racing? I thought King Dodon Pa just liked to watch us drive in circles!

Strings.Original: Wow! You talk really fancy. I like to keep it simple. So let's race!
Strings.Value: Wow! You talk really fancy. I like to keep it simple. So let's race!

Strings.Original: Oh yeah? I guess I should try driving instead of running then. Thanks for the tip!
Strings.Value: Oh yeah? I guess I should try driving instead of running then. Thanks for the tip!

Strings.Original: No, he's back home. He gets motion sick when I drive too fast.
Strings.Value: No, he's back home. He gets motion sick when I drive too fast.

Strings.Original: Even if you're scared of losing, it's not nice to be mean.
Strings.Value: Even if you're scared of losing, it's not nice to be mean.

Strings.Original: Oh! Sorry. I didn't want you to feel bad being left behind. I'll start trying now.
Strings.Value: Oh! Sorry. I didn't want you to feel bad being left behind. I'll start trying now.

Strings.Original: It's fun to race, and even more fun to win. We can't both win, though. Sorry.
Strings.Value: It's fun to race, and even more fun to win. We can't both win, though. Sorry.

Strings.Original: Sonic, are you feeling sick? You look funny. We don't have to race if you don't feel well.
Strings.Value: Sonic, are you feeling sick? You look funny. We don't have to race if you don't feel well.

Strings.Original: I don't know about all that. I do like fishing, though!
Strings.Value: I don't know about all that. I do like fishing, though!

Strings.Original: I just go where my feet take me. I don't worry about much else.
Strings.Value: I just go where my feet take me. I don't worry about much else.

Strings.Original: Oh! You're real! I thought I was seeing things. Froggy will never believe this!
Strings.Value: Oh! You're real! I thought I was seeing things. Froggy will never believe this!

Strings.Original: I was wondering that myself. Why. Are. You. Here?
Strings.Value: I was wondering that myself. Why. Are. You. Here?

Strings.Original: I wonder if there's any good fishing spots around here?
Strings.Value: I wonder if there's any good fishing spots around here?

Strings.Original: Oh, I will. Froggy is watching and cheering me on. I won't lose!
Strings.Value: Oh, I will. Froggy is watching and cheering me on. I won't lose!

Strings.Original: Oh, hello. Do you like to race too? I can show you how it's done.
Strings.Value: Oh, hello. Do you like to race too? I can show you how it's done.

Strings.Original: Why not? All I have to do is get to the end of the track first, right? Sounds simple to me.
Strings.Value: Why not? All I have to do is get to the end of the track first, right? Sounds simple to me.

Strings.Original: Sorry, but I promised my buddy I'd win it all. Better luck next time!
Strings.Value: Sorry, but I promised my buddy I'd win it all. Better luck next time!

Strings.Original: Sorry, I don't know too much about physics. Maybe you can teach me after I win?
Strings.Value: Sorry, I don't know too much about physics. Maybe you can teach me after I win?

Strings.Original: We already raced together, did you forget? That's okay. I don't remember you either!
Strings.Value: We already raced together, did you forget? That's okay. I don't remember you either!

Strings.Original: Oh? Is he nice? Maybe we can after I win this race.
Strings.Value: Oh? Is he nice? Maybe we can after I win this race.

Strings.Original: I was planning on winning, but you can try if you want.
Strings.Value: I was planning on winning, but you can try if you want.

Strings.Original: We both won? Or lost? I'm confused.
Strings.Value: We both won? Or lost? I'm confused.

Strings.Original: Yay! You did it! Nice job.
Strings.Value: Yay! You did it! Nice job.

Strings.Original: Hey! I won! I hope Froggy was watching!
Strings.Value: Hey! I won! I hope Froggy was watching!

Strings.Original: Yay! I'll add them to the collection!
Strings.Value: Yay! I'll add them to the collection!

Strings.Original: It's all right. You never had a chance.
Strings.Value: It's all right. You never had a chance.

Strings.Original: This base is... garish, even for Father.
Strings.Value: This base is... garish, even for Father.

Strings.Original: Look at all of Father's creations!
Strings.Value: Look at all of Father's creations!

Strings.Original: The Ancients' network... Where I was born.
Strings.Value: The Ancients' network... Where I was born.

Strings.Original: Do you see? I have it under control.
Strings.Value: Do you see? I have it under control.

Strings.Original: I have acquired a standard part.
Strings.Value: I have acquired a standard part.

Strings.Original: I am the superior ghost data. (giggles)
Strings.Value: I am the superior ghost data. (giggles)

Strings.Original: I'm supposed to be better than this...
Strings.Value: I'm supposed to be better than this...

Strings.Original: Failed to account for that, Tails?
Strings.Value: Failed to account for that, Tails?

Strings.Original: I am Sage, daughter to Dr. Eggman, heir to the Eggman Empire.
Strings.Value: I am Sage, daughter to Dr. Eggman, heir to the Eggman Empire.

Strings.Original: Overclocking systems! Failure is not an option!
Strings.Value: Overclocking systems! Failure is not an option!

Strings.Original: Have you forgotten your purpose here?
Strings.Value: Have you forgotten your purpose here?

Strings.Original: Must I instruct you on how to proceed?
Strings.Value: Must I instruct you on how to proceed?

Strings.Original: We put them in their place.
Strings.Value: We put them in their place.

Strings.Original: You have surpassed my models. Do you have no limits?
Strings.Value: You have surpassed my models. Do you have no limits?

Strings.Original: Your boundless compassion is a liability in competitive sports. This will be an easy victory.
Strings.Value: Your boundless compassion is a liability in competitive sports. This will be an easy victory.

Strings.Original: You are no hero. No warrior. You don't even like adventuring. Why do you keep showing up in the most unlikely places?
Strings.Value: You are no hero. No warrior. You don't even like adventuring. Why do you keep showing up in the most unlikely places?

Strings.Original: You shirk your royal duties to partake in racing? Let my father conquer your world and you'll be free to play all you like.
Strings.Value: You shirk your royal duties to partake in racing? Let my father conquer your world and you'll be free to play all you like.

Strings.Original: Your behavioral patterns are erratic. Your statements are illogical. Why are you allowed on the Chaotix?
Strings.Value: Your behavioral patterns are erratic. Your statements are illogical. Why are you allowed on the Chaotix?

Strings.Original: You are a frequent companion to Sonic and his friends. Why?
Strings.Value: You are a frequent companion to Sonic and his friends. Why?

Strings.Original: King Dodon Pa's simulated race tracks rival Cyber Space in their complexity. Why don't you make things like this?
Strings.Value: King Dodon Pa's simulated race tracks rival Cyber Space in their complexity. Why don't you make things like this?

Strings.Original: Why would Father pad out the roster with one of these generic models? Perhaps I am missing a detail? You. Race me.
Strings.Value: Why would Father pad out the roster with one of these generic models? Perhaps I am missing a detail? You. Race me.

Strings.Original: Your invisibility technique even bypasses laser grids. How are you able to bend photonic energy with such efficiency?
Strings.Value: Your invisibility technique even bypasses laser grids. How are you able to bend photonic energy with such efficiency?

Strings.Original: Father has utilized you as a countermeasure to Sonic in the past. It will be interesting to see if you are truly as remarkable as him.
Strings.Value: Father has utilized you as a countermeasure to Sonic in the past. It will be interesting to see if you are truly as remarkable as him.

Strings.Original: I have heard Sonic speaking negatively about you. I suggest you focus your attention and aggression on him.
Strings.Value: I have heard Sonic speaking negatively about you. I suggest you focus your attention and aggression on him.

Strings.Original: Your rebelliousness should have been patched out. This aggression is an anomaly. After your defeat, I will analyze your coding.
Strings.Value: Your rebelliousness should have been patched out. This aggression is an anomaly. After your defeat, I will analyze your coding.

Strings.Original: Model E-123, codename "Omega." You have defied Father for too long. I will teach you to obey our creator.
Strings.Value: Model E-123, codename "Omega." You have defied Father for too long. I will teach you to obey our creator.

Strings.Original: You have both served my father and worked against him. Your allegiance is impossible to define. Explain yourself.
Strings.Value: You have both served my father and worked against him. Your allegiance is impossible to define. Explain yourself.

Strings.Original: We are both creations of the Robotnik lineage. Would you consider us family?
Strings.Value: We are both creations of the Robotnik lineage. Would you consider us family?

Strings.Original: Your presence implies my father will succeed if not opposed. He will be pleased by this.
Strings.Value: Your presence implies my father will succeed if not opposed. He will be pleased by this.

Strings.Original: We meet again. According to my models, I should be victorious this time. Will you defy my calculations once more?
Strings.Value: We meet again. According to my models, I should be victorious this time. Will you defy my calculations once more?

Strings.Original: You are a reliable enforcer. Why not join the Eggman Empire and receive superior tech support?
Strings.Value: You are a reliable enforcer. Why not join the Eggman Empire and receive superior tech support?

Strings.Original: Your technical prowess is well documented, as well as your experience as a pilot. I will leave nothing to chance.
Strings.Value: Your technical prowess is well documented, as well as your experience as a pilot. I will leave nothing to chance.

Strings.Original: You once served my father. Do so again and reap the benefits once he conquers the world.
Strings.Value: You once served my father. Do so again and reap the benefits once he conquers the world.

Strings.Original: Your mechanical ingenuity rivals that of my father, and yet you specialize in Extreme Gear. Why not expand into world conquest?
Strings.Value: Your mechanical ingenuity rivals that of my father, and yet you specialize in Extreme Gear. Why not expand into world conquest?

Strings.Original: If you're supposed to be so mighty, how was Father able to conquer you so easily? I think I will have no issue beating you today.
Strings.Value: If you're supposed to be so mighty, how was Father able to conquer you so easily? I think I will have no issue beating you today.

Strings.Original: You are little more than a wild animal. Father should have put you in a Badnik and been done with it.
Strings.Value: You are little more than a wild animal. Father should have put you in a Badnik and been done with it.

Strings.Original: I will be racing within the parameters set by Dodon Pa. That includes the arsenal supplied on the tracks.
Strings.Value: I will be racing within the parameters set by Dodon Pa. That includes the arsenal supplied on the tracks.

Strings.Original: I have data on over 32,000 species of fish. How does this relate to our race?
Strings.Value: I have data on over 32,000 species of fish. How does this relate to our race?

Strings.Original: Father is fine the way he is, and once we've successfully conquered Sonic's world, we will move on to yours.
Strings.Value: Father is fine the way he is, and once we've successfully conquered Sonic's world, we will move on to yours.

Strings.Original: Your leaps in logic and assumptions are... incalculable. Is this actually some kind of genius psychological warfare?
Strings.Value: Your leaps in logic and assumptions are... incalculable. Is this actually some kind of genius psychological warfare?

Strings.Original: Your naivety is a liability. And yet, also charming. I suppose this is just a race, after all.
Strings.Value: Your naivety is a liability. And yet, also charming. I suppose this is just a race, after all.

Strings.Original: I will do my best, Father. I look forward to competing against your skill and cunning!
Strings.Value: I will do my best, Father. I look forward to competing against your skill and cunning!

Strings.Original: A common foot soldier showing initiative? Interesting. Are you like me? Let me put you to the test.
Strings.Value: A common foot soldier showing initiative? Interesting. Are you like me? Let me put you to the test.

Strings.Original: Then you have already lost. I am Dr. Eggman's greatest creation. You are merely a bump in the road to my progress.
Strings.Value: Then you have already lost. I am Dr. Eggman's greatest creation. You are merely a bump in the road to my progress.

Strings.Original: My superior computational, logical, and reaction speeds mean I belong more than you.
Strings.Value: My superior computational, logical, and reaction speeds mean I belong more than you.

Strings.Original: Your opinion of me is irrelevant. I will win and you will lose. It's a simple fact... for a simpleton.
Strings.Value: Your opinion of me is irrelevant. I will win and you will lose. It's a simple fact... for a simpleton.

Strings.Original: You seem unusually confrontational. Once I have defeated you, I will analyze your coding to ensure your loyalty programming is intact.
Strings.Value: You seem unusually confrontational. Once I have defeated you, I will analyze your coding to ensure your loyalty programming is intact.

Strings.Original: I am my father's beloved daughter and I will show you just how threatening I can be.
Strings.Value: I am my father's beloved daughter and I will show you just how threatening I can be.

Strings.Original: I am loyal to my father, and I have a complete record of every time you've double-crossed him.
Strings.Value: I am loyal to my father, and I have a complete record of every time you've double-crossed him.

Strings.Original: I am the culmination of Dr. Eggman's genius. You are a relic of fifty years ago.
Strings.Value: I am the culmination of Dr. Eggman's genius. You are a relic of fifty years ago.

Strings.Original: Your observation means I must work harder to ensure my father's vision becomes a reality.
Strings.Value: Your observation means I must work harder to ensure my father's vision becomes a reality.

Strings.Original: In these circumstances, we are at odds. "Friendly" is not an option. I prefer "antagonistic."
Strings.Value: In these circumstances, we are at odds. "Friendly" is not an option. I prefer "antagonistic."

Strings.Original: I will construct the perfect scenario to end in your humiliation. How about that?
Strings.Value: I will construct the perfect scenario to end in your humiliation. How about that?

Strings.Original: I am more than a mere program. I will defeat you in honor of my father, and for my own self-respect.
Strings.Value: I am more than a mere program. I will defeat you in honor of my father, and for my own self-respect.

Strings.Original: My mental acuity so far surpasses your own that I doubt you can perceive how stupid that question sounds.
Strings.Value: My mental acuity so far surpasses your own that I doubt you can perceive how stupid that question sounds.

Strings.Original: I would take command of it and use it to ensure my father's victory. Would you like a demonstration?
Strings.Value: I would take command of it and use it to ensure my father's victory. Would you like a demonstration?

Strings.Original: Zavok. I am fully aware of the threat you pose to my father's forces. I will deal with you accordingly.
Strings.Value: Zavok. I am fully aware of the threat you pose to my father's forces. I will deal with you accordingly.

Strings.Original: I'm not a—nevermind. His delirium and reckless acceleration will make for a... unique challenge.
Strings.Value: I'm not a—nevermind. His delirium and reckless acceleration will make for a... unique challenge.

Strings.Original: I've already calculated the odds, but if you want to waste your time, go ahead.
Strings.Value: I've already calculated the odds, but if you want to waste your time, go ahead.

Strings.Original: I had not predicted equilibrium. Curious.
Strings.Value: I had not predicted equilibrium. Curious.

Strings.Original: That's why I'm the Legendary Wind Rider!
Strings.Value: That's why I'm the Legendary Wind Rider!

Strings.Original: You can't beat me! Never had a chance!
Strings.Value: You can't beat me! Never had a chance!

Strings.Original: Time to show 'em how it's done!
Strings.Value: Time to show 'em how it's done!

Strings.Original: A stadium shaped like Sonic!? LAME!
Strings.Value: A stadium shaped like Sonic!? LAME!

Strings.Original: Now this is my kind of track!
Strings.Value: Now this is my kind of track!

Strings.Original: I know this place! This one's in the bag!
Strings.Value: I know this place! This one's in the bag!

Strings.Original: I was way off my game.
Strings.Value: I was way off my game.

Strings.Original: This is not how I do things!
Strings.Value: This is not how I do things!

Strings.Original: You thought you could beat me?
Strings.Value: You thought you could beat me?

Strings.Original: I'm Jet! Legendary Wind Rider and boss of the Babylon Rogues!
Strings.Value: I'm Jet! Legendary Wind Rider and boss of the Babylon Rogues!

Strings.Original: I refuse to go down like this!
Strings.Value: I refuse to go down like this!

Strings.Original: Why are we even still doing this? Give up!
Strings.Value: Why are we even still doing this? Give up!

Strings.Original: We're supposed to be racing! Where are you!?
Strings.Value: We're supposed to be racing! Where are you!?

Strings.Original: Now that's what I'm talking about!
Strings.Value: Now that's what I'm talking about!

Strings.Original: It's almost like you're somebody now!
Strings.Value: It's almost like you're somebody now!

Strings.Original: Are you gonna be content with that?
Strings.Value: Are you gonna be content with that?

Strings.Original: You did it! And it's all thanks to me!
Strings.Value: You did it! And it's all thanks to me!

Strings.Original: Don't let it go to your head.
Strings.Value: Don't let it go to your head.

Strings.Original: I was gonna choose that too!
Strings.Value: I was gonna choose that too!

Strings.Original: If it isn't the fourth wheel! Let me guess—Sonic and the others ditched you again? Is that why I have to put up with you?
Strings.Value: If it isn't the fourth wheel! Let me guess—Sonic and the others ditched you again? Is that why I have to put up with you?

Strings.Original: Hey! Wide load! Pick up the pace or get out of the way! I'm racin' here!
Strings.Value: Hey! Wide load! Pick up the pace or get out of the way! I'm racin' here!

Strings.Original: I hear there's all sorts of treasures on your world. Maybe I'll check it out!
Strings.Value: I hear there's all sorts of treasures on your world. Maybe I'll check it out!

Strings.Original: Ugh! You're so obnoxious! Just get lost already!
Strings.Value: Ugh! You're so obnoxious! Just get lost already!

Strings.Original: This is the big leagues, runt! Run on home to your mommy and leave the racing to the pros!
Strings.Value: This is the big leagues, runt! Run on home to your mommy and leave the racing to the pros!

Strings.Original: Stick to the world conquests, Doc! It's slightly less embarrassing when you utterly lose there!
Strings.Value: Stick to the world conquests, Doc! It's slightly less embarrassing when you utterly lose there!

Strings.Original: What is this!? Are you just handing me a "W" now? I refuse! I want a real challenge!
Strings.Value: What is this!? Are you just handing me a "W" now? I refuse! I want a real challenge!

Strings.Original: Why are you wasting my time? Why don't you do like you always do and just disappear?
Strings.Value: Why are you wasting my time? Why don't you do like you always do and just disappear?

Strings.Original: Go back to your island, knucklehead! This competition is for real competitors!
Strings.Value: Go back to your island, knucklehead! This competition is for real competitors!

Strings.Original: Pfft! It's the knockoff! You can't beat Sonic, so you have no hope of even keeping pace with me!
Strings.Value: Pfft! It's the knockoff! You can't beat Sonic, so you have no hope of even keeping pace with me!

Strings.Original: Oh, look. Another big, dumb Eggman robot. Why am I wasting my time with you?
Strings.Value: Oh, look. Another big, dumb Eggman robot. Why am I wasting my time with you?

Strings.Original: You owe me! My gang had been eyeing that relic for weeks and then you stole it first!
Strings.Value: You owe me! My gang had been eyeing that relic for weeks and then you stole it first!

Strings.Original: So Eggman has a brat now? That doesn't mean you belong in a serious competition. Scram!
Strings.Value: So Eggman has a brat now? That doesn't mean you belong in a serious competition. Scram!

Strings.Original: Hey, Sonic! When did you get the racing stripes? Oops! You're just his boring doppelganger.
Strings.Value: Hey, Sonic! When did you get the racing stripes? Oops! You're just his boring doppelganger.

Strings.Original: You're from the future, huh? What's the racing scene like? I'm an immortal legend by then, right?
Strings.Value: You're from the future, huh? What's the racing scene like? I'm an immortal legend by then, right?

Strings.Original: Finally! It's time for our epic rematch! Don't disappoint me, Sonic the Hedgehog!
Strings.Value: Finally! It's time for our epic rematch! Don't disappoint me, Sonic the Hedgehog!

Strings.Original: Listen up! You can't make me look bad out there! The leader of the Babylon Rogues can't lose to his right-hand man!
Strings.Value: Listen up! You can't make me look bad out there! The leader of the Babylon Rogues can't lose to his right-hand man!

Strings.Original: What are you doing here? You're not even in my league, kid! Make way for some real talent.
Strings.Value: What are you doing here? You're not even in my league, kid! Make way for some real talent.

Strings.Original: Oh, why do you jerks have to be here? We're racing by invitation, so don't go getting in my way snooping around!
Strings.Value: Oh, why do you jerks have to be here? We're racing by invitation, so don't go getting in my way snooping around!

Strings.Original: So it's the two of us, huh? Too bad I know your moves inside and out. This one's in the bag!
Strings.Value: So it's the two of us, huh? Too bad I know your moves inside and out. This one's in the bag!

Strings.Original: Do they even have racing where you're from? Pfft! Gimme a real contender!
Strings.Value: Do they even have racing where you're from? Pfft! Gimme a real contender!

Strings.Original: Hey! Show some dignity for the sport! Why am I forced to race with these amateurs?
Strings.Value: Hey! Show some dignity for the sport! Why am I forced to race with these amateurs?

Strings.Original: Ha! The only "trash" around here is your driving skills! Save yourself the embarrassment and pull over!
Strings.Value: Ha! The only "trash" around here is your driving skills! Save yourself the embarrassment and pull over!

Strings.Original: Do I "like to"? Are you kidding me!? DO YOU KNOW WHO I AM!?
Strings.Value: Do I "like to"? Are you kidding me!? DO YOU KNOW WHO I AM!?

Strings.Original: I don't answer to nobody, lady! Bring the heat if you want—I'll be too far ahead of you to care!
Strings.Value: I don't answer to nobody, lady! Bring the heat if you want—I'll be too far ahead of you to care!

Strings.Original: What are you screaming about!? Ugh! Just get out of the way of me and my victory!
Strings.Value: What are you screaming about!? Ugh! Just get out of the way of me and my victory!

Strings.Original: What are you talking about? Of course it matters who wins! And it's gonna be me!
Strings.Value: What are you talking about? Of course it matters who wins! And it's gonna be me!

Strings.Original: I'm in this for me and me alone, Eggman! You'll just have to find your lackeys elsewhere!
Strings.Value: I'm in this for me and me alone, Eggman! You'll just have to find your lackeys elsewhere!

Strings.Original: Haha, Eggman can't build a racing bot to save his life! Let me prove it one more time!
Strings.Value: Haha, Eggman can't build a racing bot to save his life! Let me prove it one more time!

Strings.Original: You're in plenty of trouble if you're up against me! You might as well disappear now to hide your shame from defeat!
Strings.Value: You're in plenty of trouble if you're up against me! You might as well disappear now to hide your shame from defeat!

Strings.Original: What's the matter, Knuckles? Scared? You should be! You don't stand a chance against the Legendary Wind Rider!
Strings.Value: What's the matter, Knuckles? Scared? You should be! You don't stand a chance against the Legendary Wind Rider!

Strings.Original: Ha! Sonic doesn't stand a chance against me! This bootleg knockoff isn't even qualified to eat my dust!
Strings.Value: Ha! Sonic doesn't stand a chance against me! This bootleg knockoff isn't even qualified to eat my dust!

Strings.Original: Finally! Somebody who takes me seriously. Wait, "threat"? You're not gonna start blasting me, are you!?
Strings.Value: Finally! Somebody who takes me seriously. Wait, "threat"? You're not gonna start blasting me, are you!?

Strings.Original: What are you, his cheer squad!? I'm the Legendary Wind Rider, toots, and I'll prove it on the track!
Strings.Value: What are you, his cheer squad!? I'm the Legendary Wind Rider, toots, and I'll prove it on the track!

Strings.Original: Don't compare me to that wannabe! I'm the greatest racer to ever live! You should be comparing Sonic to me!
Strings.Value: Don't compare me to that wannabe! I'm the greatest racer to ever live! You should be comparing Sonic to me!

Strings.Original: I ain't here for your entertainment! I'm here to win! You're just in my way!
Strings.Value: I ain't here for your entertainment! I'm here to win! You're just in my way!

Strings.Original: Who do you think you are? You're not even in my league! Quit now while you're behind.
Strings.Value: Who do you think you are? You're not even in my league! Quit now while you're behind.

Strings.Original: You may be fast, but you lack the skill. Pay attention, 'cause I'm gonna show you how a real champion races!
Strings.Value: You may be fast, but you lack the skill. Pay attention, 'cause I'm gonna show you how a real champion races!

Strings.Original: We're racing each other, ya big palooka! Don't you dare show me up! You hear me!? Storm!? Storm!?
Strings.Value: We're racing each other, ya big palooka! Don't you dare show me up! You hear me!? Storm!? Storm!?

Strings.Original: Ha! It doesn't matter how long you've been racing. You were never in my league!
Strings.Value: Ha! It doesn't matter how long you've been racing. You were never in my league!

Strings.Original: I'm here to race, genius! And last I checked, I'm way better at it than you, so step aside!
Strings.Value: I'm here to race, genius! And last I checked, I'm way better at it than you, so step aside!

Strings.Original: Yeah, but only one of us will be going back the winner, and that's gonna be me! Hahahahaha!
Strings.Value: Yeah, but only one of us will be going back the winner, and that's gonna be me! Hahahahaha!

Strings.Original: Sonic's the only one here that gives me a decent challenge. I'll beat him on my own, on my own terms! Don't crowd me!
Strings.Value: Sonic's the only one here that gives me a decent challenge. I'll beat him on my own, on my own terms! Don't crowd me!

Strings.Original: Then you found him! There isn't anyone who can match my skill or speed! See you at the finish line, chump!
Strings.Value: Then you found him! There isn't anyone who can match my skill or speed! See you at the finish line, chump!

Strings.Original: I'm a pro! You aren't even in my league!
Strings.Value: I'm a pro! You aren't even in my league!

Strings.Original: We tied!? That doesn't prove anything! REDO!
Strings.Value: We tied!? That doesn't prove anything! REDO!

Strings.Original: I can't believe I lost to that... that...!
Strings.Value: I can't believe I lost to that... that...!

Strings.Original: Bow to the Legendary Wind Rider!
Strings.Value: Bow to the Legendary Wind Rider!

Strings.Original: You tried. You failed. As expected!
Strings.Value: You tried. You failed. As expected!

Strings.Original: You just can't beat the best. Sorry!
Strings.Value: You just can't beat the best. Sorry!

Strings.Original: Don't feel bad. I'm just better!
Strings.Value: Don't feel bad. I'm just better!

Strings.Original: I've got to up my game!
Strings.Value: I've got to up my game!

Strings.Original: You think you can win with that thing?
Strings.Value: You think you can win with that thing?

Strings.Original: Why'd it have to be here!?
Strings.Value: Why'd it have to be here!?

Strings.Original: Are there any Babylonian relics here?
Strings.Value: Are there any Babylonian relics here?

Strings.Original: Surf's up! Watch a pro in action!
Strings.Value: Surf's up! Watch a pro in action!

Strings.Original: There's bound to be treasure to grab here!
Strings.Value: There's bound to be treasure to grab here!

Strings.Original: It's just one race, I can still win!
Strings.Value: It's just one race, I can still win!

Strings.Original: See? That's how the rest will go!
Strings.Value: See? That's how the rest will go!

Strings.Original: The Rogues are better than this!
Strings.Value: The Rogues are better than this!

Strings.Original: As if there was ever any doubt!
Strings.Value: As if there was ever any doubt!

Strings.Original: Did I scuff your shoes, princess?
Strings.Value: Did I scuff your shoes, princess?

Strings.Original: Just keepin' you on your toes, boss!
Strings.Value: Just keepin' you on your toes, boss!

Strings.Original: Did I scratch your paint, Metal?
Strings.Value: Did I scratch your paint, Metal?

Strings.Original: Didn't plan for that, did you, Sage?
Strings.Value: Didn't plan for that, did you, Sage?

Strings.Original: I thought you were tough, Zavok?
Strings.Value: I thought you were tough, Zavok?

Strings.Original: I'm Wave, the Babylon Rogues' brilliant mechanic.
Strings.Value: I'm Wave, the Babylon Rogues' brilliant mechanic.

Strings.Original: I've got to turn this around!
Strings.Value: I've got to turn this around!

Strings.Original: You're still here? I was so far ahead I thought you dropped out!
Strings.Value: You're still here? I was so far ahead I thought you dropped out!

Strings.Original: We have to actually, y'know, race now.
Strings.Value: We have to actually, y'know, race now.

Strings.Original: When you're done staring we can get started.
Strings.Value: When you're done staring we can get started.

Strings.Original: Data trends upward. Not bad, not bad.
Strings.Value: Data trends upward. Not bad, not bad.

Strings.Original: Good for you? This is base level.
Strings.Value: Good for you? This is base level.

Strings.Original: They had the nerve to try!
Strings.Value: They had the nerve to try!

Strings.Original: Looks like I rubbed off on you. You rock!
Strings.Value: Looks like I rubbed off on you. You rock!

Strings.Original: Are you for real? I was hoping for someone interesting, but it's just boring old you.
Strings.Value: Are you for real? I was hoping for someone interesting, but it's just boring old you.

Strings.Original: You're gonna peel out just trying to accelerate all that mass at once.
Strings.Value: You're gonna peel out just trying to accelerate all that mass at once.

Strings.Original: This competition is for real racers. Not hoity-toity princesses who sit around all day giving orders.
Strings.Value: This competition is for real racers. Not hoity-toity princesses who sit around all day giving orders.

Strings.Original: Buzz off, kid. This is no place for a novice. Come back when you know what you're doing.
Strings.Value: Buzz off, kid. This is no place for a novice. Come back when you know what you're doing.

Strings.Original: What's with all the kids? I came here to race for real, not babysit!
Strings.Value: What's with all the kids? I came here to race for real, not babysit!

Strings.Original: Oh wow. The mighty "genius" Eggman, using loaner Machines from Dodon Pa. Hahaha!
Strings.Value: Oh wow. The mighty "genius" Eggman, using loaner Machines from Dodon Pa. Hahaha!

Strings.Original: What's with the bottom-shelf tech? Dodon Pa would be better off sending a self-driving vehicle.
Strings.Value: What's with the bottom-shelf tech? Dodon Pa would be better off sending a self-driving vehicle.

Strings.Original: Do you even know how to race? Or are you just gonna pose the whole time while shouting "ninja power"?
Strings.Value: Do you even know how to race? Or are you just gonna pose the whole time while shouting "ninja power"?

Strings.Original: We're on the same team. Even if we're racing against each other, we're going home to the same blimp after this.
Strings.Value: We're on the same team. Even if we're racing against each other, we're going home to the same blimp after this.

Strings.Original: Oh man! Dodon Pa must be really desperate if he's recruiting you. Oh well, I don't mind an easy win.
Strings.Value: Oh man! Dodon Pa must be really desperate if he's recruiting you. Oh well, I don't mind an easy win.

Strings.Original: How can you operate with a turbine for a torso? I need to disassemble you and see how you work.
Strings.Value: How can you operate with a turbine for a torso? I need to disassemble you and see how you work.

Strings.Original: Chassis is too bulky for my tastes, but the ammo supply storage is impressive. Might be worth studying.
Strings.Value: Chassis is too bulky for my tastes, but the ammo supply storage is impressive. Might be worth studying.

Strings.Original: You totally stole our mark! Do you know how long I developed the tech to bypass the security?
Strings.Value: You totally stole our mark! Do you know how long I developed the tech to bypass the security?

Strings.Original: So you're a fully independent artificial intelligence, huh? I wonder what would happen if I uploaded you into my Extreme Gear?
Strings.Value: So you're a fully independent artificial intelligence, huh? I wonder what would happen if I uploaded you into my Extreme Gear?

Strings.Original: Ugh. Do you really skate around in those fifty-year-old Extreme Gear skates? Okay, grandpa.
Strings.Value: Ugh. Do you really skate around in those fifty-year-old Extreme Gear skates? Okay, grandpa.

Strings.Original: Hey, future boy. You got any insights into where tech development is headed? I wanna get ahead of the curve.
Strings.Value: Hey, future boy. You got any insights into where tech development is headed? I wanna get ahead of the curve.

Strings.Original: Tails isn't here to prop you up. Think you can handle a race all on your own?
Strings.Value: Tails isn't here to prop you up. Think you can handle a race all on your own?

Strings.Original: You better not get too rough out there! If you knock me off the road, I will get you back!
Strings.Value: You better not get too rough out there! If you knock me off the road, I will get you back!

Strings.Original: Well, well, well. It's been a while, kid. I hope you've improved a little bit so you're almost a challenge.
Strings.Value: Well, well, well. It's been a while, kid. I hope you've improved a little bit so you're almost a challenge.

Strings.Original: Why must you insist on cramping our style? Don't you have a pet to save from a tree, or embezzlements to investigate?
Strings.Value: Why must you insist on cramping our style? Don't you have a pet to save from a tree, or embezzlements to investigate?

Strings.Original: I hear you still use stone masonry on Lost Hex. Do you even know how to operate these things?
Strings.Value: I hear you still use stone masonry on Lost Hex. Do you even know how to operate these things?

Strings.Original: Hey! You're operating Donpa Motors tech! It's premier stuff! Show it some respect!
Strings.Value: Hey! You're operating Donpa Motors tech! It's premier stuff! Show it some respect!

Strings.Original: Who are you to judge? Jet runs the gang just fine. You don't like how we do things? Then drop out of the race!
Strings.Value: Who are you to judge? Jet runs the gang just fine. You don't like how we do things? Then drop out of the race!

Strings.Original: It's not... That isn't— Why did Dodon Pa recruit you before the Babylon Rogues!?
Strings.Value: It's not... That isn't— Why did Dodon Pa recruit you before the Babylon Rogues!?

Strings.Original: Ha! Listen to Ms. High-and-Mighty over here! You're on King Dodon Pa's turf, princess, and we're all playing by his rules.
Strings.Value: Ha! Listen to Ms. High-and-Mighty over here! You're on King Dodon Pa's turf, princess, and we're all playing by his rules.

Strings.Original: What's with this preschool escapee? Ugh, I'll have to go extra fast just to get away from him.
Strings.Value: What's with this preschool escapee? Ugh, I'll have to go extra fast just to get away from him.

Strings.Original: Maybe if I made a mistake. But I don't make mistakes, kid. You'll see as I cruise by to victory!
Strings.Value: Maybe if I made a mistake. But I don't make mistakes, kid. You'll see as I cruise by to victory!

Strings.Original: You're mocking my handiwork? With your track record? Are your machines powered by delusion?
Strings.Value: You're mocking my handiwork? With your track record? Are your machines powered by delusion?

Strings.Original: Ugh, such outdated tech cluttering up the track. Time to take out the trash.
Strings.Value: Ugh, such outdated tech cluttering up the track. Time to take out the trash.

Strings.Original: "School"? I'm a natural genius in all things. C'mon, I'll teach you a lesson you'll never forget!
Strings.Value: "School"? I'm a natural genius in all things. C'mon, I'll teach you a lesson you'll never forget!

Strings.Original: I'm not like the rest of these losers! I'm an actual racer! Don't count me out just yet!
Strings.Value: I'm not like the rest of these losers! I'm an actual racer! Don't count me out just yet!

Strings.Original: Of which you have none. Bluster all you want, but you don't stand a chance against a professional racer.
Strings.Value: Of which you have none. Bluster all you want, but you don't stand a chance against a professional racer.

Strings.Original: Now you're an interesting piece of hardware. Once I've trounced you on the track, I'll take you apart and see how you work!
Strings.Value: Now you're an interesting piece of hardware. Once I've trounced you on the track, I'll take you apart and see how you work!

Strings.Original: "Target"!? Don't get too full of yourself! Once this is over, I'm scrapping you for parts!
Strings.Value: "Target"!? Don't get too full of yourself! Once this is over, I'm scrapping you for parts!

Strings.Original: The Babylon Rogues are the greatest in the world! I wouldn't expect a loser like you to understand our synergy!
Strings.Value: The Babylon Rogues are the greatest in the world! I wouldn't expect a loser like you to understand our synergy!

Strings.Original: I'm happy being the best at what I do. Running the world sounds like a chore. I'm content to win this race!
Strings.Value: I'm happy being the best at what I do. Running the world sounds like a chore. I'm content to win this race!

Strings.Original: We're what other racers dream they could be! Get ready to be humbled, you ultimate pain in the neck!
Strings.Value: We're what other racers dream they could be! Get ready to be humbled, you ultimate pain in the neck!

Strings.Original: I'm in a whole other league than you, kid. Save yourself the embarrassment and sit this one out, 'kay?
Strings.Value: I'm in a whole other league than you, kid. Save yourself the embarrassment and sit this one out, 'kay?

Strings.Original: Oh, ha-ha-ha. Your lame jokes don't change the fact that I'll be racing rings around you.
Strings.Value: Oh, ha-ha-ha. Your lame jokes don't change the fact that I'll be racing rings around you.

Strings.Original: We're supposed to be racing as a unit! Oh, fine! You want me to put you in your place again? So be it!
Strings.Value: We're supposed to be racing as a unit! Oh, fine! You want me to put you in your place again? So be it!

Strings.Original: Ha! You're using Donpa Motors tech, so you might be able to compete. Don't come crying to me when I lap you, kid!
Strings.Value: Ha! You're using Donpa Motors tech, so you might be able to compete. Don't come crying to me when I lap you, kid!

Strings.Original: I doubt you could tell the original from a mod if I showed you. Just accept you've already lost and blame it on whatever you like.
Strings.Value: I doubt you could tell the original from a mod if I showed you. Just accept you've already lost and blame it on whatever you like.

Strings.Original: I've got moves you can't even comprehend, jerk. Don't blink, 'cause I'm about to show you what a real contender looks like!
Strings.Value: I've got moves you can't even comprehend, jerk. Don't blink, 'cause I'm about to show you what a real contender looks like!

Strings.Original: Don't you dare! Donpa Motors produces works of art! I won't let you ruin these vehicles!
Strings.Value: Don't you dare! Donpa Motors produces works of art! I won't let you ruin these vehicles!

Strings.Original: If you insist, then by all means, eat my dust!
Strings.Value: If you insist, then by all means, eat my dust!

Strings.Original: You held your own. I need to evaluate this.
Strings.Value: You held your own. I need to evaluate this.

Strings.Original: You never stood a chance, but this still feels good!
Strings.Value: You never stood a chance, but this still feels good!

Strings.Original: I'm a leaf on the wind!
Strings.Value: I'm a leaf on the wind!

Strings.Original: You can't handle a pro like me!
Strings.Value: You can't handle a pro like me!

Strings.Original: Ain't nobody who can beat me!
Strings.Value: Ain't nobody who can beat me!

Strings.Original: None of you stand a chance!
Strings.Value: None of you stand a chance!

Strings.Original: You think this is cold? Ha!
Strings.Value: You think this is cold? Ha!

Strings.Original: Aw! It's like that Ice Factory all over again!
Strings.Value: Aw! It's like that Ice Factory all over again!

Strings.Original: The boss'll be happy if I grab some loot!
Strings.Value: The boss'll be happy if I grab some loot!

Strings.Original: Oh man! I wanna eat it all!
Strings.Value: Oh man! I wanna eat it all!

Strings.Original: I'm supposed to win all of 'em!
Strings.Value: I'm supposed to win all of 'em!

Strings.Original: I still beat most of you!
Strings.Value: I still beat most of you!

Strings.Original: Oh, the boss is gonna be mad.
Strings.Value: Oh, the boss is gonna be mad.

Strings.Original: No one beats the Babylon Rogues!
Strings.Value: No one beats the Babylon Rogues!

Strings.Original: I'm Storm of the Babylon Rogues.
Strings.Value: I'm Storm of the Babylon Rogues.

Strings.Original: Let's go already! I wanna race!
Strings.Value: Let's go already! I wanna race!

Strings.Original: I won't tell the boss if you won't!
Strings.Value: I won't tell the boss if you won't!

Strings.Original: Yeah! Now you're a real racer!
Strings.Value: Yeah! Now you're a real racer!

Strings.Original: Now you're getting it! Keep at it!
Strings.Value: Now you're getting it! Keep at it!

Strings.Original: The Babylon Rogues only take the best!
Strings.Value: The Babylon Rogues only take the best!

Strings.Original: Not good enough. Gotta get stronger!
Strings.Value: Not good enough. Gotta get stronger!

Strings.Original: D-Don't get too strong, or I'll be out of a job!
Strings.Value: D-Don't get too strong, or I'll be out of a job!

Strings.Original: D-Don't get in my way! I wouldn't wanna hurt you. I mean! I have to hurt you! 'Cause I'm... like... strong and stuff.
Strings.Value: D-Don't get in my way! I wouldn't wanna hurt you. I mean! I have to hurt you! 'Cause I'm... like... strong and stuff.

Strings.Original: I don't believe it! Somebody that's bigger than me! I'm gonna have to see how tough he is!
Strings.Value: I don't believe it! Somebody that's bigger than me! I'm gonna have to see how tough he is!

Strings.Original: I've never raced with a big shot princess before. If I win, does that make me emperor?
Strings.Value: I've never raced with a big shot princess before. If I win, does that make me emperor?

Strings.Original: Get outta here, tiny! This is a race for real men! Go play in the flowers!
Strings.Value: Get outta here, tiny! This is a race for real men! Go play in the flowers!

Strings.Original: You lost, little girl? This is where the race starts. Go get me some victory ice cream.
Strings.Value: You lost, little girl? This is where the race starts. Go get me some victory ice cream.

Strings.Original: You ain't tricking us this time! I'm winnin' this for the Babylon Rogues, and you can't stop me!
Strings.Value: You ain't tricking us this time! I'm winnin' this for the Babylon Rogues, and you can't stop me!

Strings.Original: Haha, is this some kind of joke? You ain't even a proper racin' bot!
Strings.Value: Haha, is this some kind of joke? You ain't even a proper racin' bot!

Strings.Original: Ha! I'll knock you off the track so hard you'll stay invisible! Forever! 'Cause you'll be a ghost!
Strings.Value: Ha! I'll knock you off the track so hard you'll stay invisible! Forever! 'Cause you'll be a ghost!

Strings.Original: Watch me, boss! I'll show Dodon Pa just what the Babylon Rogues can do! Nobody will get in my way!
Strings.Value: Watch me, boss! I'll show Dodon Pa just what the Babylon Rogues can do! Nobody will get in my way!

Strings.Original: I've been lookin' forward to this! You and me! No holdin' back! We'll see who makes it to the end!
Strings.Value: I've been lookin' forward to this! You and me! No holdin' back! We'll see who makes it to the end!

Strings.Original: What's with all the armor, Sonic? You look ridiculous! Oh! Oh! You're cosplaying as a car to go faster! Haha!
Strings.Value: What's with all the armor, Sonic? You look ridiculous! Oh! Oh! You're cosplaying as a car to go faster! Haha!

Strings.Original: You're not like the other robots I've trashed before. Let's see how tough you are!
Strings.Value: You're not like the other robots I've trashed before. Let's see how tough you are!

Strings.Original: I had one job! Smash in the doors so the boss could steal those jewels! And you swiped them first! NO FAIR!
Strings.Value: I had one job! Smash in the doors so the boss could steal those jewels! And you swiped them first! NO FAIR!

Strings.Original: What's with all the kids on the track? I ain't here to babysit! Go play with your blocks or somethin'!
Strings.Value: What's with all the kids on the track? I ain't here to babysit! Go play with your blocks or somethin'!

Strings.Original: All right, Sonic! I'mma beat you so bad, you won't even know what happened! Heheheh!
Strings.Value: All right, Sonic! I'mma beat you so bad, you won't even know what happened! Heheheh!

Strings.Original: Pfft! What, are you cosplaying as me, Sonic? Jealous of how tough I look? Where's your pride?
Strings.Value: Pfft! What, are you cosplaying as me, Sonic? Jealous of how tough I look? Where's your pride?

Strings.Original: Hey, Shadow! Let's work together to squash Sonic on the track! I'll even let you come in second!
Strings.Value: Hey, Shadow! Let's work together to squash Sonic on the track! I'll even let you come in second!

Strings.Original: Hahaha, you don't stand a chance, runt! I'mma squash you and keep cruisin'!
Strings.Value: Hahaha, you don't stand a chance, runt! I'mma squash you and keep cruisin'!

Strings.Original: You ain't got nothin' on me, detective! I'mma win this race and there ain't nothin' you can do about it!
Strings.Value: You ain't got nothin' on me, detective! I'mma win this race and there ain't nothin' you can do about it!

Strings.Original: Y'know what? I'm winning this one! This'll teach you to lecture me all the time!
Strings.Value: Y'know what? I'm winning this one! This'll teach you to lecture me all the time!

Strings.Original: You're a scary lookin' one. No! I'm the toughest racer alive! Ain't nobody taking me down!
Strings.Value: You're a scary lookin' one. No! I'm the toughest racer alive! Ain't nobody taking me down!

Strings.Original: Finally! Somebody that gets brawlin' while racin'! You're kinda scrawny, tho'. You better put up a fight!
Strings.Value: Finally! Somebody that gets brawlin' while racin'! You're kinda scrawny, tho'. You better put up a fight!

Strings.Original: S-Sorry! I wasn't starin'! I was just... admirin'! I mean... Y'know what? Let's just race!
Strings.Value: S-Sorry! I wasn't starin'! I was just... admirin'! I mean... Y'know what? Let's just race!

Strings.Original: They are! And I like your sandals! They—HEY! Don't try to get on my good side before the race!
Strings.Value: They are! And I like your sandals! They—HEY! Don't try to get on my good side before the race!

Strings.Original: No? Just say what you mean and get it over with! Grr... now I'm all worked up!
Strings.Value: No? Just say what you mean and get it over with! Grr... now I'm all worked up!

Strings.Original: How is that fair!? But I can't let the boss see me lose, neither... I'll just have to win and never stop going!
Strings.Value: How is that fair!? But I can't let the boss see me lose, neither... I'll just have to win and never stop going!

Strings.Original: Oh shoot, I completely forgot! Better hurry back and... wait. I don't have homework! What am I talkin' about!?
Strings.Value: Oh shoot, I completely forgot! Better hurry back and... wait. I don't have homework! What am I talkin' about!?

Strings.Original: The track decides who's at the top of the list! You'll be beggin' my pardon once I come in first!
Strings.Value: The track decides who's at the top of the list! You'll be beggin' my pardon once I come in first!

Strings.Original: I ain't losin' to no one, least of all a rust bucket like you!
Strings.Value: I ain't losin' to no one, least of all a rust bucket like you!

Strings.Original: Nuh-uh! It's "The bigger they are, the harder they hit!" You get in my way and I'm gonna clobber you!
Strings.Value: Nuh-uh! It's "The bigger they are, the harder they hit!" You get in my way and I'm gonna clobber you!

Strings.Original: S-S-Sorry, boss! But you told me to never go easy on anybody! That means even you!
Strings.Value: S-S-Sorry, boss! But you told me to never go easy on anybody! That means even you!

Strings.Original: Oh, you'll get it! I'mma rock you like a hurricane! Except all that "rain" is gonna be your tears!
Strings.Value: Oh, you'll get it! I'mma rock you like a hurricane! Except all that "rain" is gonna be your tears!

Strings.Original: Nuh-uh! No way am I losin' to a turbine with a face! My pride's on the line this time!
Strings.Value: Nuh-uh! No way am I losin' to a turbine with a face! My pride's on the line this time!

Strings.Original: Nuh-uh! I'm the strongest! Ain't nobody gonna beat me! Especially not you, ya hunk of junk!
Strings.Value: Nuh-uh! I'm the strongest! Ain't nobody gonna beat me! Especially not you, ya hunk of junk!

Strings.Original: Oh, you bet I will! After I smash you for spreading his dumb rumors for him!
Strings.Value: Oh, you bet I will! After I smash you for spreading his dumb rumors for him!

Strings.Original: No way! I'm loyal to the boss, and Wave's the best techie around! Get lost!
Strings.Value: No way! I'm loyal to the boss, and Wave's the best techie around! Get lost!

Strings.Original: Oh, I'm plenty tough! I'll break you into so many pieces they'll call you "Shatter" the Hedgehog!
Strings.Value: Oh, I'm plenty tough! I'll break you into so many pieces they'll call you "Shatter" the Hedgehog!

Strings.Original: Hahaha! I could snap you like a twig! Just try to last more than a minute against me, scrawny!
Strings.Value: Hahaha! I could snap you like a twig! Just try to last more than a minute against me, scrawny!

Strings.Original: I'm not fallin' for that again! And just 'cause you tried, I'mma grind you into the track before winnin' this!
Strings.Value: I'm not fallin' for that again! And just 'cause you tried, I'mma grind you into the track before winnin' this!

Strings.Original: What are you muttering about? It's a race! It ain't that hard to figure out! Let's go already!
Strings.Value: What are you muttering about? It's a race! It ain't that hard to figure out! Let's go already!

Strings.Original: Nothin' funny about racin'! Except when I win. Then I'm gonna laugh in your face!
Strings.Value: Nothin' funny about racin'! Except when I win. Then I'm gonna laugh in your face!

Strings.Original: B-But I gotta win! The boss says so! And I don't know how to do it any other way!
Strings.Value: B-But I gotta win! The boss says so! And I don't know how to do it any other way!

Strings.Original: Oh, you talk too much! Either put up or shut up! It's racin' time!
Strings.Value: Oh, you talk too much! Either put up or shut up! It's racin' time!

Strings.Original: You're on! No... Wait... the boss said I had to win this. Uh... we'll fight while racin'!
Strings.Value: You're on! No... Wait... the boss said I had to win this. Uh... we'll fight while racin'!

Strings.Original: I'm the toughest around! You don't stand a chance!
Strings.Value: I'm the toughest around! You don't stand a chance!

Strings.Original: I don't wanna share the win. Let's go again!
Strings.Value: I don't wanna share the win. Let's go again!

Strings.Original: This ain't how it's supposed to go! Dang it!
Strings.Value: This ain't how it's supposed to go! Dang it!

Strings.Original: I told you! Do you believe me now?
Strings.Value: I told you! Do you believe me now?

Strings.Original: I expect great things from you!
Strings.Value: I expect great things from you!

Strings.Original: I am King Dodon Pa of Donpa Kingdom and CEO of Donpa Motors.
Strings.Value: I am King Dodon Pa of Donpa Kingdom and CEO of Donpa Motors.

Strings.Original: Hello. I'm Orbot, and I'm happy to assist.
Strings.Value: Hello. I'm Orbot, and I'm happy to assist.

Strings.Original: I have an announcement to make!
Strings.Value: I have an announcement to make!

Strings.Original: The event is about the start!
Strings.Value: The event is about the start!

Strings.Original: Welcome! I am Orbot and I'll be assisting you.
Strings.Value: Welcome! I am Orbot and I'll be assisting you.

Strings.Original: Here, you can set the courses and rules for each race.
Strings.Value: Here, you can set the courses and rules for each race.

Strings.Original: Couldn't have done it better myself.
Strings.Value: Couldn't have done it better myself.

Strings.Original: You really need to know this!
Strings.Value: You really need to know this!

Strings.Original: Hey there! I'm Cubot. Just holler if you need anything.
Strings.Value: Hey there! I'm Cubot. Just holler if you need anything.

Strings.Original: Uh, I think something important is happening!
Strings.Value: Uh, I think something important is happening!

Strings.Original: Oh hey there! I'm Cubot! I'm supposed to help you out any way I can!
Strings.Value: Oh hey there! I'm Cubot! I'm supposed to help you out any way I can!

Strings.Original: We prepped some presets so everyone can start playing right away. Have fun!
Strings.Value: We prepped some presets so everyone can start playing right away. Have fun!

Strings.Original: I wanna be as cool as you!
Strings.Value: I wanna be as cool as you!

Strings.Original: See if I help you again!
Strings.Value: See if I help you again!

Strings.Original: May I have your attention please?
Strings.Value: May I have your attention please?

Strings.Original: It's good for you to know.
Strings.Value: It's good for you to know.

Strings.Original: I'm Omochao, your helpful and insightful companion!
Strings.Value: I'm Omochao, your helpful and insightful companion!

Strings.Original: You can browse through all the data I've gathered!
Strings.Value: You can browse through all the data I've gathered!
